name: Kendra Lahmeyer
subject: My Husband, Jackson Lahmeyer, Is Almost There...
body:
Kendra Lahmeyer Dear friend, Back in 2021, I told my husband Jackson Lahmeyer that instead of just complaining about the decline of our country, an
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6134.1.82d99922fedfcf6604b34489316ede54)
---
## Kendra Lahmeyer
---
Dear friend, Back in 2021, I told my husband [Jackson Lahmeyer](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6135.1.31ec2a8634438af499d1e2581e72fef3) that instead of just _complaining_ about the decline of our country, and the systematic effort to destroy our constitutional liberties as well as the stolen 2020 election he should _do something_ about it. After much prayer and careful reflection, he decided to challenge Senator [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6136.1.4f455d64eec0abb025121f34c6bdf406) in the upcoming Oklahoma Republican Primary. I knew that this decision would put substantial pressure on both our family and our ministry but I am convinced that he made the right decision. Last week's vote by Senator [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6137.1.44f6c4606411baa20f05d2b23f3a94d3) to send **$40 billion to Ukraine** just reinforced my conviction that [Jackson's](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6138.1.6f63569099be12d19cec96c56e3a3815) decision to challenge this "Republican in name only" was the right one. With homeless veterans going hungry across Oklahoma and with the average family struggling to survive while inflation destroys the purchasing power of our dollars, shipping billions of dollars to Ukraine for another endless foreign war where our nation's interests are not clear is a conscious decision to put **America last**. Making it even worse, Senator [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6139.1.2feec08691ad7c1c9d82cea240cc4756) opposed a motion by **Senator Rand Paul** that would allow a US Inspector General to track and monitor how this $40 billion is spent! We knew from the outset that our battle with the anti-Trump Oklahoma establishment would be uphill. On the other hand, the response from rank and file grassroots republican voters has been **phenomenal**. Literally thousands of people have turned out for [Jackson's](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6140.1.c5dc9c7cae5dee1454fc52087ac46f96) rallies and our campaign has raised over $900,000 from over 8,000 individual Oklahoma voters. [Jackson](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6141.1.38fa88866ddc049827dbe18b1dce6bee) has personally visited 74 of Oklahoma's 77 counties, and our campaign has named a Lahmeyer Chairman in 58 counties so far. Senator [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6142.1.09bb4dc417488ad091e19109f99b4efe) seems to be having trouble getting more than 100 people to attend any of his events which generally feature other big Washington insiders as his special guests. [Jackson](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6143.1.d4ee7382a423b67be8f7b6fd86bbc751) is particularly proud of the fact that Trump National Security Advisor **General Michael Flynn** , long time Trump Political Advisor **Roger Stone** , and now former New York City Mayor and former Trump Advisor **Rudy Guiliani** have now endorsed [Jackson's](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6144.1.274b77b5d3d748be39bb35f174c5da87) candidacy. Our campaign has been handicapped by a relentless leak of "Polls" that ridiculously show [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6145.1.8c68c711f895501519a88be3818f3aa6) with 74% of the voting, claiming that [Jackson](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6146.1.a83f3b2baa8d6dcc95518ad534a7f7a7) is at 7%. In fact, [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6147.1.2631da1ed47cc6a941ab0d83f462e54b) has spent over $3 million on expensive cable television advertising but has been unable to win 50% of the vote. We have seen [Jackson's](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6148.1.df5b4338c087d101527cfc64a20ea19d) support grow from 23% to 37% at the same time [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6149.1.7802425263d73fb0f1e3b5e96203c656) has dropped 63% to 47%. The trend is clear: [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6150.1.09c4fc2af76b6108d9075786dcff9a25) is dropping and [Jackson](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6151.1.4e15fee00c289300af1e8870af8ee833) is consistently gaining. Voters should not be fooled by fake polls being floated by political insiders desperate to cling to power. Frankly, I think [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6152.1.cf515fa9682e591a5650d5cbd3432a0e) has also been harmed by his failure to stand up against COVID-19 vaccination mandates at the same time he has pocketed thousands of dollars from Pfizer, and other vaccine manufacturers. Now I understand why [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6153.1.70c6389bb4ae1059410a9ffc1d605b82), a 10 year veteran of Washington DC and the ultimate political insider, refuses to meet [Jackson](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6154.1.5312667dc1eb1e512361f36a1a08f36c) in an open and fair debate. As [Jackson](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6155.1.9f1b8919f645052e04e38fbcbea5defa) becomes better known and more voters learn of [Lankford's](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6156.1.60b91f24b1ce783bef3c4bbdf06019f6) stark betrayal of President Trump on January 6th, where he voted to certify the election of Joe Biden and then apologized to BLM in Tulsa for suggesting that the election results could be fraudulent, [Jackson](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6157.1.5922a11037e703b24aab826df932b46d) picks up more and more support. It's also very clear that [Jackson's](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6158.1.b8c4c3f783f9599b8e4ba68fb7bcae7d) strong position that all federal funding for any public school district that forces race or gender lies on our children, should be cut off, as well as his proposal to prohibit the red Chinese from buying up farm or ranch land in Oklahoma have both struck a chord with Oklahoma voters. Oklahomans are sick of putting America last and are ready to put America First. Candidly, however, [Jackson's](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6159.1.ac1231b84853adb6d41dd43f37bb1fd2) ability to close the gap and beat [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6160.1.e39beb33635f99e79f00ef56781f67ef) will depend on whether our campaign can afford expensive network and cable TV advertising in the closing weeks of the campaign. Thats why I have to ask you yet again if you can help in this vital effort to strike a blow against the Anti-Trump Republican establishment and help send a real America First Conservative to Washington to fight for Oklahoma. Won't you please make a generous donation to our campaign by going [HERE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6161.1.ca5539ab03a350b4e06a2f8a97718cb5). I couldn't be more proud of my husband who is literally working around the clock to meet as many Oklahoma voters as possible, virtually every night he is at a house party, held at someone's home or business by one our supporters so that he can meet new people, many of whom are unhappy with [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6162.1.d15d4895fc552b17f244bd8d6fef007f) but don't yet know that there is a viable conservative alternative. In fact, if you are interested in hosting [Jackson](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=9862607.6163.1.e37633e7113c1e9b9664eafbaf1b906c) at a house party for some of your friends at your home or business please contact caitlin@jacksonlahmeyer.com. We are very optimistic that with your continued help that Jackson is going to pull off one of the great political upsets in Oklahoma history. Please consider the challenges our country faces and the urgent need to send men and women to Washington who are not career politicians or Washington insiders but who will put America First again. Please let me hear back from you as soon as possible. God Bless you! Kendra Lahmeyer P.S. - If you are uncomfortable sending your financial information over the internet, you can make a check payable to "Lahmeyer for US Senate" and mail to 3939 S. Harvard Ave, Ste 140, Tulsa, Oklahoma 74135. P.P.S. - taking care of five kids and a husband who is running for the US Senate is a challenge but we are meeting so many great Oklahomans that I would not trade this experience for anything. subject: re: The Access to Baby Formula Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
These shortages cause needless stress. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45678986/347025596/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODc1NTM3Mi02OGRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ugFjJmNgtQh7eO6iL0dfeLp2UzbhOssOP_AIFljcqXI=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45678987/347025597/938001299?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220523_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODc1NTM3Mi02OGRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ugFjJmNgtQh7eO6iL0dfeLp2UzbhOssOP_AIFljcqXI=) Team, Baby formula shortages have caused needless stress for Colorado parents and guardians trying to keep their families healthy. The burden is even higher for families who rely on WIC (Special Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children) who face restrictions on the brands they can use their benefits on. **That’s why I introduced and passed _The Access to Baby Formula Act_ , so families who rely on WIC can have unrestricted access to purchase food for their babies**. This legislation not only supports Colorado families as we address the shortage we’re currently facing, but will put guardrails in place to help WIC babies in the future. As a father to three young women, the sleepless nights and anxious days of caring for an infant are not a forgotten memory. So when parents and guardians in Colorado made their struggles heard, I immediately got to work. Folks like you made this legislation possible and I’ll never stop fighting for families in Colorado and nationwide. Thank you, Michael P.S. Renewing the expanded Child Tax Credit and passing the _The Access to Baby Formula Act_ are just a few of the ways I’m fighting for families and our next generation in the Senate. But I’m still a top target for the National GOP and their $150 million warchest. **[Pitch in a $10 donation to my re-election campaign today so I can build on the progress I’ve achieved for Colorado.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45678988/347025598/938001299?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220523_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODc1NTM3Mi02OGRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ugFjJmNgtQh7eO6iL0dfeLp2UzbhOssOP_AIFljcqXI=)** |

clean_body: These shortages cause needless stress. | = = Team, Baby formula shortages have caused needless stress for Colorado parents and guardians trying to keep their families healthy. The burden is even higher for families who rely on WIC (Special Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children) who face restrictions on the brands they can use their benefits on. That’s why I introduced and passed The Access to Baby Formula Act , so families who rely on WIC can have unrestricted access to purchase food for their babies. This legislation not only supports Colorado families as we address the shortage we’re currently facing, but will put guardrails in place to help WIC babies in the future. As a father to three young women, the sleepless nights and anxious days of caring for an infant are not a forgotten memory. So when parents and guardians in Colorado made their struggles heard, I immediately got to work. Folks like you made this legislation possible and I’ll never stop fighting for families in Colorado and nationwide. Thank you, Michael P.S. Renewing the expanded Child Tax Credit and passing the The Access to Baby Formula Act are just a few of the ways I’m fighting for families and our next generation in the Senate. But I’m still a top target for the National GOP and their $150 million warchest. = | Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

NPR just ranked Georgia's Democratic Senate seat as the most likely to flip red this November. That's why national Republicans are spending millions to defeat me.

2\. Recent polls show me 1 point behind my Trump-endorsed potential opponent – and I can't fight back and pull ahead without you. Team – as the Jan. 6 committee continues its invaluable work, it’s making some alarming discoveries.
Multiple far-right Representatives and candidates for Congress were involved with or at the rally that led to the deadly Capitol attack. [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/barextremistsfromrunnningforoffice]
This list includes some of the election deniers running for Secretary of State like Mark Finchem and Jody Hice.
It’s CRUCIAL that we uphold the Constitution and STOP members complicit in the Jan. 6 riot from running our elections! We need 100 Democrats from Ohio to sign our petition calling for insurrections to be banned from running for office IMMEDIATELY! >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/barextremistsfromrunnningforoffice]
ADD MY NAME >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/barextremistsfromrunnningforoffice]
We all know the big names like Madison Cawthorn and Marjorie Taylor Greene. But just as, if not more dangerous, are the lesser-known extremists running for Secretary of State office nationwide who also attended the Jan 6. rally.
It’s pretty simple: The people trying to overturn elections cannot be allowed to oversee elections.
It's time to uphold the Constitution — Jan. 6 insurrectionists MUST be barred from running for office ASAP! [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/barextremistsfromrunnningforoffice]
There is no doubt: these individuals have NO right to run our elections — they are a danger to our democracy itself! Sign your name and DEMAND Jan. 6 insurrections be banned from running for office! >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/barextremistsfromrunnningforoffice]
ADD MY NAME >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/barextremistsfromrunnningforoffice]
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=footer-button&amount=25]

Early voting is open now through June 4th.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45679951/347030987/-1103407539?refcode=EM_C_220524EarlyVoting_N_TEAM_90DONM_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDFiZjlkMi02OWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kd92w5tosbxShLoPlLBNgmm92e0d2rIG9cAYjJxzgNg=&emci=b693217c-afda-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=2d1bf9d2-69db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=3583156)
Hey – our primary election is rapidly approaching!
Take the stress of Election Day out of voting – vote early! Cast your vote between now and Saturday, June 4th to decide who represents you.
**Don’t know where to vote? Just click the button below! ↓**
**[Early Voting Locations](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45679952/347030988/-1103407539?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDFiZjlkMi02OWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kd92w5tosbxShLoPlLBNgmm92e0d2rIG9cAYjJxzgNg=&emci=b693217c-afda-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=2d1bf9d2-69db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=3583156)**
**Do you want to vote absentee? Click the button below. ↓**
**[Absentee Voting Information](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45679953/347030990/47386725?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDFiZjlkMi02OWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kd92w5tosbxShLoPlLBNgmm92e0d2rIG9cAYjJxzgNg=&emci=b693217c-afda-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=2d1bf9d2-69db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=3583156)**
**You can vote in-person and early anytime before June 4th, and you can request an absentee ballot until June 2nd. If those don't work for you, make a plan to vote on Election Day, June 7th!**

The best way to make New Mexico work for working people is to elect politicians who will fight for you every step of the way. Your vote is your voice, now make yourself heard.
Let’s do this,

Team MTO
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Make a contribution today >>**_ _**______[DONATE $25 MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45679956/347030992/-532505380?refcode=EM_C_220524EarlyVoting_N_TEAM_90DONM_5_NG_N_BIO&amount=25&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDFiZjlkMi02OWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kd92w5tosbxShLoPlLBNgmm92e0d2rIG9cAYjJxzgNg=)**_

subject: It's Election Day!
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Team,

Election Day is here! Please make a plan to get out and vote for _**Trump-endorsed David Perdue.**_

Click [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=59cef69fdd&e=89fb4d5220) to find your polling location. The polls are open from 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM.

We need all supporters of the America First Agenda on our team.

---
| [FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=c470152b7d&e=89fb4d5220 "FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION")
---
| In case you missed it, President Donald J. Trump held a tele-rally in Georgia last night encouraging everyone to vote for David Perdue. You can listen to a recording [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=3bad1566e7&e=89fb4d5220).
**_"I'd like you to get out and vote Tuesday, May 24 for David Perdue in the Republican gubernatorial primary. It’s so important."_**
– President Trump
One more thing: Please take a few minutes to call and text your friends and family and make sure they also vote TODAY if they haven't already.

Thanks for all you do, Team Perdue
---

The polls are open from 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM. We need all supporters of the America First Agenda on our team. | "FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION" | In case you missed it, President Donald J. Trump held a tele-rally in Georgia last night encouraging everyone to vote for David Perdue. You can listen to a recording . subject: I REFUSE to sit back

body:
|
| | | Peter, it's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60450968:6vahdMoZN:m:1:3317145305:7F1B8C08299A37DE89A226930C541477:r)
---

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60450968:6vahdMoZN:m:1:3317145305:7F1B8C08299A37DE89A226930C541477:r "Generic
Button")
---

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

**[Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60450968:6vahdMoZN:m:1:3317145305:7F1B8C08299A37DE89A226930C541477:r "Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5,
$10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.")**

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60450968:6vahdMoZN:m:1:3317145305:7F1B8C08299A37DE89A226930C541477:r "BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and
leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>")**

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60450968:6vahdMoZN:m:1:3317145305:7F1B8C08299A37DE89A226930C541477:r "Generic Button")
---

We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking._

_She 's dialing up dark money donors.

She's depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

**Pelosi 's working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can't let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There's no way we make our mark without you, Peter.

**[I can't extend this deadline again - even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60450968:6vahdMoZN:m:1:3317145305:7F1B8C08299A37DE89A226930C541477:r "I can’t extend this deadline again – even for Top Patriots like you. So please,
rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.")**

Thank you,

Dan Crenshaw

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60450969:6vahdMoZN:m:1:3317145305:7F1B8C08299A37DE89A226930C541477:r "Can we count

name: NextGen America
subject: How to fight for abortion access, wherever you are
body:
| | Friend, On May 14, thousands of Americans across the country took to the streets to make one message very clear: **The fight for safe and accessible abortion is stronger than ever.** Let’s be frank: Our fight for abortion is a fight for people to have safe access to basic health care rights. It’s a fight for racial and economic justice, freedom, and bodily autonomy. If _Roe v. Wade_ is overturned, all communities we deeply care about will feel the impact. No matter where we are, we can help protect the communities that will be most hurt by the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade._ [Donate now: Split your donation to support these 84 abortion providers to help them continue their work providing safe and accessible abortions across the country.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45680920/347033906/-918487316?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjFiZjlkMi02OWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aERejRIj8hsw5fJjHIm7G9Emou11dhEzdtJ_G6ie6A8=&emci=2bd1170b-d7da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=2f1bf9d2-69db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=6787172) **And if you’re unable to donate, we’ve got you covered.** **[Take action with us and pressure your senators to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act — legislation that would codify the right to abortion into federal law.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45680924/347033908/-1321771843?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjFiZjlkMi02OWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aERejRIj8hsw5fJjHIm7G9Emou11dhEzdtJ_G6ie6A8=&emci=2bd1170b-d7da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=2f1bf9d2-69db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=6787172)** Living a safe and healthy life with access to essential health care should be a basic right. But we know that when _Roe_ is overturned by the Supreme Court, communities that already face restrictions on health care will be hit the hardest. The burden of abortion bans falls hardest on Black and Indigenous people, other people of color, LGBTQ+ people, young people, and more. Working to ensure that all communities have access to safe abortion is an essential part of our core goal to build a stronger and more equitable future for all. **Remember: The fight for abortion is not over. It’s crucial that we turn our outrage into action for the communities that need it most.** Donate to abortion funds across the country or take action with us on the WHPA so your impact can be felt everywhere, no matter where you live. | [Donate to abortion funds](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45680927/347033913/244312098?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjFiZjlkMi02OWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aERejRIj8hsw5fJjHIm7G9Emou11dhEzdtJ_G6ie6A8=&emci=2bd1170b-d7da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=2f1bf9d2-69db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")

[Write your senators](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45680929/347033916/-515202789?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjFiZjlkMi02OWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aERejRIj8hsw5fJjHIm7G9Emou11dhEzdtJ_G6ie6A8=&emci=2bd1170b-d7da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=2f1bf9d2-69db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")

name: Breaking News Alert (via Team Hassan)
subject: BREAKING: Mike Pence is headed to NH to fundraise for Maggie's opponents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
We can't stop thinking about what he said last year:
| | |
---
**This is urgent: Mike Pence is coming to New Hampshire _this week_ for a GOP fundraiser, and we can't stop thinking about what he said last year:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45682023/347037588/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk986-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDA1MTA4YS02YWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Xw0V0qoNp4PnxQ_MJT9w8fNf0uYP1jgqV5COzTls4o=)

Team – Mike Pence is coming to New Hampshire this week to raise money for anti-choice Republicans.

body:
Pennsylvania Republicans have chosen an anti-abortion extremist to be their nominee in one of the most competitive gubernatorial races in the country. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45682710/347040567/2058529741?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTQ3ZjdlZS02YmRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5SO3IT3CAVo0dx2VdTMWUMVWHC66d9NNThsSdgw4zgk=&emci=26976eb8-b7da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=9147f7ee-6bdb-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=5086640)

Peter, Our abortion rights are on the line across this country and in Pennsylvania. We need to take action immediately to defend reproductive rights.

Anti-abortion politicians have repeatedly tried to pass extreme bans and limits on abortion at the state level, but we've had dedicated public officials, physicians, advocates, and Democratic governors, like Governor Wolf, standing in their way.

But now, just as the Supreme Court appears to have voted to overturn Roe, Pennsylvania Republicans have chosen an anti-abortion extremist to be their nominee in one of the most competitive gubernatorial races in the country. It's absolutely critical that we elect a governor who will stand alongside you and me on the front lines of the fight for reproductive rights. That leader is Josh Shapiro. **[Will you join me in helping Josh Shapiro defend abortion access as Pennsylvania's next governor? Chip in now and help me raise $25,000 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45682714/347040571/1543075400?refcode=em22_220523_JSFR_fndt_gq_act___va_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220523_JSFR_fndt_gq_act___va_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTQ3ZjdlZS02YmRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5SO3IT3CAVo0dx2VdTMWUMVWHC66d9NNThsSdgw4zgk=)** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $3 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45682718/347040575/1543075400?refcode=em22_220523_JSFR_fndt_gq_act___va_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220523_JSFR_fndt_gq_act___va_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTQ3ZjdlZS02YmRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5SO3IT3CAVo0dx2VdTMWUMVWHC66d9NNThsSdgw4zgk=)

I have known Josh Shapiro for years. I had the privilege of serving alongside him on the Montgomery County Board of Commissioners, and I've seen what a steadfast defender of abortion rights he's been as Pennsylvania's attorney general.

Josh Shapiro is the governor we need right now. He pledged that, "I'll veto any bill that reaches my desk that restricts the right to choose -- and any bill that undermines reproductive rights."

But first, Josh has to win a tough election. His opponent, an extremist who organized bus rides to the January 6 insurrection and tried to undermine the election, called for an abortion ban as soon as three weeks after conception. As a physician, I can tell you that's not enough time for the average person to suspect they're pregnant.

We can't sit on the sidelines with so much on the line for the people of Pennsylvania. That's why I'm reaching out to you today to ask you to help support my friend, Josh Shapiro. I know he'll be a leader in the governor's office to defend abortion access.
**[Please chip in to help Josh Shapiro get out the vote and defend reproductive rights ahead of this critical election. Make your contribution now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45682736/347040593/1543075400?refcode=em22_220523_JSFR_fndt_gq_act___va_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220523_JSFR_fndt_gq_act___va_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTQ3ZjdlZS02YmRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5SO3IT3CAVo0dx2VdTMWUMVWHC66d9NNThsSdgw4zgk=)**
Let Josh’s opponent know we will never go back.

Thank you,
Val

clean_body: Pennsylvania Republicans have chosen an anti-abortion extremist to be their nominee in one of the most competitive gubernatorial races in the country. | Peter, Our abortion rights are on the line across this country and in Pennsylvania. We need to take action immediately to defend reproductive rights. Anti-abortion politicians have repeatedly tried to pass extreme bans and limits on abortion at the state level, but we've had dedicated public officials, physicians, advocates, and Democratic governors, like Governor Wolf, standing in their way. But now, just as the Supreme Court appears to have voted to overturn Roe, Pennsylvania Republicans have chosen an anti-abortion extremist to be their nominee in one of the most competitive gubernatorial races in the country. It's absolutely critical that we elect a governor who will stand alongside you and me on the front lines of the fight for reproductive rights. That leader is Josh Shapiro. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = I have known Josh Shapiro for years. I had the privilege of serving alongside him on the Montgomery County Board of Commissioners, and I've seen what a steadfast defender of abortion rights he's been as Pennsylvania's attorney general. Josh Shapiro is the governor we need right now. He pledged that, "I'll veto any bill that reaches my desk that restricts the right to choose -- and any bill that undermines reproductive rights." But first, Josh has to win a tough election. His opponent, an extremist who organized bus rides to the January 6 insurrection and tried to undermine the election, called for an abortion ban as soon as three weeks after conception. As a physician, I can tell you that's not enough time for the average person to suspect they're pregnant. We can't sit on the sidelines with so much on the line for the people of Pennsylvania. That's why I'm reaching out to you today to ask you to help support my friend, Josh Shapiro. I know he'll be a leader in the governor's office to defend abortion access. = Let Josh’s opponent know we will never go back. Thank you, Val Val Arkoosh for U.S. Senate P.O. body:
Do you know where to vote? Click or tap to find out where to go. >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/cabbe17e901eb901/d42873138179b41cc3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
Peter, It’s Primary Day in Alabama, and we want to make sure you have a plan to get out and vote for Casey Wardynski if you haven’t already. Not only do we need to keep this seat RED in 2022, we need to send a pro-America, commonsense conservative to Washington. Casey is going to finish the job President Trump started, and make sure that every citizen has the opportunity to work hard and live their American Dream.
**So please, if you haven’t cast your ballot yet GO VOTE ASAP, and don’t go alone.******
Bring family members, friends, neighbors, and anyone you know who hasn’t voted yet. We need to score a decisive victory!
---
[**FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/cabbe17e901eb901/ac0fc3745f099aacc3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
Thank you, again, for all of your support throughout this race. We’ve fought relentlessly to let voters know exactly what’s at stake, and to win their support.

Now, it all comes down to getting our supporters who have not yet voted to the polls.

Let’s finish this race firing on all cylinders and celebrate a big win tonight!

To Victory,
Team Wardynski

We’re officially TWO WEEKS OUT from the June 7th primary.
In two weeks, New Jersey voters have the chance to elect a proud progressive voice to fight for us in Congress.
But, before they do, we need to do three things:
Spread the word about Imani’s plan for real progressive change
Get out the vote in communities that have been left behind by NJ’s corrupt political machine
Give voters the information they need to BEAT THE BALLOT LINE

Will you rush a $2 donation to help us spread the word, get out the vote, and beat the ballot line? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. Express Donate $2 [] Thank you for being a part of our movement. — Team Oakley Donate [] Volunteer [] Paid for by Oakley for Congress Oakley for Congress PO Box 1181 Montclair, NJ 07042 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . subject: I need YOUR vote at the ballot box.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f7235d6dbaec/i-need-your-vote-at-the-ballot-box?e=061a1ea0d5)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

**Today is Election Day,** and we MUST elect conservatives who will stand up to the Democrats' radical agenda. We're living with the results of the Biden administration's failed policies, and we can't let this continue. I'll fight to expand freedom and limit the size of government in Washington.

I'm honored to receive the endorsements of Congressman Jody Hice and Congressman Andrew Clyde, but I need YOUR vote at the ballot box. Polls are open 7 a.m. \- 7 p.m. today, and I'm asking for your support in the fight for our future.

For Liberty,

---
| | | | | | | [](https://VoteBarr.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0aae7015df298a880b9f30703&id=70374a5bbe&e=061a1ea0d5)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kelvin=20King?=
subject: Election Day is finally here.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/527c447c6828/election-day-is-finally-here?e=7bbb93570f)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

**Election Day is finally here**. Janelle and I are grateful for all the support we've received over the last year as we've worked to spread our message to voters. We've seen how our message of preserving the American Dream resonates with Georgians all across the state.

This election is too critical to sit on the sidelines. We must elect a candidate who is prepared to go head-to-head with Raphael Warnock in November. I'm ready to put in the work, but I need your support.

Please make sure to get out and vote today, and encourage your friends and family to do the same.**Polls are open 7 a.m. \- 7 p.m.**

Together we will win for Georgia and #WinforAmerica!

Respectfully,

---
| | | | | | | [](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=2bbbc73b60&e=7bbb93570f)

name: Peter Franchot
subject: New Endorsement From Glenarden!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
I’m excited to have received the endorsement of former Glenarden Mayor Donjuan Williams! As a lifelong resident of Glenarden, Donjuan has proudly served our state and country as a member of the US Army Reserve, a City Councilmember, Mayor, and President of Maryland Black Mayors, Inc. We need more leaders like Donjuan at the local level, and I am honored that he has joined our inclusive, statewide coalition of support.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/donjuanwilliamsendorsement?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/donjuanwilliamsendorsement?amount=20.22]
Donjuan, I can’t thank you enough for your support. As Governor, I can’t wait to partner with you, and the many other local community leaders among our ranks, to deliver the concrete results and bold solutions that our communities need now more than ever. We have an exciting opportunity to secure a stronger future for Glenarden, for Prince George’s County, and for all of Maryland in the years to come. Together, we’ll get it done.
With the July 19 primary right around the corner, our people-powered movement continues to grow stronger by the day. I’ve already received the endorsements of well over 120 current and former elected officials – the most of any candidate for Governor in either category – and we continue to lead in the polls by a strong margin. Will you help us sustain our momentum in these final weeks by chipping in to power our campaign to victory? We’re looking to gain 45 new small-dollar grassroots donors off the heels of this latest endorsement alert so that we can keep up our momentum in these final weeks.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/donjuanwilliamsendorsement?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/donjuanwilliamsendorsement?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/donjuanwilliamsendorsement?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/donjuanwilliamsendorsement?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/donjuanwilliamsendorsement]
Any amount you can give, whether large or small, will make a critical difference in our efforts to get our message out to as many voters as possible. Your contribution will help pay for the critical tools we need to secure our victory, including:
*
Printing
more
yard
signs,
field
literature,
and
mail
pieces
*
Running
more
ads
online
and
on
television
*
Creating
more
T-shirts,
stickers
and
bumper
magnets
*
Opening
future
field
offices
*
Hiring
more
field
organizers
*
Recruiting
more
volunteers
*
And
so
much
more!
From making Maryland the first carbon neutral state in the nation, to investing in the next generation of internet connectivity, to lowering the costs of healthcare and housing, and so much more, we have a truly exciting opportunity to redefine the promise and possibility of state government in the years to come.
I can’t thank you enough for continued support of this movement. We’re leading out in front of the rest of the field – help us keep our foot on the gas, so that we can pull ahead even further. Enough talk – let’s get it done! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/donjuanwilliamsendorsement?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/donjuanwilliamsendorsement?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

name: Tim Scott
subject: Re: Herschel Walker’s Senate campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60450989:Jj04DMoRN:m:1:3317145305:9DBEEF6A5877940724D876C5D28D6C71:r)

---
Peter,

For me, the Senate race in Georgia is personal. _**Herschel and I have a lot in common.**_

We were both born and raised in the South in lower income families that worked hard to make ends meet. We both were taught faith in God and a strong work ethic. And we both did ok in sports. (Well, I did ok in sports. Herschel was a little better than ok.)

Along the way, we both embraced conservative values - personal responsibility, smaller government, the sanctity of life, a free-market economy, and a strong military. And we dared to run for public office as a Republican.

The Radical Left is _really_ concerned about losing the Senate race in Georgia, so they're _really_ coming after Herschel. They are calling him all the nasty names they've called me - just because we don't fit the Left's definition of what a Black candidate should be. I know what it's like because I've been in his shoes.

_**But Herschel won't let the Left push him around.**_

I appreciate how Heschel inspires young people, brings people together from all walks of life, and fights to ensure the American Dream is available for future generations. I hope you'll agree he deserves our support.

**Herschel's race could be the _most expensive Senate race in the country_ this year. He needs our immediate help to ensure he has adequate financial resources to win this race! **

**[I've set a personal goal of raising $34,000 for #34 (Herschel's old jersey number) in the next 48 hours, and I'm asking for you to chip in $5, $10, $34, or even $100 right now to help us surpass our goal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60450989:Jj04DMoRN:m:1:3317145305:9DBEEF6A5877940724D876C5D28D6C71:r)**

[** Chip in $5 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60450990:Jj04DMoRN:m:1:3317145305:9DBEEF6A5877940724D876C5D28D6C71:r)
[** Chip in $10 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60450991:Jj04DMoRN:m:1:3317145305:9DBEEF6A5877940724D876C5D28D6C71:r)
[** Chip in $34 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60450992:Jj04DMoRN:m:1:3317145305:9DBEEF6A5877940724D876C5D28D6C71:r)
Polls in Georgia show the race is a dead heat. In fact, Herschel has a slight edge in most of them! But we all know that a lot can change when tens of millions of dollars of attack ads are flying.

Herschel may have the current polling advantage, but he's facing a significant fundraising gap against a Democrat incumbent who had a two-year head start. **[Will you join with me in making a gift to Herschel's campaign today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60450989:Jj04DMoRN:m:1:3317145305:9DBEEF6A5877940724D876C5D28D6C71:r)**

With your help, Herschel will win in Georgia and help us flip the Senate Majority back to Republican control.

Thank you,

Tim Scott
United States Senator

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60450989:Jj04DMoRN:m:1:3317145305:9DBEEF6A5877940724D876C5D28D6C71:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60450993:Jj04DMoRN:m:1:3317145305:9DBEEF6A5877940724D876C5D28D6C71:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60450994:Jj04DMoRN:m:1:3317145305:9DBEEF6A5877940724D876C5D28D6C71:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60450995:Jj04DMoRN:m:1:3317145305:9DBEEF6A5877940724D876C5D28D6C71:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60450996:Jj04DMoRN:m:1:3317145305:9DBEEF6A5877940724D876C5D28D6C71:r)

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Let’s prove these foolish predictions wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
news to us ...
| | |
---
_We’re crushed, Peter?_
That’s what the press is saying now that millionaire right-wing extremist JD Vance is officially my GOP opponent for Ohio’s open Senate seat...
**Newsweek: "JD Vance Expected to Crush Tim Ryan and Win Ohio Senate Race"**
**_We currently hold a one-point lead over JD Vance in the polls_**. Senator Sherrod Brown has already proven a Democrat can win in Ohio, and soon I’ll join him to give Ohio the most pro-worker delegation in the Senate.
But now that Vance has the full support of Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell and the entire GOP money machine, pundits and media outlets everywhere think it’s just a matter of time before our campaign gets “crushed.”
Well, that’d be news to us—because this grassroots team has always had our back. And with you on our side, we’re anything but crushed.

**Let’s prove these foolish predictions wrong, Peter. Together, we can show JD Vance and all of his uber-wealthy GOP mega-donors that you should NEVER bet against Ohio.**

**[Will you split a donation of $5 between my campaign and Abby Finkenauer's to take down JD Vance and expand our Democratic Senate majority? We can’t afford to lose THE race that will decide Senate control.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45687284/347054385/-640001169?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1122-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDY3ZWVlOS03MmRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gyjIFjiL3BnoebndK5sv_9EnimVwrjIc_FeNlOiuCxw=)**

Friend: Marco Rubio has launched desperate attacks on my law enforcement career. Why? Because he knows I can _d_ _efeat_ him and prevent Mitch McConnell from taking back Senate control.

My career in law enforcement – those 27 years I spent protecting and serving my community – is unbelievably special to me. It's personal. I'd like to take a minute to explain to you why that is – **[but if you already share my belief that Floridians deserve so much better than Marco Rubio's failed leadership, will you chip in $5 now to help me defeat him?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45690507/347059753/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3274-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTBmOGUwNC03NWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YGfNe3hs1Fw_MNINOKl2qPaY5Zw2y956ZJjxVMf4CTM=)**
I entered the police academy back in 1983. It was tough work, but I loved it. I had the honor of being elected class president at the academy – and after graduation and years of hard work, I rose to the top of the department and became the first woman to serve as Orlando's chief of police.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45690508/347059754/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3274-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTBmOGUwNC03NWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YGfNe3hs1Fw_MNINOKl2qPaY5Zw2y956ZJjxVMf4CTM=)
When I started my time as chief, Orlando was in a crisis: The murder rate was at an all-time high. But I brought the department together and built relationships within the community. Working together with the brave men and women of the Orlando Police Department and the community, we reduced violent crime by 40%.

It doesn't surprise me that Marco Rubio is trying to make a mockery of a career I take deep pride in. **But while I was working the midnight shift and keeping my community safe, Marco Rubio was plotting his trajectory as a career politician**.** I'd put my record up against his any day.**
**_I_ know the true meaning of service. _I_ know what it's like to put my life on the line for my community. _I_ know what it means to _lead._[If you're with me, then please donate $5 or whatever you can spare, right here and now, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45690509/347059755/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3274-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTBmOGUwNC03NWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YGfNe3hs1Fw_MNINOKl2qPaY5Zw2y956ZJjxVMf4CTM=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45690510/347059756/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3274-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTBmOGUwNC03NWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YGfNe3hs1Fw_MNINOKl2qPaY5Zw2y956ZJjxVMf4CTM=)

It took many long, sleepless nights to protect the city of Orlando. And if I'm elected to the Senate, I'm ready to spend more long, sleepless nights protecting our right to vote, reproductive rights, access to health care and so much more.

From the bottom of my heart, thank you for your support.

Some other key takeaways from this poll:
* It’s clear that our biggest hurdle is name recognition – which is why fundraising is so crucial to ensure we stay on TV.
* Education is one of the top issues for Maryland voters. As President Obama’s former Secretary of Education, a lifelong teacher and former principal, a public school dad, and the leader of an education civil rights organization, if anyone has the experience to lead on this issue...it’s John King.
* John is surging with young voters and progressives – two voting blocks that make up a considerable portion of the electorate. The next generation of Maryland Democrats are FIRED UP and ready for real change in our state, and John King is the candidate to make it happen.

This polling couldn’t be clearer. John has the winning personal story, the right message for this moment, and the leadership experience to win this race – and he’s counting on supporters like you to be right there with him fueling our campaign across the finish line.
We need all Marylanders to know that John’s vision for Maryland is one of equity — where every child has access to a world-class public education and where we tackle systemic racism head-on.

clean_body: Exciting news: a brand new poll just came out that shows John polling just 1-POINT behind our status quo frontrunner Peter Franchot. = = | Exciting news: a brand new poll just came out that shows John polling just 1-POINT behind our status quo frontrunner Peter Franchot. What does that mean? To put it simply: this is a HUGE momentum gain for John and our campaign. Despite starting this race polling in the single digits and despite our insider establishment opponents spending over a million in paid media, not a single other candidate has the message or the character that resonates so strongly with Maryland voters the same way John does. Honestly, as long as John keeps having the resources to communicate, he will win. We went up on TV in mid-April, and this HUGE momentum gain shows those ads are paying off in a big way. Now, our biggest hurdle is closing that 1-point gap and increasing our name recognition to take the lead. Peter, with the right resources to keep us up on TV, on the radio, and online, John can win this thing. To reach voters across the state through television, digital advertising, mail pieces, and more, we need to ensure this campaign has the resources to get John King in front of every registered Democrat in Maryland. = | | = Some other key takeaways from this poll: It’s clear that our biggest hurdle is name recognition – which is why fundraising is so crucial to ensure we stay on TV. Education is one of the top issues for Maryland voters. As President Obama’s former Secretary of Education, a lifelong teacher and former principal, a public school dad, and the leader of an education civil rights organization, if anyone has the experience to lead on this issue...it’s John King. John is surging with young voters and progressives – two voting blocks that make up a considerable portion of the electorate. The next generation of Maryland Democrats are FIRED UP and ready for real change in our state, and John King is the candidate to make it happen. This polling couldn’t be clearer. John has the winning personal story, the right message for this moment, and the leadership experience to win this race – and he’s counting on supporters like you to be right there with him fueling our campaign across the finish line. We need all Marylanders to know that John’s vision for Maryland is one of equity — where every child has access to a world-class public education and where we tackle systemic racism head-on. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Let’s do this! — Team King | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . I was raised in a single parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13.

I understand the value of a dollar.

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

Friend, I know we have been asking a lot lately, but _**[it would mean so much if you could give $5 to make sure we beat our goal.](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNUblOxDAQ_Zqkc-Qz2RQpkNBSLQVC2tJyHGdjsJ3InrDw9zh7IOiQpnqad8yboRv0oIgubUcxpVhQTgjfUVYRXhshWjFq3gjejgXHypkIVTTL2jurVQCV3sc5alPp2ZdTV_eaC8awbjMHt6qhRFPB-10_sh63uDwe5EFZZ8PpWXnTRRhlTBI-ZNIzAJpW37sv8wlSIMoRpZKUrpsAllSwh4Lu8ySj12iqsw3RDJtvxsB6dFXIaVAyQYHJ8NtsA4LJIIGG2TkVERi17RdsHzeZmIMU7BHimtfrFbzUyi_KnkJGb3UweXxCL6_7imDc1Fz-eEkgZCcYbxGhNb7xvRns6jPb-HznckPTvOaSMvpH6m45BzABfjtee0C53RzwcpOoclfo_qEydsNyts7ZVDf5L6fN7PID-E-n39oNoSw "it would mean so much if you could give $5 to make sure we beat our goal.")**_

Friend, the difference between flipping just ONE more seat in the Senate means more than you might think.

Without taking the Senate back from the hands of the dangerous Democrat agenda, I'm worried that the American Dream is going to become nothing but a distant memory. The direction this country is going under the Democrats is _**frightening**_.

If Republicans have enough support to take back the Senate, we can secure hope, prosperity, and American values for generations to come.

**But we can only do that with YOUR support**. There is **no one else** we can rely on at this point. You've been such a valued member of our team since Day 1 - can you take this one crucial step with us?

"If every person reading this email chips in just $5, we will blow past our goal." | | | - "CHIP IN $5" I was raised in a single parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. I understand the value of a dollar. I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice and I am forever grateful for each and every gift. Friend, I know we have been asking a lot lately, but "it would mean so much if you could give $5 to make sure we beat our goal." | | | - "CHIP IN $5" -Tim | | | Friend, the difference between flipping just ONE more seat in the Senate means more than you might think. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wdfcemail?refcode=5/24fr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wdfcemail?refcode=5/24fr]

Peter,
Today’s the day! If you haven’t already, go vote – polls are open until 7pm tonight!
If you experience any issues or problems when trying to vote, you can call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816.
The momentum of this campaign is truly magnificent, and we have no intention of slowing down. Last night marked our TENTH Telephone Town Hall event, bringing our participant tally to 46,337. I’m connecting with actual Georgians and learning about the needs and wants of our community. I’ve said it since day one - I’m in this because of northwest Georgians.
Tell everyone you can think of to vote today. No matter the momentum, votes are how we win. Together is how we win!

Thank you,

body:
I'm Mo, Seth's new field director!
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45693212/347067244/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTc1NDI5Yi03YWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qX4Zi6SmR3iwjY_wCi5enpnjSdADzYWo485O1sNz_o8=&emci=fbd46eef-d9da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=ea75429b-7adb-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=15384964)
Hey Peter – I'm Mo, Seth's new field director!

I'm so excited to be a part of Team Seth. I joined this campaign because Seth is a leader who fights for working people, the environment, women’s rights and other issues about which I care deeply. I also joined because I am committed to maintaining a Democratic majority in Congress and, to do so, we have to win this seat.

I'm ready to get to work making sure voters know about Seth’s plans to lower the cost of prescription drugs, make pre-K universal, create clean energy jobs, and protect a woman’s right to make her own decisions about reproductive healthcare.

Our campaign needs to take on the national Republicans and spread Seth's message and to do that, we need to hire organizers, print yard signs, travel the state, and more. But it won't be cheap and we're counting on this team's help to ensure we have the resources we need.

**[Will you chip in before our end-of-month fundraising deadline to help us stand up to national Republicans and send Seth to Congress to fight for all Rhode Islanders?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45693213/347067245/-1204412561?ms=em22_220523_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___MK_ettx&refcode=em22_220523_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___MK_ettx&source=em22_220523_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220523_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=FIqLSIRHx0SqADdmLMfVF6AVbVI0sOfWIfhNeNoYdCzSO736UNzBwUw%2BNhGqhY%2BnN8vfXoLynUW%2Bo5tHLBRCge3dXMJrIdMsIvPtFrXPC49w%2BDPvVB46PgtVeCnFKCNhPlPDFZrZraaQ%2FIcqFxEB03ybuySrcOAKY7xYVRlFd44%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTc1NDI5Yi03YWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qX4Zi6SmR3iwjY_wCi5enpnjSdADzYWo485O1sNz_o8=)**

National Republicans only need to flip five seats to take back the House majority, and they're consolidating around Allan Fung because they think he can flip this seat red.

That's why we're counting on your help to reach our end-of-month fundraising goal before our deadline. Every dollar this email raises goes directly towards our field program so we can talk to voters in every corner of Rhode Island's 2nd District.

**[Chip in $5 or more right away to help us elect Seth, keep RI-02 blue, and protect our Democratic House majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45693214/347067246/-1204412561?ms=em22_220523_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___MK_ettx&refcode=em22_220523_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___MK_ettx&source=em22_220523_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220523_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=FIqLSIRHx0SqADdmLMfVF6AVbVI0sOfWIfhNeNoYdCzSO736UNzBwUw%2BNhGqhY%2BnN8vfXoLynUW%2Bo5tHLBRCge3dXMJrIdMsIvPtFrXPC49w%2BDPvVB46PgtVeCnFKCNhPlPDFZrZraaQ%2FIcqFxEB03ybuySrcOAKY7xYVRlFd44%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTc1NDI5Yi03YWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qX4Zi6SmR3iwjY_wCi5enpnjSdADzYWo485O1sNz_o8=)**

Thanks,

Mo
Field Director

Seth Magaziner has a proven record of fighting for working people in Rhode Island. As General Treasurer, he’s created thousands of good paying jobs through his programs to revitalize public school buildings and build clean energy infrastructure across our state. Now, he's running for Congress in the competitive open Second District to keep fighting for all Rhode Islanders. Will you chip in to elect Seth in November and keep RI-02 blue?
[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45693215/347067247/-1204412561?ms=em22_220523_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___MK_ettx&refcode=em22_220523_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___MK_ettx&source=em22_220523_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220523_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=FIqLSIRHx0SqADdmLMfVF6AVbVI0sOfWIfhNeNoYdCzSO736UNzBwUw%2BNhGqhY%2BnN8vfXoLynUW%2Bo5tHLBRCge3dXMJrIdMsIvPtFrXPC49w%2BDPvVB46PgtVeCnFKCNhPlPDFZrZraaQ%2FIcqFxEB03ybuySrcOAKY7xYVRlFd44%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTc1NDI5Yi03YWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qX4Zi6SmR3iwjY_wCi5enpnjSdADzYWo485O1sNz_o8=)

#### Today is primary election day in Alabama! Don't forget to get out and vote for Yolanda Flowers for Governor.
Make sure you know your polling place. Not sure where to vote? body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45693458/347067715/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTE4N2JhMS03YWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TzmQRsGSNRVD83keyjYOVa8nR5r3pLmynR_p0e2dpSA=&emci=a2f50aca-78db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=ca187ba1-7adb-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Everyone’s texting me all at once. **Chuck Grassley just launched his first major TV ad campaign against us!**
My team is still finding out how big of an ad buy it is, but this much is clear: Chuck Grassley is afraid; he is ‘hunkering down,’ as we say in military lingo.
He’s seen the polling showing he’s in trouble. He’s seen our ads and yard signs all over the state. And he’s seen the power of our grassroots campaign thanks to donors like you.
But here’s the thing: Chuck Grassley has nearly $4 million in the bank. Corporate PACs and special interests have been his lifeblood – _he’s a bought and paid for senator._ And his massive campaign war chest means he can go up on TV now and never come down.
Senate control is going to be decided here in Iowa, and there’s only one way we can fight back and win. **I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to chip in right now to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**
This is the most important moment of the entire campaign so far. We’ve set a $50,000 emergency rapid response fundraising goal, and we cannot fall short. Not if we’re going to defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue.
**Please, will you use this link to give now and help me fight back?**
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mikefranken_email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45693460/347067720/-42398318?refcode=em20220524mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTE4N2JhMS03YWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TzmQRsGSNRVD83keyjYOVa8nR5r3pLmynR_p0e2dpSA=)
The campaign is about to kick into high gear, and we cannot let up – not even for one second – if we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley this November.
I’m so grateful for everything you do,
Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.)

_**[I sued Biden over his brazen disregard for our immigration laws.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60454626:JByWWMoaN:m:1:3317145305:1591BC664BBCCA8D7A3C29D284D13EBB:r "I just sued Biden over his brazen disregard for our immigration laws.")**_

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

name: Danielle Allen
subject: I’m proud to endorse Andrea Campbell for AG!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT DANIELLE ALLEN
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ajcendorser?refcode=DAemail1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ajcendorser?refcode=DAemail1]
Hi Peter Willis,
I have some BIG news. Today, I’m excited to announce that I’m endorsing Andrea Campbell for Massachusetts Attorney General!
With the many overlapping challenges our Commonwealth is facing right now, Massachusetts needs leaders who will be true partners in creating change from the ground up — and never compromise on putting the needs of our communities first.
Peter Willis, that principled, people-first leadership is what Andrea Campbell embodies. As Attorney General, Andrea will focus on building justice and opportunity for all — and make sure that communities that have been left out or left behind get the support, attention, and partnership they need to build a better future.
Andrea has dedicated her career to fighting for greater equity and opportunity for all — from her time as Boston City Councilor, to her consistent advocacy as an education lawyer and attorney for Governor Deval Patrick. She’s driven by empathy, thoughtful problem-solving, and a profound belief that with hard work and intention, we can transform our justice system to lift up all our communities.
That’s the commitment we need from our next Attorney General — because this office has the power to drive real change on critical issues, from partnering for policing reform, to tackling environmental justice issues across our state. That’s why I’m so excited to see the momentum Andrea’s campaign is gaining — and I hope you’ll join me in being part of it. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ajcendorser?refcode=DAemail1]
Peter Willis, this is a critical time in campaigns like Andrea’s. With our Massachusetts Democratic Convention coming up in less than two weeks, and the primary just a few months away, this is a key moment to show the strength of our support for Andrea and her vision for justice and equity. If these issues are important to you, now is a great time to step up and help Andrea build more momentum. -Danielle

Prof Danielle is a seasoned nonprofit leader, a democracy advocate, a national voice on pandemic response, and a mom. Danielle’s work to make the world better for young people has taken her from teaching college and leading a $60 million university division to driving change at the helm of a $6 billion foundation, advocating for cannabis legalization, democracy reform, and civic education and most recently, to running for governor. Danielle’s leadership in rallying coalitions and building solutions resulted in the country’s first-ever Roadmap to Pandemic Resilience; her policies were adopted in federal legislation and a Biden executive order.

name: Roger R. Ream
subject: What do you think should be the role of government?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs_-fmshNH

I was wondering if you had a couple minutes to help me with
something today. After the most recent election, the Left not
only has majority control
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os_-fmshNH

Dear
Fellow American,

I was
wondering if you had a couple minutes to help me with something
today.

After the
most recent election, the Left not only has majority control over
the House, but also has an evenly split Senate-with the Vice
President as the tie-breaking vote. Now, the Left's desire for
increased government can be won through a simple majority vote.

It feels
like with this new administration in power, anything is possible.
And
that's why I want to get your opinion today.

Will you
take this short survey to share your thoughts about the role you
think government should play in a free society?

I value
what you have to say, and it will help us understand where
Americans like you think our country is headed.

You can
begin your survey below. Thank you!
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60208836:s_-fmshNH:m:3:2532013465:BA9D652B82E58A8AE4A99C830D941B57:r

Sincerely,

Roger R.
Ream
President
The Fund
for American Studies

clean_body: I was wondering if you had a couple minutes to help me with something today. After the most recent election, the Left not only has majority control Dear Fellow American, I was wondering if you had a couple minutes to help me with something today. After the most recent election, the Left not only has majority control over the House, but also has an evenly split Senate-with the Vice President as the tie-breaking vote. Now, the Left's desire for increased government can be won through a simple majority vote. It feels like with this new administration in power, anything is possible. And that's why I want to get your opinion today. Will you take this short survey to share your thoughts about the role you think government should play in a free society? I value what you have to say, and it will help us understand where Americans like you think our country is headed. You can begin your survey below. Thank you! Sincerely, Roger R. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeremy=20Munson?=
subject: Today is Election Day. Can I count on your vote, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Munson for Congress]()
body:
Today, the people of Minnesota’s 1st Congressional District will choose which Republican candidate has both the experience and courage necessary to... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremymunson/breaking-i-am-running-for-congress-in-minnesotas-1st-district-9019409?e=f4c2e54596)
---
[](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=d681dcb755&e=f4c2e54596)
Dear Peter,Today, the people of Minnesota’s 1st Congressional District will choose which Republican candidate has both the experience and courage necessary to take our fight for freedom to Washington and defend our Minnesota values in Congress. [**You can find your polling location on the Secretary of State's site**](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=844062fc70&e=f4c2e54596)**.** Over the past few weeks, I have reached out to you to make my case for why I am the Proven Conservative Fighter in this race who deserves your vote. I stood against COVID tyranny since day one and called out Gov. Walz’s unconstitutional executive orders. I demanded action when the integrity of the 2020 election was first threatened and our conservative voices were being ignored. I have always fought to protect our Constitutionally protected God-given rights. I am running for Congress because our Republic is being threatened by failed leadership in Washington. Spending is out of control and needs to be reeled back before it is too late. **You and I know that $30 Trillion in debt is beyond enough!** As a father, I am concerned for the future of my daughters. If we do not put an end to Washington’s reckless spending spree, our children will face a far worse crippling debt. Instead of pursuing the American dream, our children will be forced to work to pay off the failed leadership decisions being made in Washington today.We have a real opportunity to take back the House and restore fiscal responsibility in Washington, and I am counting on your vote, Peter. As a state representative, I always voted against multi-subject omnibus bills packed with wasteful spending, never voted to increase the state budget, increased transparency in government, and made myself available to all my constituents every day.Minnesota’s 1st Congressional district deserves representation we can trust. I would not be running for Congress if I did not believe I am the most qualified candidate in this race. Now, is the time to elect a true conservative to stand with Rand Paul, Ted, Cruz, and Jim Jordan. You know who I am, you know how I vote, and you know I have the spine to not back down.Polls open at 7 am in most locations and will remain open until 8 pm. If you are tired of the same-old squish representation that has crippled our economy and divided our country, I urge you to vote today.Thank you for all of your support,
Jeremy Munson
Candidate for Congress
Personal cell: (507) 200-8448
|
---
P.S. We are holding our Election Night Party at Otto Media Group in Mankato starting at 5:30 pm. Feel free to stop by and join us in celebrating our America-First victory! If you are able to attend or have any questions, please contact [**Kyle@JeremyMunson.com**](mailto:Kyle@JeremyMunson.com)**.**
[](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=e3a9a5ab01&e=f4c2e54596)
| [Paid for by Munson for Congress]()
---
| | | | [](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=d9b377c7e0&e=f4c2e54596)| [](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=ac09bea618&e=f4c2e54596)| [](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=54fbca4eaf&e=f4c2e54596)
---|---|---

We have campaigned non-stop in each of the 21 counties in the First Congressional District, and our grass roots outsider campaign is surging!

With your support and vote today I will stand strong for election integrity and our shared conservative values including the Right to Life, the Right to Keep and Bear Arms, energy independence and support for farmers and main street small businesses.

If you have any questions about our campaign or voting, call our Election Day hotline at 507-508-3148. Turnout is expected to be very low and your vote **_will_** make a difference!

Conservatively Yours,

Maryland needs a Democratic governor who delivers results, not just rhetoric. And delivering results is exactly what Tom’s done his entire career.

From breaking barriers on the Montgomery County Council to serving as President Obama’s Labor Secretary, he’s fought for jobs, justice, and opportunity.

**[We want as many Maryland voters to see this ad as possible – so we’re asking you for help to keep in on the air.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45694771/347073922/-1315609667?refcode=email_052422_adonair&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGQyZDNiZC03Y2RiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P_kLU9cp84MLKvFTo8imdu01y_JY-fjSIwhRF9NXnfE=)**

subject: One crucial week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| Peter,

It's Whitney, Abigail's Finance Director. These last few weeks have thrown a lot our way - from the leaked draft of the Supreme Court's decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ to political experts calling our district a "toss-up" - both of which serve as sobering reminders of what's at stake in this election.

In one week, our campaign will reach its May fundraising deadline, and given all that's transpired this month, it's essential we reach our goal. **_We need to build momentum as Election Day nears. Please, contribute to our campaign today:_ [_abigailspanberger.com/MayGoal_](https://act.myngp.com/el/q5ueoCJk1Arf0pJ716EYskdlNxufUbmXCat4sPfEzjo=/vPWHINnUOVsrvV2vy5n1A2VcSp-uPBW-V6nfC02pe7g=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220524-1-EM&amount=25)**

Our team is campaigning hard to ensure new voters learn about Abigail's work in Congress. She's advocating for a stock trading ban for members of Congress and their spouses and has passed important legislation to improve how the federal government tracks, reports, and prosecutes cybercrimes.

But we need your support to continue fueling this campaign. So our ask is this: _**Before next week 's crucial fundraising deadline, will you invest in our campaign?**_

**Here 's the link again: [_abigailspanberger.com/MayGoal_](https://act.myngp.com/el/q5ueoCJk1Arf0pJ716EYskdlNxufUbmXCat4sPfEzjo=/vPWHINnUOVsrvV2vy5n1A2VcSp-uPBW-V6nfC02pe7g=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220524-1-EM&amount=25)**

Thank you for your support,
Whitney Holt
Finance Director for Abigail Spanberger for Congress
