---
| | **Markets are down, interest rates are up, and inflation is attacking our families!**

**Where is Madeleline Dean? She's helicoptering around the high Alps, clinking glasses with the liberal elite in Switzerland.**

How exactly can any public servant - especially a Congresswoman who supported all of the disastrous policies that created the mess we're in today - justify jetting off to Davos with Al Gore, John Kerry, and George Soros at the same moment mothers cannot find baby formula for their children and workers can't afford to fill their cars with gas?

**Shameful.**

**Madeleine Dean should spend as much time as she likes in Switzerland when voters retire her from Congress next year. _Until then, she should either do her job or step down_.**

**If you agree that it's time for us to take back the House and retire the far-left liberals who are not interested in making Washington work for all of us, [_JOIN OUR TEAM TODAY_](https://cn4pa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d1d8e72981035507cd4628e7&id=edd32250c1&e=0a4d873a55)!**

We need all the help we can get between today and November 8 if we hope to defeat Davos Dean. Sign up to volunteer, share this email with a friend, or make a contribution right now! Even $10 helps our team tremdously.

Thank you for your commitment to our campaign. Let's win this race!

\- Christian

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpdv5d9er3i9cu96k15slsh0b3fu23e897qjhto0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5g69o71clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcsr7murj1pbks5gm8tlgmspj0sb6m9r3bcrlcdp32s9mc1imecrjeapnadpi63jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor5cr2cur62pjmcsqr8dtgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjq3uhr8kr5khtkcnvkdieltqi6qlj4ni492v530_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5g69o71clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc0bmlljp7jlkh93g0nl61onmdmhanadouh3unbg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5g69o71clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn3m1qfoengosrp014dfq64q5lr6pcf6sfbcl05g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5g69o71clh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: A message from Michael Brown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
This is a painful but necessary decision I make decisively because that’s what the citizens deserve. | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Peter:

Today, I have officially withdrawn from the Governor’s race.

I have made many tough decisions for the right reasons over my life. This is a painful but necessary decision I make decisively because that’s what the citizens deserve.

It appears that after our signature gathering was complete, certain individuals with whom we had independently contracted for a portion of our signature gathering and validation jumped onto other campaigns and went on a money grab. They were involved in allegedly fraudulent signature gathering activities with these campaigns.

As a result, the Michigan Bureau of Elections has declared all of the signatures connected to those individuals as invalid. Many thousands of valid signatures were thrown out as a result.

I cannot and will not be associated with this activity.

We built this campaign on common sense conservative principles with a positive message of prosperity, safety, and respect for all the citizens of Michigan. The countless hours, miles, conversations, and tireless effort will not be in vain as I continue to fight for the future of Michigan.

During my years in the Marine Corps and 34 years in the Michigan State Police each assignment has been about serving the citizens. I will exit the race for Michigan's Governor with my integrity and this principle intact.

Sincerely,

Michael Brown
---

[Add us to your address book](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=96688bebaa)

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&afl=1)

clean_body: This is a painful but necessary decision I make decisively because that’s what the citizens deserve. | | | | | | | | Peter: Today, I have officially withdrawn from the Governor’s race. I have made many tough decisions for the right reasons over my life. This is a painful but necessary decision I make decisively because that’s what the citizens deserve. It appears that after our signature gathering was complete, certain individuals with whom we had independently contracted for a portion of our signature gathering and validation jumped onto other campaigns and went on a money grab. They were involved in allegedly fraudulent signature gathering activities with these campaigns. As a result, the Michigan Bureau of Elections has declared all of the signatures connected to those individuals as invalid. Many thousands of valid signatures were thrown out as a result. I cannot and will not be associated with this activity. We built this campaign on common sense conservative principles with a positive message of prosperity, safety, and respect for all the citizens of Michigan. The countless hours, miles, conversations, and tireless effort will not be in vain as I continue to fight for the future of Michigan. During my years in the Marine Corps and 34 years in the Michigan State Police each assignment has been about serving the citizens. I will exit the race for Michigan's Governor with my integrity and this principle intact. Sincerely, Michael Brown | | | Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P.O. Box 23 • Stevensville, MI 49127 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@captainmikeformichigan.com | | Copyright © 2022 Michael Brown for Governor, All rights reserved.

BIG news, Peter Willis: **Today, the Working Families Party (WFP) just officially endorsed our campaign for Congress in NY-03!**
If we want to build a New York for the many, we need to elect representatives who are unbought by corporate PAC money and undeterred in the fight for working families. The Working Families Party has been the blood and sweat of that movement, and I am beyond honored to receive their endorsement.
**_The Working Families Party is the latest addition to our formidable grassroots coalition, the largest in the race._** To win in November, we can’t just elect any Democrat. **We need to coalesce around Democrats who are ready and willing to fight for working families** —and I am that Democrat. I ran in 2020 to rebuild the community that built me, and I’m running again because I believe we can win this fight.
**I am not for sale. Neither is NY-03—and I am proud to have the Working Families Party in my corner as we fight for real representation for the families of Long Island.**
— Melanie D’Arrigo
PS: If you’re able to, **[please chip in now to keep our campaign going through the primary in August and beyond!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3DrGHMq1vYWA9yWdrA6UCU_OFFwVTyksOkY-4_9IcdfVv2qGDXsXLkATy-J4Y-6ruqEsm7E00QdF8E1cNOcBXYZnSMyY2JICBt2Unep4deapZul6wkDc6ME3N5fk1JXU-3Iag_ThljEcSe9cU9UDxqvNyQdggxBu4vtApfHHSfIGNqIvJ4_6Y4bAsrpt0VF4xJoGr2iaFQswDGEO-vTBPsRVeOF3ou-83cgzAxggXgZfXHHYaXM7yRwzKcnHvLSp4le9BXCk3qUXqqRx5OLj5S-QWl9sNcrIMgVBeKJ7DgxiVfNey61Q-tEfwGPCMutgXrL1UTyOxVXwgZsx9FYy3rBGuTILCEbFfAgpHaPH_NqiyY/3mb/t0Eym9LfSKutgxdk_DvRRg/h1/Nrb8-cQV0Yl_-PvExLH3skVlFUyFk3UhZOXlrueqEfs) **Thanks, Peter Willis.

clean_body: | | | | BIG news, Peter Willis: Today, the Working Families Party (WFP) just officially endorsed our campaign for Congress in NY-03! If we want to build a New York for the many, we need to elect representatives who are unbought by corporate PAC money and undeterred in the fight for working families. The Working Families Party has been the blood and sweat of that movement, and I am beyond honored to receive their endorsement. The Working Families Party is the latest addition to our formidable grassroots coalition, the largest in the race. To win in November, we can’t just elect any Democrat. We need to coalesce around Democrats who are ready and willing to fight for working families —and I am that Democrat. I ran in 2020 to rebuild the community that built me, and I’m running again because I believe we can win this fight. I am not for sale. Neither is NY-03—and I am proud to have the Working Families Party in my corner as we fight for real representation for the families of Long Island. — Melanie D’Arrigo PS: If you’re able to, Thanks, Peter Willis. Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists) Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. Box 312 Port Washington, NY 11050 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Melanie D'Arrigo for NY-03, please .

name: Team Latham
subject: Election Day! Vote Latham Saddler for U.S. Senate
body:
Help us get out the vote!
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Greetings!

We stepped into this race over a year ago because we saw the America that I grew up in slipping away. I decided I needed to serve my country once again and fight for the future of my two boys so they can grow up in an America that is free and prosperous.
We have traveled to every corner of this state, meeting with the great people of Georgia and casting a vision to bring next generation leadership to the United States Senate. I fought for our state and country in every debate and forum we had, while my primary opponent didn't bother showing up.
I've proved time and again that I will fight for you and your family in the United States Senate. I am the only candidate that will be able to hold Raphael Warnock accountable for the bag of goods he sold Georgians, and the only candidate that can defeat him in November.
My promise remains that I will never answer to anyone except to the people of Georgia. I won't be bought or told how to vote. And I won't let you down. I humbly ask for your vote in today's primary election so that we can fight to restore America's promise to our future generations.
We have surged to 2nd place in the polls, and my opponent is falling closer and closer towards the 50% runoff threshold. We can take this to a runoff if our supporters turn out, so please go vote!
The polls are open until 7pm tonight, so make sure to vote if you haven't already!
[Click here to find your polling location](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M6SdtqfQ0tglyg_b-IfWGGlGucLAutg6wSFYMm3JhtM-yn6WcxZdPbpsFwDZ_8vxC3q_2RfXBcmQsXm4xI6URjvDGLpIuxGZuSkwkHigGg-L3DQGrCVFBRKQcLpPi_znP8bkCOB9w3rzqwrot9V6lwgm5ryQNX-Q&c=bVjhmpzKcB76jEmE_IFBAHestBZk6QSgz-4IMhhamyjGn6YWSJQBSQ==&ch=UEO4NljYRzYkWPkuTraDYwtIE34vlwo7UmUURPmDBSfz_0YVO6lk7w==)

| Reminder: If you haven't returned your absentee ballot, you must do so in person by 7pm tonight to your county board of elections.
If you have already voted, we need your help getting 20 people to the polls. Our campaign data shows that if each of our supporters urges 20 people to vote today, we'll be in a very strong position and heading into a runoff against Herschel Walker.
Below is a message that you can copy and paste to share with your family, friends, colleagues, group chats, or email lists:
Friends, We have a duty to vote today and I want to urge you to vote Latham Saddler for U.S. Senate.
Latham has surged to #2 in the polls and we need your vote to pull Herschel Walker below 50% and into a runoff. Your vote counts!
Latham is a native Georgian, proud husband and father of two young boys, Navy SEAL, and ran the black ops portfolio at the White House.
Latham has the leadership qualities and experience to defeat Raphael Warnock and help lead Georgia and our country.
Watch below to see why Latham is the man to defeat Warnock and why Herschel Walker is not:
[https://youtu.be/1gQ_pVSFmcc](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M6SdtqfQ0tglyg_b-IfWGGlGucLAutg6wSFYMm3JhtM-yn6WcxZdPcHt6Fnrt_kBeNrfrZ-UIbp6G5sl8UHVcY89GN6bxnMqj7dlULyLDcWAxYWjEX_HU90Yb3gK3TK-L0jbjeR_vXTNB6kgYMyEGA==&c=bVjhmpzKcB76jEmE_IFBAHestBZk6QSgz-4IMhhamyjGn6YWSJQBSQ==&ch=UEO4NljYRzYkWPkuTraDYwtIE34vlwo7UmUURPmDBSfz_0YVO6lk7w==)
[https://youtu.be/jc2npA4PMBI](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M6SdtqfQ0tglyg_b-IfWGGlGucLAutg6wSFYMm3JhtM-yn6WcxZdPbpsFwDZ_8vxMrNfbEM4a9PdrvzVKoW-lUVzgEiUTdYTVInxS0vJhRHSaQrigrVjxVI-YrFR16ERLk18Ohtj6aCR8S08Uq9xkQ==&c=bVjhmpzKcB76jEmE_IFBAHestBZk6QSgz-4IMhhamyjGn6YWSJQBSQ==&ch=UEO4NljYRzYkWPkuTraDYwtIE34vlwo7UmUURPmDBSfz_0YVO6lk7w==)

Gratefully, Latham

subject: There is a serious shortage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holland for Kansas
body:
Mark Holland is running for US Senate because Kansas and America deserve a strong, courageous leader who leads with faith, speaks the truth, and is willing to stand up to extremists across the political spectrum. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/K80IoBtScUKMviWXAMvX8A2?unsubscribedata=wd1SBnoG%2B7v63FXBRyRixeBJZ9FJIr0C3FsjZK7J9vzvQkReGtLhsA1mxZ6NINc03x0bGqjAAiUPusOfICf7Te4XEGDwKHIkxejdeNE4oLo7RB6hvmG14nu1U9B4cFhxFf88Lmap%2FCZHumNjY%2BCCbya3HrDJwU%2BPwmM6K7QbpFP2w9o3N9sk2qW8VxMlrGxQSNCZIUk1HC7tXkNbHH5EON7B%2B1AtqZ579SqMQGqKUQlYXWXlaflYgnUGBsnsx3qUTuCke%2BkFDvq9GC8rYkv25JXDSrkpYQgqO3JvtQdNUzS8Mb3jA%2BVQ1KqimdtOO5dxastQS6B1xN6fmn8GnJoWSfLBiEZ2diJtYdx4ROJ5Pmf%2FHRMOnqqecwm94Dk0bRsOrnvsWb5WDTXfU4FENpKxmmgSt8W13drNBhjZXgpiXlk%3D)

| | Right now, there is a serious baby formula shortage all across America. President Biden has invoked the Defense Production Act to alleviate this ongoing shortage, to quickly and safely source new formula that meets U.S. standards from abroad to fill the gap.

[If you can, please sign your name below if you agree that baby formula should be tightly monitored, and companies have a responsibility to protect their consumers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45695590/347078616/-351230793?refcode=MH_EM_PT_3MO_220524_1_1&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGZjYzg5MS04MmRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Cam_14CBWWwu8pRFoti_11KQ_bm4nZCKGbZqXCoceI=&emci=0b938b8a-78db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=f4fcc891-82db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=2432894) | | [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45695591/347078617/-351230793?refcode=MH_EM_PT_3MO_220524_1_1&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGZjYzg5MS04MmRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Cam_14CBWWwu8pRFoti_11KQ_bm4nZCKGbZqXCoceI=&emci=0b938b8a-78db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=f4fcc891-82db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=2432894)
---
But, the crux of the issue is this: mega-corp Abbott that is responsible for this baby formula recall and shortage detected issues with the formula going back as far as 2019 – _but didn’t say anything until they were held up to FDA scrutiny._

Private companies too often are putting customers and our families at risk so they can profit and cut corners to save face. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Curry?=
subject: ELECTION DAY
body:
DAVID CURRY FOR CONGRESS |
---
| | [ ](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=832d888062&e=598f6aa24c)
---
| | Friend,

**TODAY** is Election Day in Georgia!

Get your friends and family to the polls and **vote David Curry for Congress!**

Starting today, we will take our country and Georgia back from the Radical Left Democrats who are seeking to destroy our beloved country.

Together we will _restore the American Dream!_

Ours is not just a campaign, but a movement of hard working Georgians who want a brighter future for themselves and their families. I have met thousands of patriots over the course of the campaign, and**I will be your voice in Congress.**

To my supporters, thank you from the bottom of my heart for all your support. You are patriots and **together we are going to WIN!**

Get out and vote, Georgia!

Thank you,

David Curry

subject: All eyes are on Georgia

body:
| | Peter,

With the Republican Primary election today, I'm reaching out one more time to ask for your help.

In the first three months of this year, our Democrat opponent raised a record-breaking $13.6 MILLION! That's $151,000 PER DAY or $105 EVERY MINUTE - both day and night!

I know it may seem like a lot, but **we can close the gap** if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. _**[I'm humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60455384:6U4E3MoN9:m:1:3317145305:540D7236F44A58E87B5553D5BE6E5759:r "I’m humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.")**_

---

In order to defeat Democrat Sen. Raphael Warnock in November, I must win the Republican primary election

Democrats know we have the chance to flip this Senate seat in Georgia from BLUE to RED. They see that we're virtually TIED in the polls, so they are FREAKING OUT. They know that Republicans will fight tooth and nail to keep Georgia from going BLUE AGAIN, so they are pouring resources into the state like crazy.

If we're going to win the critical Senate race in Georgia, we need your help.

In the 60 seconds it has taken you to read this short email, my Democrat opponent has raised another $105. Can you believe that?! _**[Would you please chip in $3 or more to help combat my opponent's war chest and help us win this critical election?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60455384:6U4E3MoN9:m:1:3317145305:540D7236F44A58E87B5553D5BE6E5759:r "Would you
please chip in $3 or more to help combat my opponent’s war chest and help us win this critical election?")**_

To victory,

Herschel Walker

clean_body: Common sense lives on Main Street and DC can use some homegrown change! | | | | | ---|---|--- Peter, Common sense lives on Main Street and DC can use some homegrown change! I need your vote to take the fight for our conservative values to Washington D.C. Your vote is your voice. Please speak up loud and clear and get to the polls before 8:00 p.m. I humbly ask for your support. From left to right, top to bottom: Geneva Bar & Grill - Geneva; Knights Menswear - Rochester; Old Acres Farm - Alpha; Rochester; C&F Video - Stewartville; Geneva; Hartland University - Hartland; Good Shepherd Church - Jackson; Dad/Daughter Dance - Albert Lea High School. I'm heading back to Liz Cheney's home turf - alongside PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP \- to join his rally and support this important task...
[REMOVING RINO LIZ CHENEY FROM CONGRESS!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dr7htcjrT0lqmUXxO45Alslrnk-T56AhaBR-LfBb449euPztZWDw6frOccBh-2Ei03M5zr2U0oCH2yGoOovuAJr5ys3FODGmfbdci1-lYOKNoQemQGkD6TrlOylteYd3BInLWrpD3mPRm1S8v9pb1xYJHNJ05idDXdAoyqrLJVFWr4wHRxDAF7hAReKpBTuhoBKxTq3M6PpNQTIHD-Bx4CmPFCBBEWGmD9SqTs3efpL9mWzUCmZ-sZZhA-wbNyArXjuK11dfrYZmrZ-1yIudjQ==&c=i-EPyETXjX55EoD1cYub7l81joGzn4nnJ7CoJW5pToWuriS_Vh1a-g==&ch=jng0_JK_trlqNssdyJMHFanAD2ODa2kkVjS2jzo4dr6CxRXJ7-O0LA==)

And this time, led by President Trump, this rally is going to be even BIGGER. name: HER Time
subject: You call these "family values"??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/GLQkJnEzHzemjyoJayM1M3fcbIY43j05fsyRceD84SU=/5gPKMeTdtZ0QA-LzkqYd9yANmTfiTRp6uKVJuh2GBoY=)
---
Republicans like to say that they're the party of "family values." But in the last year, Republicans have:
* Prevented the extension of Child Tax Credits
* Blocked spending on baby formula during a national shortage
* Tried to overturn same-sex marriage
* Passed bills that punish parents who support their children's gender identities.

Basically, they haven't done _anything _to actually support the working families they claim to defend.
**Our 16 frontline Congresswomen are fighting for legislation that ACTUALLY makes a difference for the families they represent.**

name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: I’m running for Congress against Sean Patrick Maloney.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
I know that together, we can build a grassroots movement that will mobilize, organize, and win all across the 17th district.
#
Friends -
I’ve got some huge news to share this morning regarding my campaign for Congress, and I wanted you to be one of the very first to know:
**I’m running to be the next member of Congress from New York’s 17th district, a newly redrawn district that includes Westchester, Rockland, Putnam, and Dutchess counties.**
I’ll explain the stakes of this decision in just a moment, but first, I’m hoping I can count on you to become a Day One Donor to our campaign so we build the kind of grassroots, people-powered movement required to win this race.
[**Can you make a contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to our campaign for Congress in NY-17?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-may/?refcode=em220524-1-15&refcode2=776_59515_Q1_L4N&akid=776%2E59515%2EQ1_L4N)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-may/?refcode=em220524-1-15&refcode2=776_59515_Q1_L4N&akid=776%2E59515%2EQ1_L4N)**
Here’s the truth: This is going to be a tough race, right from the start.
We are facing off against Sean Patrick Maloney, a very well-funded and well-connected corporate Democrat. He is the kind of opponent who can rally the political and corporate establishment in both New York and Washington to try and stop us.
I decided to run for Congress in the first place because I'm so frustrated by what's simply not happening in Washington. Democrats talk the talk about tackling climate change, reducing the cost of prescription drugs, passing stricter gun laws, protecting abortion rights — the list goes on. But nothing ever changes.
Sean Patrick Maloney represents what doesn’t work with the Democratic Party today.
He's gladly taken hundreds of thousands of dollars from corporate PACs who poison our political system with endless dark money.
From the insurance and pharmaceutical companies, who make billions in profits while working people struggle to afford health care and prescription drugs? Check.
From Wall Street banks, whose greed and corruption crashed the economy as their executives paid themselves massive bonuses with taxpayer dollars? Yes, them too.
I’m no stranger to Sean Patrick Maloney’s kind of opposition.
I won my race for State Senate in 2018 by primarying a powerful seven-term fake Democrat. We were outspent nearly 10-to-1, with outside special interests spending millions of dollars trying to stop us.
_It didn’t work then, and it won’t work now._
I’ve never shied away from fights like these before, because I know that I have supporters like you standing with me. **We know this is possible because the political currency of our time is people.**
That’s why I’m not accepting a cent of corporate PAC money, and it’s why we’re funding our campaign the right way — with lots and lots of people chipping in what they can.
I know that together, we can build a grassroots movement that will mobilize, organize, and win all across the 17th district. But it’s going to take a lot of resources to do that, so please, if you are able:
[**Make a $3 contribution and become a Day One Donor to our campaign for New York’s 17th district today. We cannot do this without your support.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-may/?refcode=em220524-1-15&refcode2=776_59515_Q1_L4N&akid=776%2E59515%2EQ1_L4N)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-may/?refcode=em220524-1-15&refcode2=776_59515_Q1_L4N&akid=776%2E59515%2EQ1_L4N)**
We’ll be in touch over the coming days with more info on our plan to win this race, our bold vision for the 17th district, and how you can get involved. I’m so excited to stand with you and create the kind of New York that we all deserve.
Thank you for reading, and for everything that you do.
With gratitude,
Alessandra Biaggi

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=776%2E59515%2EQ1_L4N).

**[SIGN ON: Tell Republicans that it’s time to expand Medicaid in North Carolina!>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45696942/347085016/1084181632?refcode=ea.6be3249f-86db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.6be3249f-86db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmUzMjQ5Zi04NmRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=29bDXkGW0KgRXVxngm_NLqL6x77MGqV0EYoF20KzGk4=&emci=e5d82799-86db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=6be3249f-86db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=1049176)**

Peter —
If we learned anything over more than two years of a global pandemic, it HAS to be that health care access is fundamental. No one should worry about breaking the bank to visit the doctor.
**That’s why this is _still_ at the top of our agenda: Roy’s recent budget proposal once again makes expanding Medicaid a priority.**
The 600,000 additional North Carolinians who could be able to access health care with Medicaid expansion include working people without insurance, families with children, veterans, and more. They _deserve_ to be covered.
Roy and his Democratic allies have been advocating for Medicaid expansion for _years_. But at every turn, GOP legislators have blocked their efforts.
**[Peter, if you believe that expanding Medicaid is critical to North Carolina, tell Republicans that you SUPPORT including it in the new budget. Peter — If we learned anything over more than two years of a global pandemic, it HAS to be that health care access is fundamental. No one should worry about breaking the bank to visit the doctor. The 600,000 additional North Carolinians who could be able to access health care with Medicaid expansion include working people without insurance, families with children, veterans, and more. They deserve to be covered. Roy and his Democratic allies have been advocating for Medicaid expansion for years. But at every turn, GOP legislators have blocked their efforts. Roy is counting on you to stand with him in the fight for North Carolinians’ health care access. Thanks for showing your support, Team Cooper = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Thank you for making me the Republican Party's endorsed candidate for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts PO Box 60362 Worcester, MA 01606
body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Friends,
Thank you.
Our campaign won this past weekend's MassGOP State Convention with a whopping 71 percent of the vote. What's more, my running mate Leah Allen also won the Convention with 70 percent of the vote.
As a result, Leah and I are now exceptionally proud to be the endorsed candidates of the Massachusetts Republican Party for Lieutenant Governor and Governor, respectively.
---
---
| [Click Here to Help Geoff Win!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h-Nu0gQiimdroZG9RaUxSPNPK0Pm5wuTedUS34LkPdKOks9DieIvDUaKbQDFBxjfy2dlHFHjPZZvr3VQ1M0992w2qVu8hlU8BG6SvHIi_zFvp76y6PMljx88a2zYN9go1Nvs3UE__sjOW3iGCB0Y51v0lmK_wV2pVGg2MtbVuKICXcJAeNzUUA==&c=1x86eCY6ZWO2oiUDOZNXdBEIjmXRxnlUEtYY8tRuGwk_Q_JSlfSzHA==&ch=SDRO9VGqzv46V3iG1WZXo7KzuaLBFEdnufUJifSyKo-Rd6_QGvigcA==)
---
---
I would like to thank you for your constant support, which made all of this possible. Team Diehl and Team Allen carried the day, decisively. And, of course, to all of the delegates, thank you for your vote.
I strongly believe we are the best ticket to lead Massachusetts forward, and that we are a winning ticket for Republicans.
---
---
---
---
As I said to Convention delegates in my remarks, our campaign is here to fight for Massachusetts and its future:
---
* No more taking away our freedoms.

* On Day One, I will rehire every state worker who was fired because of the vaccine mandate. And on Day Two, we'll give a pink slip to anyone who thought that was a good idea!

* No more spending billions of dollars on crazy pet projects.

* We pledge to cut taxes and make our state a more affordable place to live.

* No more closing businesses because of power-hungry, abusive mandates.

* No more driver's licenses for illegal immigrants.

* We will support education. No more putting masks on kids in school and teaching them to be ashamed to be an American.

* And don't you dare try to undermine the integrity of our elections and our democracy with mail-in ballots!

---
I am convinced that the best days for Massachusetts are ahead of us, not behind. Nobody's going to take our state away from us.
---
---
But know this: we must be vigilant, because progressives are trying really, really hard.
We have many months of campaigning still ahead of us, and we know the Democrats will be well-funded and they will stop at nothing to try to take over the Governor's Office. I am here to stop them, but I need your help.
Please consider making a donation to support my campaign:
---
---
| [Donate Now to Help Geoff Win!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h-Nu0gQiimdroZG9RaUxSPNPK0Pm5wuTedUS34LkPdKOks9DieIvDUaKbQDFBxjfy2dlHFHjPZZvr3VQ1M0992w2qVu8hlU8BG6SvHIi_zFvp76y6PMljx88a2zYN9go1Nvs3UE__sjOW3iGCB0Y51v0lmK_wV2pVGg2MtbVuKICXcJAeNzUUA==&c=1x86eCY6ZWO2oiUDOZNXdBEIjmXRxnlUEtYY8tRuGwk_Q_JSlfSzHA==&ch=SDRO9VGqzv46V3iG1WZXo7KzuaLBFEdnufUJifSyKo-Rd6_QGvigcA==)
---
---
Thank you for your support! We are going to win, and by winning, we are going to rescue Massachusetts and its future.
Sincerely,
---
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts PO Box 60362 Worcester, MA 01606

---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h-Nu0gQiimdroZG9RaUxSPNPK0Pm5wuTedUS34LkPdKOks9DieIvDd1SzanTMzcioztMCuRDu6AOcvqs1mI7-XN_H_cjBATfA6fhjLSnjRol-ChAnLxWtszDI4Xm3c9cCYDxI9Hliq4i4KhqxMRubZIVuHt5s0Ma&c=1x86eCY6ZWO2oiUDOZNXdBEIjmXRxnlUEtYY8tRuGwk_Q_JSlfSzHA==&ch=SDRO9VGqzv46V3iG1WZXo7KzuaLBFEdnufUJifSyKo-Rd6_QGvigcA==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h-Nu0gQiimdroZG9RaUxSPNPK0Pm5wuTedUS34LkPdKOks9DieIvDYHiDsDFbaYvUiN5Rb9-FKrqn94mYyUzNOJWuLDECnDi3FuOub7KzT-9UZHbl5hLQ-1BAjTm8avK0MqJKfEpSFM826K2bVx8IN7kyTgz_zcI&c=1x86eCY6ZWO2oiUDOZNXdBEIjmXRxnlUEtYY8tRuGwk_Q_JSlfSzHA==&ch=SDRO9VGqzv46V3iG1WZXo7KzuaLBFEdnufUJifSyKo-Rd6_QGvigcA==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h-Nu0gQiimdroZG9RaUxSPNPK0Pm5wuTedUS34LkPdKOks9DieIvDV3UwzIj3OpN44Wp1QtRk1LeKSLzKj9Aa_eoE2-u7AVF-qH22zELFahpzIhyAqSmfMAP4nKZABpdDU-ECixSADzN3oYfyt98_u6b6JhrdZl7&c=1x86eCY6ZWO2oiUDOZNXdBEIjmXRxnlUEtYY8tRuGwk_Q_JSlfSzHA==&ch=SDRO9VGqzv46V3iG1WZXo7KzuaLBFEdnufUJifSyKo-Rd6_QGvigcA==)

name: O'Halleran HQ
subject: BREAKING: Republicans vote against infant formula support bill.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
A party that would band together to act against a piece of legislation meant to keep infants from going hungry, is a party that cannot be allowed to run our country, for the sake of the health and well-being of our people.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45697482/347087338/-1120227311?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.05.24_b1_ohhq_all-nd&refcode2=c0629161-8adb-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDYyOTE2MS04YWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fUSRP447-L35k_Ds5GrlOBU6ibrVlGGiyd2j65dg06s=) | **The Washington Post:_Nearly 200 Republicans vote against bill to ease baby formula shortage_**
| [FIGHT BACK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45697483/347087339/-1120227311?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.05.24_b1_ohhq_all-nd&refcode2=c0629161-8adb-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDYyOTE2MS04YWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fUSRP447-L35k_Ds5GrlOBU6ibrVlGGiyd2j65dg06s=)
---

Team,

Last week House Republicans proved once again that they don’t care about what the people of our country actually need, by voting against a bill that will provide emergency funding to address the baby formula shortage crisis. [**I hope you’ll let us share our thoughts, but if you're already with us, can you chip in to help us fight back?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45697484/347087340/-1120227311?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.05.24_b1_ohhq_all-nd&refcode2=c0629161-8adb-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDYyOTE2MS04YWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fUSRP447-L35k_Ds5GrlOBU6ibrVlGGiyd2j65dg06s=)

[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45697485/347087341/-1120227311?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.05.24_b1_ohhq_all-nd&refcode2=c0629161-8adb-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDYyOTE2MS04YWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fUSRP447-L35k_Ds5GrlOBU6ibrVlGGiyd2j65dg06s=)
---

When House Republicans overwhelmingly voted against the _Infant Formula Supplemental Appropriations Act_ , they proved their callous disregard for the well-being of the most vulnerable people in our society. A party that would band together to act against a piece of legislation meant to keep infants from going hungry, is a party that cannot be allowed to run our country, for the sake of the health and well-being of our people.

Actions like this show why it’s critical that we maintain our Democratic Majority. [**Will you help protect our Democratic Majority by giving $5, $25, or whatever you can afford right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45697486/347087342/-1120227311?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.05.24_b1_ohhq_all-nd&refcode2=c0629161-8adb-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDYyOTE2MS04YWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fUSRP447-L35k_Ds5GrlOBU6ibrVlGGiyd2j65dg06s=)

clean_body: A party that would band together to act against a piece of legislation meant to keep infants from going hungry, is a party that cannot be allowed to run our country, for the sake of the health and well-being of our people. = | The Washington Post:Nearly 200 Republicans vote against bill to ease baby formula shortage | = Team, Last week House Republicans proved once again that they don’t care about what the people of our country actually need, by voting against a bill that will provide emergency funding to address the baby formula shortage crisis. = = When House Republicans overwhelmingly voted against the Infant Formula Supplemental Appropriations Act , they proved their callous disregard for the well-being of the most vulnerable people in our society. A party that would band together to act against a piece of legislation meant to keep infants from going hungry, is a party that cannot be allowed to run our country, for the sake of the health and well-being of our people. Actions like this show why it’s critical that we maintain our Democratic Majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = Thank you for doing your part, O'Halleran HQ Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. Peter, I’m a Green Beret combat veteran, a father, and a Florida business owner.

**America has given me everything - and I’m sick and tired of watching the Democrats try to destroy it.**

It’s no longer just a _difference of opinion._ The Left has launched a full scale attack on our rights, and they have their cannons ablaze and aimed at hardworking Americans like us.

Just like during my time in the Army, I need an A-team by my side if we’re going to take on our enemies once and for all.

**I want YOU to be a part of my top Republican team.**

[**Join the A-team today and be a part of the RED WAVE on Election Day.**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=94a2d6c02f2841cabf908774df7123a0&_e=8Ym-pwv6XlIvMkRnXGlGksbj4edGoehuRZ4smQ_GaXsQUR1BYxlKN8ggNNbkjPR3Z1h97SSa3Ay9SpaK82QVx06vDHcmpc-najjV3Gs-bc4VcOpoAx6jFW21xHL2dulPlT3GrAcro3sY9SaIF6rj4w7nHuKIy3HN9_HKzKk5sHxnO0cbnG_FEcI8FpKweswNiLTATcoux69OrosaK-NpNtHy4JmvdqWRyc6GSVoMY3V4JVm1p4GB63fmw-UmQBg0mMmJ0-7Imqnv2w0TYvj5WOxL05E-MSqaVg_ZkLDUCpKEKyw6ABUXbVOcdLOzg1U8BrHrnrQEbbL2ttZdWEBafGIJtGJnK0M6xQR7L_l-_mrsgoE5FpMxdtPfmmE3e2lzA-8FnXKCGhQDmW35jBwOLA%3D%3D)

All I’ve ever wanted was to serve America, Peter.

I’m the son and grandson of Navy Chiefs, and after seeing the incredible work they did, I wanted to continue their mission and keep America safe for my children.

I may have hung up my uniform, but my commitment to America is the same. **I will serve with honor and duty and do WHATEVER IT TAKES to destroy our enemies at home or abroad.**

Saving America from the radical Left is a bold mission, and I need a top-tier team behind me if we’re going to see it to its finish.

The Radical Democrats have been rallying their base around their dangerous anti-life rhetoric. This month, they have been able to make huge gains in their fundraising numbers. Kat isn't playing their game, and she needs your help to make sure Americans aren't either. She's sticking to her guns and is staying focused on the real issues you are facing. | | | == | May is the month we take the stand for America First in the face of Leftist tyranny. name: =?utf-8?Q?Steve=20Haugaard?=
subject: South Dakota has a bright future… If we want it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haugaard for Governor
body:
| | | |
---
| | | The elections of 2016 and 2020, the unconstitutional COVID lockdowns, the nationwide riots and rising crime, and now skyrocketing inflation have picked America up and dropped it back on its head over the last five years.

The result? Millions of conservatives who have been unengaged with politics for decades are taking action this year.

It’s clear now that if we want a better future for ourselves, our children, and our grandchildren,**we have to make it happen ourselves. **

South Dakotans are tough. We’re rugged. We’re neighborly but we’re also independent. We’ve taken a lot of abuse over the last few years and put up with it, but no longer. The future of our state is at risk if we don’t make changes to lower taxes, improve our schools, and become more economically independent.

**We can have a bright future here in South Dakota... _if we want it!_**

Do you want it? Then get as many people together as you can and _**VOTE FOR STEVE HAUGAARD in the June 7th governor primary! **_
---
|
---
| God Bless,
---
|
\- Steve Haugaard

_Republican Candidate for Governor _

body:
We’re all neighbors and we need to do right by each other.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45697982/347089766/-774467154?refcode=abd_em_fr_2022_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.05.24_b1_roe2-team_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjkyOGM1YS04YmRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v-Z3AfRPH9RLmJGRrEPiF4ttiI5vzvIIb74-8c5ILD4=)

Hi team,

_Roe v. Wade_ has been in danger for a while now, but this leaked draft opinion from SCOTUS has made the fight much more real. Now more than ever, we need to ensure we’re electing people who will stand up for our values _as a community_. We’re all neighbors and we need to do right by each other.

Calling abortion “genocide” certainly isn’t a value any of us on Team Pfaff were taught as children, and so we have got to ensure Brad gets elected to fight for what the community truly needs as opposed to spreading disinformation and fake news like Derrick Van Orden does. When our democracy is strong and we elect _honest_ leaders, our government works for _all_ of us, not just an extremist elite misinforming the public and spreading lies.

**[If “settled law” is no longer reliable, we have to make sure we show up to the polls and elect leaders we can trust will do right by us. But to do that, we need to stay on track for our fundraising. Will you give $5 today to help us reach our goal and elect a leader who will fight for the values we hold dear?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45697984/347089768/-774467154?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.05.24_b1_roe2-team_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.05.24_b1_roe2-team_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjkyOGM1YS04YmRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v-Z3AfRPH9RLmJGRrEPiF4ttiI5vzvIIb74-8c5ILD4=)** | [GIVE $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45697986/347089770/-774467154?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.05.24_b1_roe2-team_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.05.24_b1_roe2-team_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjkyOGM1YS04YmRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v-Z3AfRPH9RLmJGRrEPiF4ttiI5vzvIIb74-8c5ILD4=)

Now more than ever, we need to ensure we’re electing people who will stand up for our values as a community. We’re all neighbors and we need to do right by each other. Calling abortion “genocide” certainly isn’t a value any of us on Team Pfaff were taught as children, and so we have got to ensure Brad gets elected to fight for what the community truly needs as opposed to spreading disinformation and fake news like Derrick Van Orden does. When our democracy is strong and we elect honest leaders, our government works for all of us, not just an extremist elite misinforming the public and spreading lies. = | = = = = = = Thank you, Team Pfaff | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

body:
There are thousands of new voters in our district who haven’t heard from us yet. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45698244/347090330/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjYzZGI4Mi04YmRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3OJQ4CcZmRruRN4dlAw0hz3myWmNzuMrjb0myDC9-DE=) Hey there, friend. We’re just **2 weeks** from our primary election day, so we’re revamping one of our most successful voter outreach tools -- sending out a fresh round of mailers to Democrats and undecided voters in our district. Here’s what one of them looks like: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45698245/347090331/-10092236?refcode=em-5.24.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjYzZGI4Mi04YmRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3OJQ4CcZmRruRN4dlAw0hz3myWmNzuMrjb0myDC9-DE=) After redistricting, we’ve identified **thousands** of new voters in MT-01 who need to hear about Cora or her vision for Montana. name: Great America Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6057%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=TwiGs3UQoje6Fg8H%2bsWw4g&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62572%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CsLpTnH%2bT4zMhkdmja8QVA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62573%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=laIfOZCt3pdnwQ30BQ7tRA&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62574%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JeHUaYGwNQ186YbkbcXtGw&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6057%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=TwiGs3UQoje6Fg8H%2bsWw4g&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6057%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=TwiGs3UQoje6Fg8H%2bsWw4g&sysid=1)

subject: I ain’t gonna lie to you…

I ain’t gonna lie to you, friend, I’m scared to death about this:

Ted Cruz and Ron DeSantis have been crisscrossing Nevada ATTACKING Catherine Cortez Masto with vicious lies and smears. Cruz and DeSantis focused on Nevada for a diabolical reason:

Catherine is losing in the polls, she’s the most vulnerable Democratic senator in America, and if she loses, Mitch McConnell will take control of the Senate!

To make matters worse, Mitch McConnell’s super PAC just unleashed $15 MILLION in attack ads against Catherine while Cruz and DeSantis ensure EVERY MAGA voter turns out to defeat her!

**Friend this unprecedented GOP attack campaign WILL kill our chances of holding the Senate unless Catherine can raise the resources to fight back in the next 24 hours!**

**[_That’s why I promised Catherine I would help her hit her emergency goal, and friend, I'm personally counting on you to split $5 between Catherine's campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand right now. **Catherine’s opponent led Trump’s efforts to overturn the 2020 election in Nevada. He was personally recruited by Mitch McConnell and endorsed by Donald Trump. He would cast the deciding vote in the Senate to overturn the 2024 presidential election. And he’s currently LEADING Catherine in the polls!**

With polls showing Catherine 3 points behind this extremist, she CANNOT AFFORD to fall short of tonight’s emergency goal. James Carville

clean_body: | | | Peter, Election day is today! These are the final hours to get out the vote for Jessica – our team is working overtime to reach as many voters as possible in order to defeat Henry Cuellar tonight. Jessica is running for Congress to fight for healthcare as a human right, protect reproductive freedom for all, and work for economic, social, and environmental justice for all. In the last election, we defied expectations when we came within a tiny margin of defeating Henry Cuellar, but we were outspent by hundreds of thousands of dollars. Together, we are going to prove that a people-powered campaign like ours can take on a far-right Democratic incumbent and win this election. We're so grateful to have your support in this campaign. There are only a few hours left before the polls close. And tonight, on Jessica’s birthday, we will win. Let’s finish this campaign strong! Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

clean_body: Work To Do Time To Keep Our Foot on The Gas | Friends, It’s time to put our foot on the gas. | I cannot express my gratitude enough. After traveling North Carolina, visiting all 100 Counties, and meeting countless supporters, we came out of this primary victorious. Without a doubt, we have so much to celebrate. But, to be honest, there is even more work to be done now. Democrats from all around the nation will be pouring money into my adversary's campaign. The work starts NOW to protect North Carolina and to Take Back the Senate Majority. I havealways believed that our greatest strength is grassroots donations. I hope I can count on your continued support throughout this general election. Let’s win this one together. For North Carolina, Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. To support our campaign, please click below to make a donation. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Gibbs=20for=20Congress=20=2D=20MI=20=2D=2003?=
subject: Team Gibbs - Upcoming Events!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN GIBBS FOR CONGRESS, INC_
body:
Volunteers needed! | | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Team Gibbs will be out talking to voters in Grandville, Byron Center and Grand Haven the next two weeks! Thank you to all the volunteers who showed up this past Saturday. We reached over 100 voters in the new district who now know John is the right choice over Peter Meijer in August. This Saturday, we need to reach **500** voters, but we need your help!

Join us at any of the events listed below and help us continue getting the message out!

Sincerely,

Team Gibbs
---
|
---
| **_Upcoming Volunteer Opportunities_**

**Saturday, May 28th**
Grandville Door Launch | 10:00-1:00pm

Grand Haven Door Launch | 2:00-3:30pm

Learn how to use our door knocking app and knock doors with Team Gibbs! Email your RSVP to receive location details: team@votejohngibbs.com

**Monday, May 30th**
Fruitport Memorial Day Parade with Muskegon GOP & Team Gibbs | 12:30-3:00pm

We need volunteers to walk in the parade wearing John Gibbs campaign gear to pass out candy and John Gibbs material! Email your RSVP for meeting location and additional details: team@votejohngibbs.com

**Saturday, June 4th | 10:00-1:00pm**
Byron Center Door Launch

Learn how to use our door knocking app and knock doors with Team Gibbs! Email your RSVP to receive location details: team@votejohngibbs.com

**_Upcoming Events_**

**Tuesday, May 24th**
Fricano's Tuesday Cruise Night

John Gibbs will be at Fricano's Pizza to check out some antique cars and talk to voters. The Gibbs Team will be giving out t-shirts, hats, and yard signs.
Event Website: https://www.fricanospizzaalpine.com/calendar/cruisenight

**Saturday, May 28th**
Grand Haven Rib Fest

John Gibbs will be walking around talking to voters (and eating ribs too) at Grand Haven Rib Fest. If we see you there we'll give you some free campaign gear!
Event Website: https://visitgrandhaven.com/event/rib-fest-2022-at-grand-haven-vfw/2022-05-27/
---
| | |
---
| Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=1362c589c6&e=c238e8971e&c=19b2c72ccc) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=1362c589c6&e=c238e8971e&c=19b2c72ccc).

https://www.votejohngibbs.com

_PAID FOR BY JOHN GIBBS FOR CONGRESS, INC_
---

name: Team Booker
subject: Rand Paul’s abortion ban:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

It’s shameful,
Peter.

Rand Paul sent an email pushing for a nationwide ban on abortion. Take a
look yourself:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220524?refcode=em20220524-1966&t=1001&refcode2=1966_346206_7MeLCS&akid=1966%2E346206%2E7MeLCS ][IMG]

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220524?refcode=em20220524-1966&t=1002&refcode2=1966_346206_7MeLCS&akid=1966%2E346206%2E7MeLCS ][IMG]The “Life at Conception Act” is the next step for dangerous
anti-women legislators – a total and unequivocal nationwide ban on
abortion, without exception for rape or incest. This law is so extreme, 80
percent of the country does not support it.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220524?refcode=em20220524-1966&t=1022&refcode2=1966_346206_7MeLCS&akid=1966%2E346206%2E7MeLCS ]Peter, if
you think this legislation is as dangerous as we do, will you chip
in $5 right now to our people-powered campaign so we can
send Charles Booker to the U.S. Senate?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220524?refcode=em20220524-1966&t=1023&refcode2=1966_346206_7MeLCS&akid=1966%2E346206%2E7MeLCS ]Contribute $5

This is a blatant affront to human rights. Period.

What’s happening right now — from Rand’s support for a nationwide abortion
ban, to the Supreme Court deciding to repeal Roe v. Wade — is an urgent
warning of what’s to come if we don’t take action now.

We must abolish the filibuster. We must pass the Women’s Health Protection
Act. We must keep organizing to make sure everyone has quality healthcare,
including abortion coverage. We must expand the Supreme Court.

But to make this a reality, we must replace anti-abortion Senators like
Rand Paul and expand our majority so we can pass the policies we need.

We need your help to make this happen,
Peter. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220524?refcode=em20220524-1966&t=1024&refcode2=1966_346206_7MeLCS&akid=1966%2E346206%2E7MeLCS ]Will you chip
in $5 right now to show Rand Paul that this movement is
rising up to end his political career?

Let’s do this,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220524-1966-footer&t=1025&refcode2=1966_346206_7MeLCS&akid=1966%2E346206%2E7MeLCS

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1966%2E346206%2E7MeLCS

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Friends — With the primary behind us, we’re officially in general election mode. That means our team is getting right back to work talking to voters and organizing every community in PA-01. The past few weeks have been busy to say the least. So we wanted to take a moment to share what Ashley’s been up to on the campaign trail: | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45699007/347093865/621050394?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220524trailupdate_te_full_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzRkODk0Mi04ZGRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WzLCx4xA4QJyI3AwVcGUP1_7G_GW_rzaHH53nCaZVCs=)
---

_Josh Shapiro gave Ashley a high-five after she spoke at the Bans Off Our Bodies Rally in Doylestown._

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45699010/347093868/621050394?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220524trailupdate_te_full_xx_img4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzRkODk0Mi04ZGRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WzLCx4xA4QJyI3AwVcGUP1_7G_GW_rzaHH53nCaZVCs=)

_Ashley checked in at the Earth Day Festival at Core Creek State Park to celebrate with community members._
We are proud of the fact that our grassroots team is fueled by supporters like you, not special interests and corporations. But we cannot compete with Brian Fitzpatrick’s war chest without a movement behind us.
**[Chip in any amount — $5, $10, or more — to help us lay the groundwork for victory in November. clean_body: | = Friends — With the primary behind us, we’re officially in general election mode. That means our team is getting right back to work talking to voters and organizing every community in PA-01. The past few weeks have been busy to say the least. So we wanted to take a moment to share what Ashley’s been up to on the campaign trail: | = Primary Election Day! Ashley met up with friends in Montgomery County to remind Pennsylvanians to vote for Democrats up and down the ballot. = Josh Shapiro gave Ashley a high-five after she spoke at the Bans Off Our Bodies Rally in Doylestown. = After the Supreme Court majority opinion leaked, Ashley joined hundreds of people in PA-01 to support Roe v. Wade and reproductive freedom. = Ashley checked in at the Earth Day Festival at Core Creek State Park to celebrate with community members. We are proud of the fact that our grassroots team is fueled by supporters like you, not special interests and corporations. But we cannot compete with Brian Fitzpatrick’s war chest without a movement behind us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for helping build a better future for our Commonwealth. subject: 📷 I voted
body:
| | |
---
With the California primary on June 7, every voter has received a ballot in the mail – and I’m proud to say that putting my ballot in a drop box was easy, simple, and secure.

name: VoteVets
subject: Just $1
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
That’s the amount we’re asking you to contribute to VoteVets today
#
Derek -
We’re writing today to ask you to contribute $1. Yes, just $1.
$1 to help us fund our programs connecting veterans with veterans to fight disinformation and get them to vote Democratic in November
$1 to help us fund our campaigns in swing states needed to keep control of Congress.
$1 for the first time before our May fundraising drive comes to a close one week from today.
We know that $1 doesn’t seem like the kind of money that can do all those things, but right now lots and lots of veterans, military family members and those who support us are chipping in their $1.
So we’re asking for you to donate for the first time:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Niki=20Conforti?=
subject: And now our babies are paying the price?
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/95fc2735cc5f/conforti-for-congress-7218783?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

This is Outrageous!

American babies are crying for formula - and pallets have been shipped to the border for migrant babies! Now, several babies have been admitted to the hospital because they do not have the formula they need.

This Administration's policies of putting the American people last have got to end! It was known months ago that there would be an issue with supply of certain formulas, and no action was taken to protect the American parents and their babies. Even with formula coming from Germany - it is not the same formula, and it is too little too late.

Sean Casten and Marie Newman are in full support of this Administration's inaction. They have got to go!! It's time to put American citizens back on top!

If you want your US Congressional Representative to stand up for your rights and fight for policies that will benefit the American people - Vote Conforti for Congress June 28th!
Please consider donating to the Conforti for Congress campaign. [Click here](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=ec811211f9&e=25f4fa3311)
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---
| PS: Follow my campaign on [Facebook](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=fbe2c6cd55&e=25f4fa3311), [Twitter](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=805d36a13a&e=25f4fa3311), and [Instagram](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=3a2fc07595&e=25f4fa3311)!

subject: Volunteer Oppurtunity!!!
body:
Hi everyone!

The Lou Lyras for Congress campaign will be in the Boardman Memorial Day Parade this coming Monday. We are looking for volunteers to walk in the parade for the campaign. If you are interested, please respond to this email by Friday at noon to let us know. Thank you for your help!

See you on the trail.
Phone: (330) 301-2059
Address: 3763 McCartney Rd, Lowellville, OH 44436

| Friend, Utah is in the final stretch of the Republican primary race for the U.S. Senate! The data clearly shows that Republicans are abandoning Lee and supporting Becky in incredible numbers. **Mike’s support has dropped a full 27% in just two months and nearly 30% of voters are still undecided!** **We need to let them know about Becky. ** **We need to share her message with every potential voter. ** Our campaign has media ads ready to go, we’re just waiting for your financial support to get them on air. A TV media buy requires a minimum of $100,000 to be effective. We need 100 people to donate $100 dollars today to reach our goal! **What can you chip in to get Becky on TV?**

name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: Update on ballot challenges…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM BARRETT FOR CONGRESS | [ ](https://mgcp02
body:
Barrett prevails on both challenges | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=628cebf940c415275b351b11&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D628cd722f2a7e34c5b404f63%26ss_email_id%3D628cebf940c415275b351b11%26ss_campaign_name%3DUpdate%2Bon%2Bballot%2Bchallenges%25E2%2580%25A6%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-05-24T14%253A30%253A43Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=PNxBx0I5ar4qxANvokRj-Mzm-xY%3D)
---
| In the wake of shocking developments related to the gubernatorial primary with both James Craig and Perry Johnson being kicked off the ballot, there was some [good news for the Barrett Brigade](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=628cebf940c415275b351b11&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.detroitnews.com%2Fstory%2Fnews%2Fpolitics%2F2022%2F05%2F23%2Fjunge-barrett-should-make-ballot-michigan-elections-bureau-recommends%2F9900024002%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=250dUcsdG9mTSXXl69swjbZn7XY%3D).The state Bureau of Elections [rejected Elissa Slotkin’s frivolous challenge](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=628cebf940c415275b351b11&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.michigan.gov%2Fsos%2F-%2Fmedia%2FProject%2FWebsites%2Fsos%2F27delrio%2FBarrettStaffReport.pdf%3Fhash%3DD8321D7276CE027DE16F6793F4A2FB5C%26rev%3Da2e41cc44de946fea907e47c5d968c78&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=tDjBEpJOm5Ex8FyPsALbCTT_vXM%3D) to Tom’s petitions, confirming his mailing address - in Charlotte - and his domicile - Carmel Township - are both correct for his address and the distinction cited by Slotkin irrelevant. The irony here is that Slotkin herself couldn’t legally sign her own petition as she wasn’t a resident of the 7th District!Also, Tom’s last minute primary challenger, Jake Hagg, was [removed from the ballot](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=628cebf940c415275b351b11&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.michigan.gov%2Fsos%2F-%2Fmedia%2FProject%2FWebsites%2Fsos%2F27delrio%2FHaggStaffReport.pdf%3Fhash%3D3962B5D4213D2DCEB197E4E31F3A9D2B%26rev%3D74c4a4e4c5ba403d8837f992fc1c87af&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=da39l3DQxRIDr1LbcchCQknNzDo%3D) after the BOE found he submitted only 948 valid signatures, below the 1,000 signatures required, meaning Tom officially has no primary challenger.**Thank you to all of you who helped us gather signatures for Tom. Of the 1,434 submitted, only 46 were deemed invalid.** The race is now on for November with one challenger - Elissa Slotkin.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45699399/347095713/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220524FarRight_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiY2U2NGY4LThmZGItZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4YzMyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fWmpDPv2x2C3Lx4axgXm7TdI5BGXUT3y2Yyo_nb3hPw=)
| Fellow activist,

Of all the news coming out of the May 17th primary, this has to be the most concerning: the GOP’s candidate for Governor, current State Senator Doug Mastriano, is not only **an insurrectionist who was present on January 6th for the attack on our U.S. Capitol but was also in regular communication with President Donald Trump on the day of the attack.**

**_As a state senator, he even sponsored legislation to totally overturn our democracy by decertifying the commonwealth’s election results and requested to have the legislature pick their own electors._**

He has made no efforts to hide or backpedal his position on stripping voting rights: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45699405/347095719/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220524FarRight_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiY2U2NGY4LThmZGItZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4YzMyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fWmpDPv2x2C3Lx4axgXm7TdI5BGXUT3y2Yyo_nb3hPw=) **[Fellow activist, the selection of Doug Mastriano as the GOP candidate for Governor just made it abundantly clear: Republicans want to do away with our democracy entirely. Can you donate today to help us fight back by expanding the electorate?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45699407/347095721/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220524FarRight_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiY2U2NGY4LThmZGItZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4YzMyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fWmpDPv2x2C3Lx4axgXm7TdI5BGXUT3y2Yyo_nb3hPw=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45699408/347095723/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220524FarRight_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiY2U2NGY4LThmZGItZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4YzMyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fWmpDPv2x2C3Lx4axgXm7TdI5BGXUT3y2Yyo_nb3hPw=) This election could determine the fate of democracy in the commonwealth and, by extension, the nation. **The most obvious and dire threat is that Republican nominee Doug Mastriano could, as he tried to do in the state legislature, simply not allow a Democratic victory to be certified.**

It doesn’t stop there — as Governor, he would have not just his own executive powers to lean on in stripping away our voting rights, but also the ability to appoint the Secretary of State, who oversees the entirety of our election process. He has already stated his intention to repeal our ability to vote-by-mail and force every registered voter in the commonwealth to re-register. And there’s no telling what else he or his Secretary of State will come up with once in power.

Our reproductive rights are also at stake: **Mastriano has promised to ban abortion in all cases, with no exceptions. Even if the pregnancy is non-viable and life-threatening, such as in the case of ectopic pregnancies, his heartbeat bill would outlaw the life-saving medical procedure.**

**[Fellow activist, it’s crucial we expand the electorate in time for this election — before the far right has a chance to destroy our democracy and strip away our rights. Will you donate right now to help us register voters before it’s too late?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45699410/347095724/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220524FarRight_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiY2U2NGY4LThmZGItZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4YzMyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fWmpDPv2x2C3Lx4axgXm7TdI5BGXUT3y2Yyo_nb3hPw=)**

Even if the pregnancy is non-viable and life-threatening, such as in the case of ectopic pregnancies, his heartbeat bill would outlaw the life-saving medical procedure. = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented communities of color and immigrant communities. We will register them to vote, provide education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize people to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : GENERAL: November 8, 2022 || || || New Pennsylvania Project 717 Market Street #295 Lemoyne, PA 17043 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I'm fighting for YOU
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=5972d9ec889229bd8eedd250ce9b7acd4585c3bb2ddea2604247790ec1e53446031f89206de76a4b78a75464f64c3adc12a96fa3e9482f9cf138adf27e9a75e681d112a7b3558f3002c88c6be35101e8

Peter,

Nothing keeps me energized to fight against the radical liberals more than seeing how many people I have standing beside me.

Freedom is sweeping across Florida, and this is the greatest movement that our state has ever seen. With our state's success comes constant attacks from the far-Left Democrats and their liberal media lapdogs because they want to see me fail — but I will never stop fighting.

As Governor of Florida, I am constantly fighting on behalf of you.

I am fighting for our small businesses.

I am fighting to protect our children.

I am fighting for parental rights.

I am fighting against Big Tech.

I am fighting for patients' rights.

I am fighting to keep our communities safe.

I am fighting for free speech.

I am fighting for personal liberty.
I am fighting for our God-given rights.

I am doing this for one reason: to make Florida the freest state in the United States.

With your support I know I will continue to build on the foundation I established in my first term.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=75502c3b3b5029411ec51fc08493a840c5973e4ea3b8c70ece040eebdf16bba76b3ab3e975e256af197fd8dbd78b8a2a4fdba07257d42388ebcb31f2be565591
I need to know that you are with me. Add your name to the growing list of freedom first supporters — I can't continue this fight without you.

Thank you for your support,
Ron DeSantis

name: Giffords.org
subject: Tucker Carlson
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
“BARACK OBAMA IS COMING TO TAKE ALL OF YOUR GUNS!!!!!”
#

Friends -
“BARACK OBAMA IS COMING TO TAKE ALL OF YOUR GUNS!!!!!”
Remember that? It was a common refrain from right-wing politicians and the NRA in those days.
For years, the gun lobby has used fear and disinformation to encourage people to buy more and more guns, and to get them to rabidly oppose even the most bipartisan solutions to make our communities safer.
Now they have a new ally in the fight.
Tucker Carlson.
He’s whipping up his supporters by saying President Biden’s ghost gun regulations are “an effort to disarm people who don’t vote for the Democrats.”
It’s wrong. It’s far-fetched. It’s disinformation. It follows the same old fear-mongering playbook.
And we have to fight it.
Gabby is a gun owner, and Giffords was founded as an organization that could reach gun owners. We’re not against guns, we’re against gun violence. Anyone who says we want to ban all guns is lying.
And unless we combat this kind of disinformation, it makes change that much harder. But we can’t do it alone:
[**PLEASE contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to help Giffords continue the fight against far-right disinformation coming from Tucker Carlson and the NRA. We need your support to change our gun laws.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may22?refcode=em220524-1-30&t=1&refcode2=2041_3935704_-aefqX&akid=2041%2E3935704%2E-aefqX)

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Joe Biden’s “Ministry of Truth” should frighten you.
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60456357:64W8fMoPN:m:1:3317145305:9A65754A302997B1C6A20F20DE302846:r)

Peter,

Do you know what Joe Biden has in common with history's worst dictators?

The answer may frighten you.

All of history's biggest tyrants have created their equivalent of Joe Biden's "Ministry of Truth".

This Ministry of Truth works hand in hand with the Fake News media to determine what is "fact" and what is "disinformation". Essentially, the Leftwing media and the government merge together to decide what is fake news and what YOU are allowed to see or believe.

**Joe Biden 's move to install a taxpayer-funded propaganda machine for his radical leftwing agenda, and teaming up with the Fake News machine is a direct threat to the survival of our Republic. **

The good news is Biden's Ministry of Truth is "paused." But I'm not going to rest until it's fully destroyed and the people who proposed such a monstrosity are held accountable.

Do you know what that number means?
| | |

**115,461**
Do you know what that number means, team?
It might look random, but it’s one that means a lot to our team. It’s the number of grassroots donors who have stepped up to support my reelection campaign by giving to emails like this one.
**I’m really proud of that number, team. Because in a race that will no doubt be close, every single donation counts. Because when 115,461 people donate $3, $10, $25 dollars, it all adds up and makes an enormous difference. ---
**$72.3 million**
Now this is a number that worries me. Last quarter, Mitch McConnell’s super PAC reported that they raised $27 million and have over $72.3 million in the bank – money that will go straight to attacking me and other Democrats in tough Senate races.
**Just last week, the national Senate arm of the Republican Party announced a $9 million ad buy against me.**
$72.3 million is a lot, and taking on the GOP’s corporate special interests can sometimes feel like David versus Goliath. But this grassroots team has always stepped up when we need it most. **[_So please, will you donate $3, or whatever you can, right now to win this crucial Senate race?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45699567/347096345/-947982778?&amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk993-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTE1MTY0My05MGRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VB-cUOn6-zrvA3JgVO9UqAhgjNijVEBJUswQGtLaxJE=)**
Thank you for your support. I know we’re going to win this, one dollar and one step at a time.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

body:
