Team,

I’m reaching out to personally ask you to join me in supporting Charlie Crist’s campaign for Florida governor. I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why, but if you’re already on board with his campaign to defeat Ron DeSantis, **_[will you chip in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45699779/347097307/1828376163?amount=25&refcode=20220524_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWY0ZThhMy05MWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8M-4bjmVejXuS7RMgXBN508ztgcJG4gQs5fvNd7_8vw=)_**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45699780/347097308/1828376163?amount=25&refcode=20220524_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWY0ZThhMy05MWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8M-4bjmVejXuS7RMgXBN508ztgcJG4gQs5fvNd7_8vw=)
---
Look, team: I’ve served with Charlie Crist in Congress at the same time that Ron DeSantis was in the House. The differences couldn’t be more stark.

While Ron DeSantis voted in lockstep with Donald Trump’s radical agenda, Charlie worked to bring jobs and investment back to Florida.

While Ron DeSantis supported tax cuts for the rich and powerful, Charlie fought to build an economy that lifted up regular people.

And while Ron DeSantis and his House Republicans tried to repeal the Affordable Care Act, Charlie rose to defend the livelihoods of millions of Americans and their access to healthcare.

**So take it from me: Ron DeSantis only cares about what’s good for his politics, while Charlie cares about what’s good for the country.**

**_[But Charlie can’t win this race alone. Ron DeSantis is backed by right-wing billionaires and matching his bank account will be no easy task. So right now, I’m calling for a massive response from Democrats. Can you rush $20 to defeat DeSantis and elect Charlie Crist?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45699781/347097309/1828376163?amount=25&refcode=20220524_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWY0ZThhMy05MWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8M-4bjmVejXuS7RMgXBN508ztgcJG4gQs5fvNd7_8vw=)_**

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Do your part and help flip the PA House
body:
Hi Derek,
As Governor of Virginia, I had to veto a lot of horrible Republican bills, including restrictions on a woman's right to choose.
I know my friend, Josh Shapiro, the Democratic candidate for Governor of Pennsylvania, will stand like a brick wall in defense of women's health -- but we can go a step further -- thanks to newly drawn fair districts, Pennsylvania Democrats have an opportunity to flip their State House this year.
If Democrats flip the PA House, they'll also elect Pennsylvania's first ever Black woman as Speaker of the House in Joanna McClinton.
Can you split a contribution today between Common Good VA and the Pennsylvania House Democratic Campaign Committee and help elect Democrats in both Commonwealths? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_pahdcc?amount=20220524_CGVA_PAHDCC]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20211212_CGVA_Kelly]DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_pahdcc?amount=20220524_CGVA_PAHDCC&amount=25]

I know the folks in PA are eager to win their state house in 2022, and we're already preparing to win back the Virginia House -- so let's get going!
Thank you for your support!
- Terry McAuliffe

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathleen=20Brown=20for=20Congress?=
subject: I am outraged
body:
| |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=545781cdf1&e=4712f71bea)
---
| Friend,

It is beyond heart-breaking to hear the stories of parents driving hours to buy baby formula, only to find empty shelves.

I cannot imagine the pain of not knowing where your child’s next meal will come from.

This is why I am even more outraged by the [192 Republicans](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=44f50181c1&e=4712f71bea) who voted against the Infant Formula Supplemental Appropriations Act.

**And you guessed it – Ronny Jackson is on this list.**

We need representatives who actively work to provide tangible relief for families. [That’s exactly what I’ll do, and I need your help to make this a reality by donating to my campaign today.](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=adc3d63997&e=4712f71bea)

Ronny Jackson constantly blasts Democrats for not taking action. Then he directly hurts our hardworking families.

This is not okay. In fact, it’s horrific.

If you are as infuriated as I am, I implore you to make a donation to my campaign.

clean_body: | | | | | | Friend, It is beyond heart-breaking to hear the stories of parents driving hours to buy baby formula, only to find empty shelves. I cannot imagine the pain of not knowing where your child’s next meal will come from. This is why I am even more outraged by the who voted against the Infant Formula Supplemental Appropriations Act. And you guessed it – Ronny Jackson is on this list. We need representatives who actively work to provide tangible relief for families. Ronny Jackson constantly blasts Democrats for not taking action. Then he directly hurts our hardworking families. This is not okay. In fact, it’s horrific. If you are as infuriated as I am, I implore you to make a donation to my campaign. | "Donate Today" | Kathleen Brown | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © Kathleen for Congress, All rights reserved. name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: Exposed: Biden Ceding Power to Corrupt Globalists
body:
Biden is throwing away our sovereignty and empowering corrupt globalists | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-8853395?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

**Americans should control their healthcare, NOT globalists at the World Health Organization (WHO)**.

We just went through a pandemic where many of our personal healthcare decisions were made by government bureaucrats. Now the Biden Administration is trying to _cede power over our healthcare system_ to corrupt globalists.

A [new analysis](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=5771f953ce&e=17913c7d6d) by the Center for Renewing America exposes the Biden Administration’s latest effort to bypass Congress and give the World Health Organization, a proxy organization of the United Nations, alarming power over “public health emergencies” here in the United States.
---
|
---
| **A Threat to Our Sovereignty: Biden Empowers World Health Organization**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=bf35e452cc&e=17913c7d6d)
---

The Biden Administration recently offered up a series of amendments to the WHO’s International Health Regulations (IHR) which would, among other requirements, establish a new "Compliance Committee" that allows the WHO to declare a "Public Health Emergency of International Concern" without the agreement of the country impacted.

**Translation** : Corrupt globalists at the WHO would be given more power over “public health emergencies” here in the United States.

**Read our analysis:[WHO Expansion is Antithetical to American Self-Governance](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=cb85091147&e=17913c7d6d) **

The World Health Organization. Remember them?

The WHO gave cover to countless lies from the communist Chinese government at the start of the pandemic. They claimed there was no evidence of human to human transmission. They spoke out against international travel restrictions to and from China. They even dismissed the lab-leak theory as a conspiracy!

Now, instead of holding them accountable, President Biden wants to give the WHO more money and power!

_Make no mistake_. The final goal is global governance by the scientific elite.

**Congress must reject these amendments**.

Our detailed analysis explains how Congress can stop President Biden from ceding U.S. sovereignty to the WHO by blocking funding and requiring any international agreement be submitted to the U.S. Senate for advice and consent.

**Read our analysis:[WHO Expansion is Antithetical to American Self-Governance](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=8902cb037b&e=17913c7d6d) **

At the Center for Renewing America we’re committed to preserving American sovereignty and keeping [America free](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=dcd595377f&e=17913c7d6d) from foreign entanglements and the control of global elites. The lines are being drawn, and not surprisingly, we’re on the side of putting America first.

We’re vigilant and will keep fighting.

| [FIGHT BACK NOW](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=037c1c9d60&e=17913c7d6d "FIGHT BACK NOW")
---
| **Please consider a[generous donation](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=717331a842&e=17913c7d6d) which will help us get the word out to the American public and our allies in Congress.**

Thanks to your help, we'll keep fighting back.

Sincerely,

Russ Vought
President
Center for Renewing America
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=0052d6b8d1&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=2dd6745f45&e=17913c7d6d)

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: Team, what makes a great mayor?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
Share my podcast interview today! | | | Hi team, I am excited to share with you the The Bakari Sellers Podcast interview I recently recorded with my friend, colleague and noted political commentator, Bakari Sellers! [**Click here to listen!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/BqA3LhzOFl92KwaVoz69N1o820IF1CZXMXClxNRaI5FeOy9aei3k0e_oyNIJ6r3lPQX754Bg7v3dzjm9B0fE-rnqZBrFx_N1_oTUVRSIEeg4BTCNn3bQju5GE8UfbDBgGVfrYyqxdQe9S85SbK_BBbo0LT2wqU90IqtaNPfVhbEflY_NcTMMqhv86shURgku9rTxRywq5dCslz9urxF_dEckhOMJIzCdZCfPRKNGjfXgZPxlR5bB5Ls4Oik6LWBM1Fix3ml5YuBUJHQ1JVIGb-cBHuyieSHDMXF9vN7VuZlXDHxis0LHjdxJJfpDfcd7Tg52vY5mPBpF55SdyVpypGkNCOHazYX1K3PbyBJ53zhHbg_A2Fy1CBMlk_bH0-Ur/3mb/w6ZoplbmTAeFNC4h7q1--w/h0/lXbYPBe_kbmxwRa9zvn7mlh8MZccMP1Rc8i-K3N8CNE) During our interview, Bakari asked me what I believe is most important to being a great mayor for our city. What I tell him is what I believe deeply in my heart, that a great mayor needs to have a passionate commitment to community service. I share a little about how I came to that commitment in my own life and give an example of how that commitment showed up for the citizens of Houston following hurricane Harvey while I was serving as an At-Large City Council Member.******[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/BqA3LhzOFl92KwaVoz69N1o820IF1CZXMXClxNRaI5FeOy9aei3k0e_oyNIJ6r3lPQX754Bg7v3dzjm9B0fE-rnqZBrFx_N1_oTUVRSIEeg4BTCNn3bQju5GE8UfbDBgCgPmfXPhOQ929sWy0UJnqls7vWbz8htLdQKmq_svFKZ9lsM7erTKPYf1op5ZaszOz-8RrDXa5RotCuTC3OcQii0ALNnx0l4J-gvrmSQL7BdZkOmsvBVAgQVwBzlpP715H4mRv2mvL9UEq3mOS0bDZnEk1msjGAPraKEMm8xc2zTFSFScW_InOjVvMkI_wNFuAdRJsk3sygeLofXj-2hYyyC5qVMJPSEHww-NeE3nLI2m42rW0Oj3aVpefGZg_Vwi/3mb/w6ZoplbmTAeFNC4h7q1--w/h1/-9M-PhH8Ch65Rn2Yd6OerlpLObJu_MVpiIIpIFttBqc)
** We also discuss how important it is for a great mayor to understand how to balance focusing clearly on the macro issues of running the fourth largest city in America with a hands-on dedication to serving the needs of all our individual citizens around issues like public safety, disaster preparedness and economic opportunity. I emphasize my belief that it is critical for a great mayor to be committed not only to a thriving city operations but to thriving residents, as well.
Please listen to this podcast to learn more about my qualifications and the commitments I will bring to serving _you_ as **Houston’s next Mayor**. And I encourage you to share the link to this podcast with your friends, family, colleagues, and neighbors so that they can join us in creating our best future together. [**Please contribute $25 today, team to become part of the movement we are building together!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wLx0bZSuyTdTYS4amt8f-HTYfxPRNklx_hKkWO1VGWW8u5c00MtUNLsm_iOPUbee2IW8hKuLVI9FXkrnlnMSO0bMteNpotXnKcLtkwIX5knydsq6XHl-AEbz_oQwCnnNNUwfqehpJjoeQYVEdUqlKV_0bP3BpQx_hwWkH7aIQGfBNjEg5vU9KY2MXdbcUyO7ixItxBpfWrgKbx0dYjzEoH2mV0qFDAa7DjDntipAX0njk1tcH6mKJkH2_6YaaRPyPu-kv5B8F0UYOQk7Uqgqjtk34osQW7Z8fsja4zXW6mxJjSzj-c5_j5n8CYxblveQHD5hlb9FDqQqk75hlOf6hqoeYFzce7LX9wAxss-_oL2Q/3mb/w6ZoplbmTAeFNC4h7q1--w/h2/8kZXyBnfQnGf0-SW1f5Vrfxv8KtF_nNdFRGV_IYWp5w) ******Listen to the full Podcast** : **[Amanda Edwards with Bakari Sellers](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/BqA3LhzOFl92KwaVoz69N1o820IF1CZXMXClxNRaI5FeOy9aei3k0e_oyNIJ6r3lPQX754Bg7v3dzjm9B0fE-gSl4rvlecmrPaUE_xpBf5NIqJhXWyG-EU-9f0UNDDNggT9qWRek29-9ovN-I5vpmXeVyYCMBPTR60N28KxtIHkf6Az4N_qR1YGqWYMcCS8nqvY3hdY5B2wawHLTdbpAmYUPPIvcEOipKmRjRMK2w5jGBsRqWYPFlMFwQGPd3OFUpI2LRUkv3CWcbeYsX1argTnmxdA7rsEDsboddZsj0e8XsqiQEeu93vdjonPGoDE8GcrI9kT59nwCgxfZcIFTDfD4aakbYVN4ywaD8wqMqIUUhbeTIxM7A6cEqusPrWGm/3mb/w6ZoplbmTAeFNC4h7q1--w/h3/g-6Q--_sXLjhVM6Ec71nrZd0r3aSLn0z47C35iPPik8).** Thank you, Amanda K. name: Josh, me (2)
subject: forwarding Nikki’s email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki For Congress P

Making sure you didn’t miss this

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Best-Selling Author Endorses Erik Aadland
body:
Also a Colorado Legislator
| | | |
---
|
---
|
# Representative Rob Witwer
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---|---
|
May 23, 2022) Today, Erik Aadland, CD7 Republican candidate for Congress, announces a formal endorsement from former Colorado state Representative Rob Witwer.
Rob Witwer was a Republican member of the Colorado House of Representatives, representing House District 25, which encompasses most of western Jefferson County, Colorado. Witwer was appointed to the Colorado General Assembly in 2005 by vacancy committee and won the general election in 2006.
Witwer worked closely with legislators of both political parties to address Colorado's public policy needs, including modernization of the state's business laws, wildfire preparedness, alignment of K-12 assessments with global standards, and advancing renewable energy. During his legislative tenure, Witwer passed 85% of sponsored bills into law with bipartisan support.
Witwer is co-author of the best-selling and must-read book "The Blueprint: How the Democrats Won Colorado." The Rocky Mountain News called Witwer one of the "Rock Stars" of the Colorado GOP, and National Journal named him one of its "stars to watch in the future." Witwer is currently a Senior V.P. at Onward Energy, a national leader in the clean energy transition.
| In a statement sent to the Aadland campaign, Witwer said:
"America needs a reset, and Erik Aadland is the guy to lead the way. No stranger to serving his country, Erik will bring positive, proactive vision to Congress. Inflation, crime, and school closures have knocked America out of its groove, Erik gets that, and he has the intelligence and commitment to help lead this great nation back to preeminence. It's time to right the ship, Erik is the guy to do it."
---
|
---
|
---
| "I am extremely grateful for Rob's support. His accomplishments as a state representative, political strategist, author, and advocate for the energy sector makes his endorsement particularly meaningful to me. He was a strong voice for conservative activism in the State House and is still fighting for conservative values and common sense leadership in the public and private arenas. I am humbled to receive his endorsement and will not let him down as CD7's next congressman."
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | [Send Erik your feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n2M7dAaYMvvVGAzNg75J3y7sy8ymqw_Prdpdwp4x2Tt9XWNIMBqlOgYD96rK3IZhTnQRqlQRQ2fw4AXwv4QImLigbqf1_ooPkAJXmNqCa-7rnKaag7gHpMaze6kRbtaYSiNYyWaeZUzsFw5BNiNd5N3JXXt5DnaTDu31PhOQbDvhSdYIsP8b8ju6TzAua28RoIyyYQEtLI1Rsdv_azDfIUiGVhnW61USxDNKUjw5QzIRrkrpqls7iMpV2cCFrSQX&c=MJbtteB2gylCkjRK1Dwy7vt251KNp0YhjmJJwfhToln-tV6EgT2hoA==&ch=F6gYoEnwm6UPIdK88CfA5G62FhoFVmHiyG6qRJ3uWE4pxV_25AvM-w==)

## About Erik
---
| |
---
| Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.
---
|
---
|
## About Aadland For Congress
---
| |

| Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign. clean_body: Also a Colorado Legislator | | | | | | Representative Rob Witwer | | | | | ---|--- | May 23, 2022) Today, Erik Aadland, CD7 Republican candidate for Congress, announces a formal endorsement from former Colorado state Representative Rob Witwer. Rob Witwer was a Republican member of the Colorado House of Representatives, representing House District 25, which encompasses most of western Jefferson County, Colorado. Witwer was appointed to the Colorado General Assembly in 2005 by vacancy committee and won the general election in 2006. Witwer worked closely with legislators of both political parties to address Colorado's public policy needs, including modernization of the state's business laws, wildfire preparedness, alignment of K-12 assessments with global standards, and advancing renewable energy. During his legislative tenure, Witwer passed 85% of sponsored bills into law with bipartisan support. Witwer is co-author of the best-selling and must-read book "The Blueprint: How the Democrats Won Colorado." The Rocky Mountain News called Witwer one of the "Rock Stars" of the Colorado GOP, and National Journal named him one of its "stars to watch in the future." Witwer is currently a Senior V.P. at Onward Energy, a national leader in the clean energy transition. | In a statement sent to the Aadland campaign, Witwer said: "America needs a reset, and Erik Aadland is the guy to lead the way. No stranger to serving his country, Erik will bring positive, proactive vision to Congress. Inflation, crime, and school closures have knocked America out of its groove, Erik gets that, and he has the intelligence and commitment to help lead this great nation back to preeminence. It's time to right the ship, Erik is the guy to do it." | | | "I am extremely grateful for Rob's support. His accomplishments as a state representative, political strategist, author, and advocate for the energy sector makes his endorsement particularly meaningful to me. He was a strong voice for conservative activism in the State House and is still fighting for conservative values and common sense leadership in the public and private arenas. I am humbled to receive his endorsement and will not let him down as CD7's next congressman." | | | | | == | | | About Erik | | | Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children. | | About Aadland For Congress | | | Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive; no generations of beer barons or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. Volunteers and professionals began joining the cause to help send Erik to Washington in March of 2021. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of political pundits, professional people, friends and neighbors. You can stand with Erik by contributing to our cause. subject: I'm Heartbroken...
body:
Our Nation Is Hurting Another HORRIFIC tragedy took place today in America. A wicked 18 year walked into a Texas elementary and murdered 14 children
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=10125965.6187.1.d6f5aedee7917b0105197fbf986c8aa7)

## Our Nation Is Hurting
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=10125965.6188.1.8cc37c1cde13d696f09e5a0d62d5d885)
---
Another **HORRIFIC** tragedy took place today in America.
A wicked 18 year walked into a Texas elementary and murdered 14 children and 1 teacher.
It is hard to imagine this type of evil but it is an evil we face in this nation.
America _does not need_ GUN REFORM but we need **CITIZEN REFORM**.
We are in a spiritual battle and we need a **spiritual awakening** in this country.
America does not have a "_gun problem_ " but we have a **SIN PROBLEM**.
It is time to bring prayer back into the public schools and the public square.
We also need to arm our public school teachers to help prevent these type of awful tragedies.
Prayer for these families, pray for Texas and pray for America.
We really need Jesus to touch our country.
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

subject: Re: the deranged terrorist on the train
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
My boss asked me to follow up with you today to make sure you had a moment to read the email he sent you a couple of months back. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=663ba5bfbfd94eb2b825245450c4746c&_e=0LX0xpe9Db40qroHIr3WJMUd-AyLVaDjLjeWk6PNg3eDjCblEsSCfqQE0ebCctECGy73fuv8vY3oPVRHr5P-F-7hT_MT1PNKuH45ccCBE20gD9Fyg-IrZo3QQsrKRCotJg-ZCL2MFx3EDkl9Ry_tkY5skL2-uAMJnETMyS9vogC-JOD8bQ_ztreb4yJ3P1-dnG2s_AsjimPb99mJar81bRW3C9ZGlKzXl3a6Fe1j1EMJuam3Qet-Nd117YLDKEmHJZhmnWHt2tXif_r_7tV_XPVxUnTNggwwA9IlykidSQ5WYKhePeORR2vR5WtwwA5risJ4uGGhXfUyw0_JHt9jOTVUu6MUsX9JAvoba3C9v_trzx13clB9eJvCTN78Jj_bsRnDXyOrRLVW7CHUjrORN98kGMtT_QxYnSIbFy5pPxjRX9oMy5EQ5_5MD80hPbVzTddItmBvnwh2rUR25ELTqD7Z0_093T51zJjOkGouyT8%3D)
---

Hi there - my name is Ross Purgason and I'm the campaign manager for Republican Alek Skarlatos, the Republican nominee for U.S. House in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. **I'm fowarding you an email he sent several months back in hopes you might have time to read it today**.

Thank you for your time!

Peter,

Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st 2021 marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

**I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe**. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=663ba5bfbfd94eb2b825245450c4746c&_e=0LX0xpe9Db40qroHIr3WJMUd-AyLVaDjLjeWk6PNg3eDjCblEsSCfqQE0ebCctECGy73fuv8vY3oPVRHr5P-F-7hT_MT1PNKuH45ccCBE20gD9Fyg-IrZo3QQsrKRCotJg-ZCL2MFx3EDkl9Ry_tkY5skL2-uAMJnETMyS9vogC-JOD8bQ_ztreb4yJ3P1-dnG2s_AsjimPb99mJar81bRW3C9ZGlKzXl3a6Fe1j1EMJuam3Qet-Nd117YLDKEmHJZhmnWHt2tXif_r_7tV_XACBruvqTv1PVYwab74U6NoT0d3HoeXzDKr5ZMOADO8tBmlyF6NXmg1pv90dSMMDnfESIlYosDAHIHtWJXlWuFofeh8XDXiQtofIXwiIyW6KegLPRaMr-vuhTYfZUB8drhc2MglyubTIlwx0_GyS75lm4fbIq-vEy0BUHcqJ0MIMEhC-eo48bCyIHi3nRqwJvNCYj-F-xHFdjylx5aifcyA%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=663ba5bfbfd94eb2b825245450c4746c&_e=0LX0xpe9Db40qroHIr3WJMUd-AyLVaDjLjeWk6PNg3eDjCblEsSCfqQE0ebCctECGy73fuv8vY3oPVRHr5P-F-7hT_MT1PNKuH45ccCBE20gD9Fyg-IrZo3QQsrKRCotJg-ZCL2MFx3EDkl9Ry_tkY5skL2-uAMJnETMyS9vogC-JOD8bQ_ztreb4yJ3P1-dnG2s_AsjimPb99mJar81bRW3C9ZGlKzXl3a6Fe1j1EMJuam3Qet-Nd117YLDKEmHJZhmnWHt2tXif_r_7tV_XOTf2jsJVp35fs7F_X93ixzXEXh_KZIRDwPQA4Pqf7QbdRrNpfJ3-mGPf6GJrhm7P9B8J2leVG8eoX--xpge7WK8uSzg3CpIp56F1zYlTJ2E41Pe6kewKBQPN5jbcOfJc51BXpXyuvC1RtI5vBKRZp0vM6XtSUFCZwYRPHmSf-49Fv-ngQKpTf3SEKBBG7VL_3lwDkYCpRoc83BhWknDOFM%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. clean_body: My boss asked me to follow up with you today to make sure you had a moment to read the email he sent you a couple of months back. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Hi there - my name is Ross Purgason and I'm the campaign manager for Republican Alek Skarlatos, the Republican nominee for U.S. House in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. I'm fowarding you an email he sent several months back in hopes you might have time to read it today. Thank you for your time! Peter, Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes... August 21 st 2021 marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever. I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist. This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream. Right now, Democrats are... Opening and destroying our borders. They are granting dangerous amnesty that will flood every corner of America. Raising our taxes like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable. Defunding the police, leading to a surge in violent crime Erasing historical figures from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln Teetering on the edge of a dangerous foreign policy crisis These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. They only care about their own radical agenda. The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.** My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. Thank you very much, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. This is it, folks.

Peter, since the beginning of the COVID nightmare I have been asking the tough questions.
* When did Dr. Fauci and others in our government first know about COVID-19?
* How much did our government fund the Wuhan labs who probably created the pandemic?
* How much illegal and immoral "research" was funded by taxpayer dollars?
* And what did they do to hide it all?

Now, it's very clear the bureaucracy will not tell us the truth. No matter what "investigations" they're doing on their own. _That 's why I'm stepping up to make sure it never happens again._ Just last week, the Senate approved a motion I introduced to ban taxpayer-funded gain-of-function experiments in China. **The bureaucrats in our overgrown government HATE this and they 'll do anything to stop me. Will you chip in to help me stand strong and put an end to this nonsense?**__

body:
we’ll break it down for you
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45700646/347101233/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3277-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzZhMDZjNS05M2RiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q58BiRaTlMwe0K9IZqb8JlrQX3WVzXorMwsRT_JqYqY=)
Friend, we know there’s a lot going on right now, so we’ll break it down for you:
**_FIRST,_** CNN called Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip, and The Miami Times even reported that Val Demings is gaining ground on Marco Rubio.
**_THEN,_** this powerful grassroots team stepped up and helped Val Demings become one of the highest fundraising Florida Senate candidates in _history._
**_NOW,_** top Democratic strategists like James Carville are calling this "a race to watch" and declaring that our "momentum is building."
Val Demings is rapidly closing the polling gap between herself and Marco Rubio, but the GOP and outside groups are determined to buy this seat and the Senate at any cost. With Republicans already running vicious ads to defeat her – even attacking her law enforcement career – Val Demings needs more resources to maintain her SURGING momentum and compete with Rubio.

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Share your thoughts on American energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z15p1a05108e7s1hvjvarf64nvvj8srrklt8hq9g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uhhm1cpkm2qmdd76m1qb2o5k6lq67d9jmuqnctr3c9qe6cpgsgpr1pb3mtij8dtnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmapm4o3mc1j7coljc1jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5cpgm8o70spg649fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1kg06ltibqdelcbuntvmus0qv16m4k0h7esuv10_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5i61o76c1h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z45slsj82fop7g5hbp5n38n4kl7pqp0sf8s9v5h8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5i61o76c1h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbtap1tqjbpe02o508t6q23pflp80klh7a3eo4v0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5i61o76c1h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z13pgbas977qt1c5lrg6sonq14ae1hsqvqpv48pg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5i61o72cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp6eob1ecrrcdr26oobcd5jeho78t5hm2q36odlm5h6eor1eep6eo32c9pr1cb0sv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666pb6oj0epg6ctj0mdiefc5lclp2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6fhqoeo1rq4j3ou60ihdjnrdvtoo8ea1vqlegbg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5i61o72cjh2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zt6rkmm2fp2nv1eds1r7a80ioc36beqa85kedf28_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5i61o72cjh2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zd9gpdpdn8tgau484rcn17ap9pdrhdvbtoi8frko_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5i61o72cjh2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zai9dhlit40afsoqn9d5upbd6666d8uan59np1j0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5i61o72cjh2bs)**
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5vtiel7ea96ue7b6p00p1ufc4b6r99g76460i9o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5i61o72cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: IRENE: ELECTION DAY

name: Doug White
subject: We must rethink housing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
**It’s time to rethink housing.** Let me explain:

Right now, Washingtonians – and Americans across the country – are facing a housing crisis. Housing costs are skyrocketing and availability is close to zero. Homelessness is affecting too many of our friends and neighbors. This crisis is putting a strain on our families, our communities, and our economy.

The cost of inaction is far too high. We need to move past the policies that created this mess – it’s time to rethink housing policy, increase the building of new dwellings, and lower rents for working families.

[Will you take our Housing Survey and share _your_ thoughts with me today? We’ve all seen the reality of the housing crisis – I need to know where you stand on this critical issue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45700770/347102031/-1659491540?refcode=DW_EM_PT_90DO_220524_1_1&refcode2=e01eb66a-95db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&contactdata=D7RU%2FXImGWNO2f64RQqf7Y2csNHORBcH%2B0QSA4cdfA0iI8G7klWQWk5K05zxnZT6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDFlYjY2YS05NWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hG3FH-1Z-B6doQ8E5u0ZvCSYG2eKMLrk3J5UzWQ7PAw=&emci=518e36bf-e9da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=e01eb66a-95db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=7651992) | | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45700771/347102032/-1659491540?refcode=DW_EM_PT_90DO_220524_1_1&refcode2=e01eb66a-95db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&contactdata=D7RU%2FXImGWNO2f64RQqf7Y2csNHORBcH%2B0QSA4cdfA0iI8G7klWQWk5K05zxnZT6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDFlYjY2YS05NWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hG3FH-1Z-B6doQ8E5u0ZvCSYG2eKMLrk3J5UzWQ7PAw=&emci=518e36bf-e9da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=e01eb66a-95db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=7651992)**
---
Thanks so much for sharing your thoughts with me today. I’m looking forward to reading your responses.

Doug

| PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS

Doug White for Congress
PO Box 9674
Yakima, WA 98909
United States

clean_body: | | It’s time to rethink housing. Let me explain: Right now, Washingtonians – and Americans across the country – are facing a housing crisis. Housing costs are skyrocketing and availability is close to zero. Homelessness is affecting too many of our friends and neighbors. This crisis is putting a strain on our families, our communities, and our economy. The cost of inaction is far too high. We need to move past the policies that created this mess – it’s time to rethink housing policy, increase the building of new dwellings, and lower rents for working families. | | Thanks so much for sharing your thoughts with me today. I’m looking forward to reading your responses. Doug | PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS Doug White for Congress PO Box 9674 Yakima, WA 98909 United States Doug White is running to represent Washington’s 4th Congressional District in Congress. Friend, Our team has been hard at work gathering petition signatures for the last few months. In order to flip FL-19 blue, we have to get as many verified petitions as possible. ** ** We want to make sure that we have all of our bases covered. We may not know what will happen next, or if we will get the correct amount of verified petitions. We do know that we can be prepared for our next steps. ** ** It's been a lot of long hours, and with the nature of this district, we know that anything can happen. If you want to see FL-19 flip in 2022 and send a Democrat to Washington DC - help us make sure we have Plan A, B, and C ready to send Cindy to Congress!

clean_body: | | Friend, Our team has been hard at work gathering petition signatures for the last few months. In order to flip FL-19 blue, we have to get as many verified petitions as possible. We want to make sure that we have all of our bases covered. We may not know what will happen next, or if we will get the correct amount of verified petitions. We do know that we can be prepared for our next steps. It's been a lot of long hours, and with the nature of this district, we know that anything can happen. If you want to see FL-19 flip in 2022 and send a Democrat to Washington DC - help us make sure we have Plan A, B, and C ready to send Cindy to Congress! Thank you for all of your hard work! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: If you are unable to donate, can you support our movement by or ? [The American Conservative](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=c1b24858de45416b92db4036c3b82412&_e=_kQpK3CiUFhtGBSnWN7dCEFGhhgJa8QK3UBWhHkcDCAz4UUxxaVLoC_tGRDjlDMAzDoFyHPIPUkXN_kxYexr4JUN7duDbBwBWYCgrsOQvvI-vXDjT-NrkKFiOJD6FBKwZgGit0zlr0nnaLC6iPe_kzTB5Foz8V5IeMfpscAuHDRQYqImEKiMEfof-ydJak-zliX4dNyHk_mSeqjHZh0LPL0bSe5mys0kGu-mWIVz6HsatGIMt7kAw5WCa0doD_cnJ63vpwwcseTNmE0Rrfjj4KlR2eEDNpFCCinKmXugW5by6bn9CBeR3fDXStrlyhEwU4wkpmrj-Xr27QYmWW3Ktc2se433-Pe7WJnc5kDdKwe0ymejt_SK-Ad9apYoO9sI)

"A letter that Salvatore Cordileone, the Catholic Archbishop of San Francisco, sent to Nancy Pelosi:

To the Speaker of the House of Representatives of the United States Congress Nancy Pelosi

The Second Vatican Council, in its Decree on the Church in the Modem World, Gaudium et spes, reiterated the Church’s ancient and consistent teaching that “from the first moment of conception life must be guarded with the greatest care while abortion and infanticide are unspeakable crimes” (n. 51). Christians have, indeed, always upheld the dignity of human life in every stage, especially the most vulnerable, beginning with life in the womb. His Holiness, Pope Francis, in keeping with his predecessors, has likewise been quite clear and emphatic in teaching on the dignity of human life in the womb."

body:
The stakes are clear. Americans realize their democracy has tools to save their rights — and they are using them! | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45701095/347103570/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzI0ZjU2MC05N2RiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J7swVZ2pXF6QrpqjG7mlxJCI70aC8aFqHDQvqBESGgo=&emci=0221c341-65d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=7c24f560-97db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=561582) | Team, When the Supreme Court overturns _Roe v. Wade_ this summer, it will be up to the states to ensure there are policies in place to protect patients and providers. **And the states are responding _now_.** The campaign we helped organize in **Michigan** to put abortion rights on the ballot is inspiring campaigns by and for voters all across the country. _RIGHT NOW_ → advocates and activists in **California, Ohio, Vermont, and Washington** are all also considering similar measures (!!) subject: Sen. Tom Cotton Endorses Nick De Gregorio
body:
Press Release | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=31104c58a7&u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=4af08f7a1f)
---
| |
---
| | **PRESS RELEASE**
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
---
**CONTACT:**
press@nickfornj.com
---
|
# Sen. Tom Cotton Endorses Nick De Gregorio
_GOP leader says De Gregorio has the "right experience"_
---
| **FAIR LAWN - **Today, Nick De Gregorio, a Marine Veteran who served in both Iraq and Afghanistan, and Republican Candidate for Congress in New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District, announced that he had received an endorsement from Senator Tom Cotton (R-AR). Cotton served as an Army officer in Iraq with the 101st Airborne and in Afghanistan with a Provincial Reconstruction Team.

“Nick is the strong, conservative fighter we need in Congress to restore American values for our children. Fifth District families are tired of Josh Gottheimer making empty promises while he supports a radical liberal agenda that empties our wallets, opens our borders, and kicks parents out of the classroom. Having led hundreds of Marines overseas in combat, Nick has both the right experience to make sound decisions in Congress and the integrity to stand up for what is right.” - **Senator Tom Cotton**

"I could not be more grateful to have the support of a true leader who has seen tough fights both on the battlefield and in Congress. I look forward to working with Senator Cotton as a colleague in the House to strengthen America's position in the world and reverse the disastrous effects of the Biden-Gottheimer Agenda on Fifth District families." -**Nick De Gregorio **
---
|
---
| CLICK [HERE](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=3f0d3d7449&e=31104c58a7) TO DOWNLOAD A HI-RES PHOTO OF NICK. **About Nick ** _Nick De Gregorio is a lifelong resident of Bergen County, raised in both Glen Rock and Ridgewood. _ _At the age of 16, Nick was sitting in a high school classroom in Oradell when terrorists struck the World Trade Center just 12 miles away. It was then that he made the first adult decision of his life: to serve his country. _ _Nick answered his country’s call to serve in the wake of the 9/11 attacks, and he joined the United States Marine Corps. Over the course of nine years, he deployed four times, fighting in both Iraq and Afghanistan. It was the honor of his lifetime to serve his country. _ _Nick lives in Fair Lawn with his wife Emily, who during the COVID-19 pandemic worked as a nurse on the front lines, along with their two children Siena Reagan and Luca Cordell. He received a Bachelor’s degree from Bucknell University and MastersDegrees from Georgetown University’s McDonough School of Business and the Walsh School of Foreign Service, with distinction._
---

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj7ab3a1irjhvunkct80i5updvbtho30j903m938_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5h60or4cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s37ccrrccdgs1r38orm6hojfd5l6krj0sjle4qrbcthelirecblcpq3cpr165gefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p36phlc2pm0ptie5j30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuh51m50k1kject8o22daunma5c48jr9j9p4sg80_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5h60or4cph2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z89ek67d01ani93mefcfjvvvnid4758mbbidtvs8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5h60or4cph2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8koju1lp6u0ja18747ibeh78bm76qddqte54cqo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5h60or4cph2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

And now POLITICO reported that they’re planning $125 million in ads to attack vulnerable Democrats — and with a razor-thin margin in the House, every single seat counts right now. Flipping this district blue and kicking Mark Green out of Congress would be a key victory in keeping the House in Democratic hands after the election. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Who knows what will happen if Republicans gain control and are able to fight for their far-right, radical agenda. The right to vote, the right to an abortion, LGBTQ rights, and even our freedom of democracy will be at risk. That’s why every single race matters. Thank you for everything you do for the progressive movement. Team Odessa | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

Friends,
Welcome back to the “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.” Harriet and team have been busy gearing up for President Trump’s Save Wyoming rally, while also continuing to distribute our political signs across the state. It is wonderful to receive your photographs of the “Hageman for Congress” signs. The reaction has been so positive. We are incredibly thankful to everyone for your hard work-in locating high-traffic areas, and physically installing the 4x8’s. We will have a new shipment of signs soon and will be contacting you for another round of distribution.
If you would like a small or large sign please contact Jake at [_Jake@hagemanforwyoming.com_](mailto:Jake@hagemanforwyoming.com?subject=&body=).
As we move into parade season, please let us know if you would like to help us with putting together a float or a group of parade walkers in your area to represent Hageman for Wyoming!

For Wyoming,
Team Hageman

**In the News **
Below is an article about NCLA, the non-profit law firm where Harriet has been working for the past three years fighting to protect our constitutional rights and to rein in the unlawful administrative state.
**The Administrative State Suffers a Body Blow in Ruling From the Fifth Circuit** A.R. Hoffman Saturday, May 21, 2022

Jarkesy’s fate is unclear, as the SEC has not yet decided its course of action. What does seem clear, however, is that this is an area of law in ferment.
---
---
The scholar who has been in the van against the administrative state, Philip Hamburger, tells the Sun he wants the Supreme Court to read the work of a Czech writer and statesman, Vaclav Havel. He quotes Mr. Havel’s imperative that we are obligated to “live in truth” and that “it is time for the Supreme Court to do just that when it comes to administrative law and the Constitution."
That time drew closer this week, when the United States Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit ruled against the Securities and Exchange Commission in Jarkesy v. SEC. In a 2-to-1 decision, the circuit riders held that numerous practices of the commission run afoul of the Constitution.
Mr. Hamburger, who teaches at Columbia and founded a new civil rights organization to challenge the administrative state, calls that outcome “a profound repudiation of both administrative rulemaking and adjudication.” It is a sign, he believes, that “the administrative state is beginning to crumble.”
Jarkesy turned on the processes employed by the SEC in penalty proceedings. The Fifth Circuit panel of judges held that those procedures were deficient in three crucial areas. The first is the constitutional promise to a trial by jury.
In vacating a conviction for securities fraud, Judge Jennifer Walker Elrod’s majority opinion held that the use of an administrative law judge, rather than a federal judge, to adjudicate the case violated the Seventh Amendment right to a jury trial.
While Congress is empowered to forswear jury trials in suits that do not derive from common law origins, charges of fraud like those here do derive from that source and thus cannot be adjudicated by administrative law judges rather than juries of one’s peers.
This distinction is drawn in the text of the Seventh Amendment itself, which mandates that the “right of trial by jury shall be preserved” only in “suits at common law.” This excludes suits that emerge from what is called “equity,” a once separate but since merged body of civil law that includes remedies like injunctions and specific performance rather than monetary damages.
In asserting the common law right to a jury trial, the court wrote that “Congress cannot change the nature of a right, thereby circumventing the Seventh Amendment, by simply giving the keys to the SEC to do the vindicating.” Bureaucratic noise cannot obscure the constitutional signal.
Next, the court faulted Congress for failing to provide an “intelligible principle” to curate which cases would be heard by administrative law judges and which would head to traditional federal courts. This dereliction of duty meant that the SEC was unduly empowered to decide an essentially legislative question.
Lastly, the riders of the Fifth Circuit held that the administrative law judges enjoyed a protection against being fired that was too robust, being that the board empowered to terminate them for cause consisted of members who were also fireable only for cause.
This double layer was ruled unconstitutional because it impinged on the president’s ability to fulfill his constitutional mandate to “take Care that the Laws be faithfully executed,” which courts have read as granting the commander in chief leeway to fire officers of the executive branch.
Jarkesy’s fate is unclear, as the SEC has not yet decided its course of action. What does seem clear, however, is that this is an area of law in ferment. Another case from the riders of the Fifth Circuit that challenges SEC procedures, Cochran v. SEC, was recently granted certiorari by the Supreme Court.
Professor Hamburger, whose not-for-profit law firm has helped win so many cases that the Sun headlined one editorial, “[ _The Hamburger Court_](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfrAzOgqdt5ERQBac5JGX6zeXDpn0Vr6scB93TMdB1mc27GyVRQdYezj54d1caadfeNUq-2BnssfKBlOacTSjUWBQg-3DhjVy_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz659BAsK-2B-2FwpaN4pRorkIKwDXZVoZtxDSdmF-2BVqqRCdFfyuWOS4NAOAZA2IWkukinR-2FGgLp213CL-2FnbJyDkYJmKvzVjCc1PsDIgiX4QTQ2HMUAipTJjJb6asOC1P4ZqqxSKu4FdcMVzvKLZwg0LkP59SJ-2BVEhL0-2FmwZTYRPaSkSxCbzbx6FKttkUxfk00TwDS8NzqCkfcNzrfWlRp2uMdwk-2FD9LlVA62VeU8-2B3JuTjWd5tTE5rVzr4QNUi53KitbSOO9x-2BFzR-2FZMncepMBrCA-2BKanrXgBwd4R3TpHSfkAMU0XVQzLL9Wovx4lyV0-2Bc-2FWohnfs-2FXMxz0pvNvIWaizFHazOzEmT5wQvVqS9nX7jQFQAn8DVY1ig42mwDtBXJtYKXJJiWYzMC2Ih8z6L9-2FPRM4CsiogpqMxj6x8BK0V3Y7xhyFRpBHwE-2BDKVIXh2GnfaDCLEwCPf09dPUmzTxJ1j1ouDwUIQaDDb8mctyE6HKAbLN-2FfjfAtjGolMvp-2BwsbCs7zX-2FuMVAHHGedaJwNOYeQ7lkSbH-2BV7RLa4wwtxabD3f60v0exPCTJHTUjp1KXtTCTR5UCTWabI5Md1LvZ61KaKsVMk4o-2FUTRvLtNm6Q2eH7PGgU92nFegbF6EdkSm6PWqjmzm9WHPdGP9cwy-2BEtFGwF4y6aj18MprmU5THGRrqEKAQTNiyasWZE1JKp0XlMA4sd5-2FvldsyL-2BCePHvRGBxydZE3Pk-2B67ZxsNdvf87d6FvW9RTuWU9fYMCtx-2FssR-2F3xf35Zk-2F8c4bznlpuwO145glbLdhSIpXVTUU8uD9gmnNb-2FRCzuhTwKi3QivHmX2qfW),” observed that “we are seeing lower courts push back against Supreme Court doctrine. It is a reminder that correction of error comes not only from above but also from below.” With this latest case, partisans of the administrative can feel the ground shaking beneath their feet.

clean_body: | | | | Friends, Welcome back to the “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.” Harriet and team have been busy gearing up for President Trump’s Save Wyoming rally, while also continuing to distribute our political signs across the state. It is wonderful to receive your photographs of the “Hageman for Congress” signs. The reaction has been so positive. We are incredibly thankful to everyone for your hard work-in locating high-traffic areas, and physically installing the 4x8’s. We will have a new shipment of signs soon and will be contacting you for another round of distribution. If you would like a small or large sign please contact Jake at mailto:Jake@hagemanforwyoming.com?subject=&body=. As we move into parade season, please let us know if you would like to help us with putting together a float or a group of parade walkers in your area to represent Hageman for Wyoming! For Wyoming, Team Hageman Around Wyoming! Harriet had a great event in Cheyenne. There were lots of new faces and good discussion from the crowd. Views From the Road It is a typical spring and the Hageman family has been attending brandings throughout Goshen and Niobrara Counties. Here are a few photos of the 6th generation of the Wyoming Hagemans. We start them young (but we don’t think they would have it any other way)! In the News Below is an article about NCLA, the non-profit law firm where Harriet has been working for the past three years fighting to protect our constitutional rights and to rein in the unlawful administrative state. The Administrative State Suffers a Body Blow in Ruling From the Fifth Circuit A.R. Hoffman Saturday, May 21, 2022 Jarkesy’s fate is unclear, as the SEC has not yet decided its course of action. What does seem clear, however, is that this is an area of law in ferment. The scholar who has been in the van against the administrative state, Philip Hamburger, tells the Sun he wants the Supreme Court to read the work of a Czech writer and statesman, Vaclav Havel. He quotes Mr. Havel’s imperative that we are obligated to “live in truth” and that “it is time for the Supreme Court to do just that when it comes to administrative law and the Constitution." That time drew closer this week, when the United States Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit ruled against the Securities and Exchange Commission in Jarkesy v. SEC. In a 2-to-1 decision, the circuit riders held that numerous practices of the commission run afoul of the Constitution. Mr. Hamburger, who teaches at Columbia and founded a new civil rights organization to challenge the administrative state, calls that outcome “a profound repudiation of both administrative rulemaking and adjudication.” It is a sign, he believes, that “the administrative state is beginning to crumble.” Jarkesy turned on the processes employed by the SEC in penalty proceedings. The Fifth Circuit panel of judges held that those procedures were deficient in three crucial areas. The first is the constitutional promise to a trial by jury. In vacating a conviction for securities fraud, Judge Jennifer Walker Elrod’s majority opinion held that the use of an administrative law judge, rather than a federal judge, to adjudicate the case violated the Seventh Amendment right to a jury trial. While Congress is empowered to forswear jury trials in suits that do not derive from common law origins, charges of fraud like those here do derive from that source and thus cannot be adjudicated by administrative law judges rather than juries of one’s peers. This distinction is drawn in the text of the Seventh Amendment itself, which mandates that the “right of trial by jury shall be preserved” only in “suits at common law.” This excludes suits that emerge from what is called “equity,” a once separate but since merged body of civil law that includes remedies like injunctions and specific performance rather than monetary damages. In asserting the common law right to a jury trial, the court wrote that “Congress cannot change the nature of a right, thereby circumventing the Seventh Amendment, by simply giving the keys to the SEC to do the vindicating.” Bureaucratic noise cannot obscure the constitutional signal. Next, the court faulted Congress for failing to provide an “intelligible principle” to curate which cases would be heard by administrative law judges and which would head to traditional federal courts. This dereliction of duty meant that the SEC was unduly empowered to decide an essentially legislative question. Lastly, the riders of the Fifth Circuit held that the administrative law judges enjoyed a protection against being fired that was too robust, being that the board empowered to terminate them for cause consisted of members who were also fireable only for cause. This double layer was ruled unconstitutional because it impinged on the president’s ability to fulfill his constitutional mandate to “take Care that the Laws be faithfully executed,” which courts have read as granting the commander in chief leeway to fire officers of the executive branch. Jarkesy’s fate is unclear, as the SEC has not yet decided its course of action. What does seem clear, however, is that this is an area of law in ferment. Another case from the riders of the Fifth Circuit that challenges SEC procedures, Cochran v. SEC, was recently granted certiorari by the Supreme Court. Professor Hamburger, whose not-for-profit law firm has helped win so many cases that the Sun headlined one editorial, “,” observed that “we are seeing lower courts push back against Supreme Court doctrine. It is a reminder that correction of error comes not only from above but also from below.” With this latest case, partisans of the administrative can feel the ground shaking beneath their feet. Upcoming Events! We have numerous planned events throughout this spring and summer, with more being added each week. Please help us spread the word by sharing this information. You can stay informed about our upcoming events by visiting our or our website, The following is Harriet’s schedule through the end May 2022 Friday, May 27th Laramie Fundraiser 12:00-1:00 pm Altitude Chophouse & Brewery 320 S 2nd St, Laramie $25 suggested donation Friday, May 27th Wheatland Barn Dance/Fundraiser 6:00 pm Southard Ranch 311 Cottonwood Rd, Wheatland $50 suggested donation Saturday, May 28th 11:00 AM Doors Open 4:00 PM Event President Trump Rally Ford Wyoming Center 1 Events Dr, Casper, WY 82601 Sunday, May 29th Jeff Clarke Horse Sale in Meeteetse June 1st Newcastle Townhall Newcastle Lodge and Convention Center 22918 U.S. Highway 85, Newcastle, WY 82701 June 9th Campaign for Liberty Casper, WY June 11th Glendo Townhall Location TBD Harriet will also be attending some of the County Lincoln/Reagan Day dinners that are scheduled throughout the state, as well as industry group meetings. Please look for such events in your area and support your local Republican Party! hagemanforwyoming.com | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. Box 4157, Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: re: House Enrolled Act 1041
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Folks, The Republican supermajority at the Indiana General Assembly voted to override Governor Eric Holcomb’s veto on House Enrolled Act 1041. Now, transgender children will be banned from participating in school sports according to their gender identity. It became very clear back when the GOP-controlled General Assembly originally introduced the bill that **House Enrolled Act 1041 was less about facts and more about fulfilling a national party purity test. Indiana Republicans even admitted this themselves** — it’s why they partnered with a national hate group to villainize innocent children who wanted to play the sports they enjoy with their friends. **The Indiana GOP’s choice to override Governor Holcomb’s veto will be remembered as the time when elected Republicans used the power of their offices to bully innocent children.** And unfortunately, this law and the impending ‘Don’t Say Gay’ legislation set to be introduced next year will usher in a form of bullying LGBTQ adults survived and long hoped future generations wouldn’t have to experience. **Indiana Democrats value the state’s LGBTQ community, and they have a place in our state and future just as everyone else.** LGBTQ Hoosiers are a strength and part of the backbone of the state’s workforce, culture, and overall way of life. We must do everything to protect LGBTQ Hoosiers. Their acceptance is dependent on Indiana’s future. Instead of focusing on national culture wars and a divisive agenda, the Indiana Democratic Party is working to create a brighter, more accepting and welcoming future for generations of Hoosiers to come. **[Could you make a contribution today to power this important work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45701524/347105375/1643342139?refcode=idp-em-220524-1041&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWEzMjQyMS05YWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gu60saHitPxVHrYi6Q05Ih53_TvxBXMhhPtPTIwF6Ow=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45701528/347105379/405560545?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=idp-em-220524-1041&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWEzMjQyMS05YWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gu60saHitPxVHrYi6Q05Ih53_TvxBXMhhPtPTIwF6Ow=)

| | **Today is Primary Day!**

I'm not asking for money or for volunteer hours, just your vote.

Today is the day we have been working towards for over a year now. Please encourage your family, friends, and neighbors to vote for me today. With as many early votes as we have seen and how close the polling was before today, it is anyone's ball game if they have a good turnout. So please don't forget to vote for me, Marc McMain, the Term Limits candidate. Polls close at 7 PM.

name: United Rural Democrats
subject: Republicans are targeting contraception now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
Peter, this is not the end of the road for the GOP's bans

| |
---
Hi Peter – In another discriminatory, unjust move, Republicans in elected positions across the country are moving to ban contraception for millions of Americans. **The GOP is threatening access to reproductive health, and you can be sure that this isn't the end of the road. Soon, they'll be targeting anything – voting rights, same-sex marriage, LGBTQ+ rights, and more.** Here are just some of the Republican representatives who have threatened to take away access to reproductive care.
* **Alabama Governor Kay Ivey** – voiced support for a law that would ban abortions after six weeks.
* **Alaska State Rep. Chris Kurka** – introduced legislation that could make getting an abortion a felony.
* **Louisiana State Rep. Danny McCormick** – introduced legislation that classifies abortion as a homicide.
* **Idaho State Rep. Brent Crane** – said he would be open to holding hearings on bills that would ban emergency contraception.
* **Missouri State Rep. Mary Elizabeth Coleman** – introduced legislation that would allow private citizens to sue anyone who helps a Missouri resident get an out-of-state abortion.

**The list goes on and on, Peter.** Republicans are gearing up to ban reproductive care in states across the country. And representatives in rural areas have been especially vocal about restricting women's rights. [_**We need to make sure people know that there's another option and that electing Democrats will result in a change. We can build a Democratic wave across the country in November, but we can't do it alone. Are you with us?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45701722/347107239/311099802?refcode2=8d3e32ce-9bdb-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&refcode=220524_urd_contraceptivebans_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkM2UzMmNlLTliZGItZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4YzMyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uYC8O9f1Q9raD6tt9Xpr5kqr7PS2vOLFauw4zhQfAp8=) name: =?utf-8?Q?Lori=20Chavez=2DDeRemer?=
subject: You deserve better than Joe Biden
body:
Together let’s fight for our country

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/efcf3ef426ba/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-7128133?e=c87c5d8d97)
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-5-24-22?recurring=true&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast524

Friend,

Joe Biden is out of touch with reality and out of touch with the American people.

For over a year, the Biden Administration has inflicted devastating policies that have put our country on the wrong track.

We have suffered through historic gas prices, 40-year inflation, increased crime, and record-breaking border encounters. Our economy is in shambles and now families across the country are dealing with a baby formula shortage.

As your Congresswoman, I will fight to bring relief to our country; chip in any amount today to help get our country back on track.>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-5-24-22?recurring=true&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast524)

With your help, we can bring real change to Oregon and across our country come November.

Together we can right the wrongs brought on by the Radical Left and their policies.

Unlike Joe Biden, when I’m in office, I will put YOU first and FIGHT to end the crises we are facing. Donate today!>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-5-24-22?recurring=true&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast524)

Thank you,

Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Republican Nominee for U.S. Congress

---
| | |
---
| | | **Tanya For Arizona Campaign Round-Up**
The highlight of Tanya's week was getting to talk to more East Valley families and share her message of how she will protect the American Dream, but a close second was the dessert at the Chandler Republican Women's Fashion Show Luncheon (Yum!).

If you want Team Tanya to stop by your group next time or you are interested in volunteering, email us at info@tanyaforarizona.com

**Get your Tanya for Arizona yard sign!!**

BIG NEWS! Team Tanya officially has yard signs!

If you live in the district and would like a yard sign, hit REPLY and someone from our team will connect with you and coordinate getting one to you.

**Trends we are watching...**

According to [News Nation's new poll](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=947b1fdd2b&e=bd2b55b0e3), 96.30% of Americans polled are very/somewhat worried about inflation and 65.9% of Americans polled are living paycheck to paycheck. The Biden economy is not working for Arizona families. In Congress, Tanya will go toe-to-toe with the Biden administration and stand up for policies that help East Valley families thrive.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?GOP=20Alert?=
subject: Border Security Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
🚨 The border crisis continues. In April we had the highest number of border crossings in American history! | |
---
| | | **🚨BORDER SECURITY UPDATE🚨**
---
| **ANOTHER RECORD-BREAKING MONTH AT OUR SOUTHERN BORDER.

OVER 234,000 ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS CROSSED OUR BORDER IN APRIL—THE MOST IN AMERICAN HISTORY!**
---
| [HELP FIGHT BACK >>](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=4e2a72670c&e=1050d051da "HELP FIGHT BACK >>")
---
| Patriot,

The crisis at our southern border is about to get even worse.

DHS recently announced that over **234,000 illegal immigrants** crossed our southern border in April. That’s the highest number of border crossings in American history!

Yesterday, Joe Biden attempted to recklessly lift Title 42, but thankfully, a Federal Judge stopped him. If Joe Biden gets his way and Title 42 goes away, an estimated **500,000 illegal immigrants** are expected to cross our border each month.

**THIS CRISIS IS OUT OF CONTROL.**
