name: Letitia James
subject: Asking for Peter's opinion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45701975/347109101/265476937?refcode=email-header&code=jtk519-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTRhYmUxZi05Y2RiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Chu1I3QhgCKEzuv1Fd3soiINpYzx-S_Sfg-PytXvfys=)
---
Peter, I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why your response to my priorities survey is so important.

Growing up, I didn’t have power or privilege. I was born in Brooklyn to hardworking parents and received all of my education through the New York City public school system. And, like millions of other New Yorkers, I had no real platform to speak up about the decisions being made that would directly affect me and my family.

I know what it is to feel powerless and voiceless. **That’s why, when I made history by becoming the first Black woman ever to be attorney general of New York, I vowed to never let another New Yorker feel voiceless.**

**Peter, I’m reaching out today to make sure you have a chance to make your voice heard:[Will you take 60 seconds now to respond to my priorities survey so I can continue to fight for what matters most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45701978/347109104/447928146?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk519-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTRhYmUxZi05Y2RiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Chu1I3QhgCKEzuv1Fd3soiINpYzx-S_Sfg-PytXvfys=&emci=d9ae71be-c7da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=254abe1f-9cdb-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Take my survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45701980/347109106/447928146?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk519-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTRhYmUxZi05Y2RiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Chu1I3QhgCKEzuv1Fd3soiINpYzx-S_Sfg-PytXvfys=&emci=d9ae71be-c7da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=254abe1f-9cdb-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=25369504)
---
I have spent the last three and a half years as your attorney general fighting to lift the suffocating weight of the powerful and corrupt off of New York’s working families. And we’ve made real progress – but my continued fight relies on your support.

So far this year, the Republican Attorneys General Association has raised nearly $6 MILLION to install people like my GOP opponent into power, but I won’t be intimidated. I refuse to sit by and watch Republicans destroy all the progress we’ve fought so hard to make, but winning this election is going to require ALL of us working together.

**Peter, I need to hear from at least 1,000 people on this team before midnight on Friday, but I’m still missing your response.[Will you answer some quick questions about your concerns and priorities? Not only will your response help inform my campaign strategy – it'll also help me better fight for you and your loved ones.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45701982/347109108/447928146?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk519-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTRhYmUxZi05Y2RiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Chu1I3QhgCKEzuv1Fd3soiINpYzx-S_Sfg-PytXvfys=&emci=d9ae71be-c7da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=254abe1f-9cdb-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=25369504)**

| | **Friend, there’s something special happening across Nebraska’s First Congressional District.** We saw it in 2020 as our communities marched in unity on the Capitol lawn, calling for racial justice following the murders of George Floyd, Breonna Taylor, James Scurlock, and too many Black Americans across the country. We saw it in 2021 as our students at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln gathered by the thousand to stand against sexual violence and hold people in power accountable for protecting our youth. **And we’re seeing it _right now_ , as Nebraskans organize in record numbers to take a stand for women, families, and young people in the fight for reproductive health care and autonomy.** Our District is calling out that we’re ready for new leaders, and we’re working around the clock to elect a legislator who will continue our fight in Congress. **Now, it’s time to mobilize.** The 35-day countdown to the NE-01 Special Election starts TODAY. This team has gone above and beyond to show Patty Pansing Brooks _just_ how ready we are to cast our votes for progress this election cycle, and in just a matter of weeks, we’ll get our first chance to send her to Washington. [**If you’re ready to elect a congresswoman who will fight for Nebraskans, for our values, and for the progress our state deserves, please rush a $50 donation to help Patty win at the ballot box on June 28.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45702612/347113183/333259033?amount=50&refcode=em_220524_35days&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220524_35days&refcode2=4a321536-9edb-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTMyMTUzNi05ZWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lRc0lXkaM_h3IqPub8cTLXAtj3U9b1B-gky_5cLyuRc=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45702613/347113184/333259033?amount=50&refcode=em_220524_35days&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220524_35days&refcode2=4a321536-9edb-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTMyMTUzNi05ZWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lRc0lXkaM_h3IqPub8cTLXAtj3U9b1B-gky_5cLyuRc=)

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: May 24, 2022 - Save Our Sovereignty from the WHO
body:
| | | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-AYk9eC1K5OkWcZViEQ)
---
|
---
---
This is the week that the World Health Organization (WHO) is holding its World Health Assembly. It’s where they will vote on the Biden administration’s amendments to the International Health Regulations. These regulations are not the same thing as the Global Pandemic Treaty, though they are related. Unfortunately, we have someone in the White House and everyone working in the administration who will treat these IHR’s as legally binding. The amendments to the IHR’s would give the WHO more authority than our own elected officials and our Constitution. We updated the wording of the email you can send to Congress and the US delegation to the WHO, so even if you used our campaign last week, please use it again this week! And don’t forget to share the campaign with your network! [**Use our AlignAct campaign**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-CdH91kT01irvZUQ) to email (and more) all of those people with just a few clicks, and help us **Save Our Sovereignty!** Be sure to pass the link on to your networks as well!
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-8ZCQ)
---
| | _Note: Occasionally, we receive an email from someone who has a technical issue with the AlignAct platform. Please continue to email us to let us know. We forward those issues on to the developers, so they can fix the problem._
---
|
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
Biden, Pelosi, and Schumer still haven’t gone on record to condemn the threats, intimidation, and harassment of the conservative Justices after there was a leak from the Supreme Court. **[Use our AlignAct campaign](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._TScW1QY0W42NCJw) to keep the pressure up on Democrats to denounce the threats.**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | The Biden administration [will spend $5 billion](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MzU3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/u7UXlnZ_ED0WPK99kTeooA) over the next five years to construct speed cameras, bicycle lanes and other local infrastructure, it announced last week, citing an urgent need for roadway safety. The colossal spending plan comes as inflation is at a 40-year high, a situation largely attributable to massive government spending. The program places a disproportionately high burden on American motorists who are already reeling from record-high gasoline prices. While research shows that [speed cameras are frequently unreliable and subject to error](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MzU3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/BERwDuQ8hpFbmcLghYdyvg), they have been prolific revenue generators for liberal city governments. A single speed camera on Washington, DC’s I-295, for example, extracted more than [$26 million in motorist fines](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) in just two and a half years. The camera charges premium penalties in a work-zone where there's often no evidence of work. Bicycles are apparently a high priority to Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg, who last year [mobilized](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) a convoy of government SUVs to drive him to a parking lot where he arranged to buy a used bicycle.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
The Biden administration is still appealing the decision that eliminated the mask mandate on public travel like airplanes. This is nothing but an attempt to claw back some of the power they stole during Covid. [**Use our campaign**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**to tell the administration to stop!**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | Twitter is “censoring the right,” a senior engineer admitted in hidden-camera clips [released late last week by Project Veritas](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._dotEgOWCOxmrOA). “Twitter does not believe in free speech,” he said. “Elon [Musk] believes in free speech,” he added. “Some of my colleagues are like super left, left, left, left, left,” said the engineer, adding that many have threatened to quit if Musk takes over and enforces his free-speech model. Meanwhile, Musk ’s $44 billion purchase of Twitter was put on [pause](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._WKm7yaMMA) while he sought more information on just how many Twitter accounts are fake. An audit of President Joe Biden’s 22.2 million [followers](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) on Twitter discovered that about half are fake accounts, [Newsweek](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MzU3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/lsAmrfOJRtsBGo4wScGfvg) reported.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
While a judge has ruled that Biden cannot end Title 42 just yet, we need Congress to act before he is able to end it on his own. [**Use our AlignAct campaign**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**to urge five Democrat Senators** who claim to oppose the plan to end Title 42, but who didn’t actually do anything to protect our border when they had the chance.
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | A mere 27% of small business owners are satisfied with the U.S. economy, [a Job Creators Network Foundation poll reports](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-AjFm91bMT9H1dUQ). “While the Biden administration is touting a ‘small business boom’ and misdirecting the public, our polling shows without a doubt that Main Street is suffering,” Job Creators Network Foundation president Elaine Parker said. Despite concerns from small businesses, the Biden administration has [issued](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) new climate disclosure rules that will put even greater financial pressure on America’s small businesses. Biden’s climate [proposal](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._GjQegWS46w) could cost large companies $640,000 in the first year with a decrease to $530,000 per year thereafter. Small corporations would pay $490,000 initially with a drop to $420,000 in subsequent years.

clean_body: | | | | This is the week that the World Health Organization (WHO) is holding its World Health Assembly. It’s where they will vote on the Biden administration’s amendments to the International Health Regulations. These regulations are not the same thing as the Global Pandemic Treaty, though they are related. Unfortunately, we have someone in the White House and everyone working in the administration who will treat these IHR’s as legally binding. The amendments to the IHR’s would give the WHO more authority than our own elected officials and our Constitution. We updated the wording of the email you can send to Congress and the US delegation to the WHO, so even if you used our campaign last week, please use it again this week! clean_body: Can you donate $5 or $10 before midnight and help us win? | The Democrats are ALL-IN to defeat Republicans this year and hold their Senate majority. With the help from their dark-money allies - the left is spending hundreds of millions of dollars in red-states to defeat conservatives they deem vulnerable. Despite their efforts, I know that Senator Mike Lee will NOT go down without a fight. But here’s the deal - My team has looked at the numbers and we only need 31 more donations from your area to hit our target. It’s awkward asking you for money, Peter, but this election will come down to the very last dollar raised and spent. The Democrats are spending hundreds of millions of dollars to defeat conservatives in red states this election. Thanks, Ted Cruz | Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc. Don't want to receive our emails? Can you donate $5 or $10 before midnight and help us win?

# Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
Donald J. Trump May 24th, 2022 ICYMI: Endorsement of Herschel Walker for U.S. Senate Herschel Walker is a friend, a Patriot, and an outstanding American who is going to be a GREAT United States Senator. He embodies “America First” and the winning spirit of Georgia. Herschel is tough on Crime and Borders, and he will always stand in support of Law Enforcement, Military, and our Vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and Voter Integrity. Herschel Walker will never let you down. He was a great football player and will be an even better U.S. Senator—if that is even possible. He has my Complete and Total Endorsement! | [View Post](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJxdkEFzgyAQhX8N3nRgMZAcPCS1OeTS6SXTm4MCkVTQKOr474up6aEzDAzv232zb2XGJRWSRCYDDIB3kBJGDwQSpneM70SJCae65ClKcdW6QfWT8GZSw-iMVzKp2qjOaCX35LDHIGgpNGeSYq0JMIK1IIxB1GS1992A6BHBOZx5nhPZOtHIu-9H2wUbG2Sn5mF74m_l9LQwt2iM6Hn0trBKmtEimisrTIOAreLQjn2lguiqphC2a4xeNlSFrzA3F-ArW2zFUkDq62LspPDqVdk6r5z_dYmvy_UydmLyU8CFa4wM4J9YGxnS5OW7NYfuEvWZ7GbTNGZgPCzqtg64Zoq2iTLETwjg2QXwXAPA16e-88eNPuL8dIzTD-xWBm_h9kun_go3j2SLDYjnP7BXjJ8)
---
Donald J. Trump May 24th, 2022
ICYMI: Endorsement of Sarah Huckabee Sanders for Governor of Arkansas
Sarah Huckabee Sanders is a Warrior who will always fight for the people of Arkansas and do what is right, not what is political correct. Sarah is strong on Borders, tough on Crime, and fully supports the Second Amendment and our great law enforcement officers. She loves our Military and Veterans - and her home state of Arkansas. Sarah will be a GREAT Governor, and she has my Complete and Total Endorsement!
[View Post](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJxdkEFzgyAQhX8N3nRwQUkOHpLYHHppe-vNQYFICmgU49hfX0xND51hYHjf7pt9KwomCBdppAvAADgDmuZkn0KSqyxnGa9xyoiqGUUUN50b5XDnXt_lODntpUiaLmoLkTU7zoTcESI5T1VKKJZC1bnak5QQFpmi9b4fETkgOIczz3MiOseNuPphsn2wsUF2ch63J74vX1Q6zgaHETlP3lZWCj1ZREppuTYI8lUcu2loZBBdYypue6PVsqEmfLm-uACf2WLLlwqob6upF9zLZ2XnvHT-1yXenb_n9-lK4Bhw5YwWAfwTWy1CmrJ-sXrfv0ZDIfpZG6PHnIVFXdYB10zRNlGBWOiDRxfAYw0Anx_qym4XcovL4yGmb9itDE7h9ksv_wo3j2SLDYiVP11Zi18)
---
Donald J. Trump May 24th, 2022
ICYMI: Endorsement of Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton
Attorney General Ken Paxton has been bravely on the front line in the fight for Texas, and America, against the vicious and very dangerous Radical Left Democrats, and the foolish and unsuspecting RINOs that are destroying our Country. Ken is strong on Crime, Border Security, the Second Amendment, Election Integrity and, above all, our Constitution. He loves our Military and our Vets. It is going to take a PATRIOT like Ken Paxton to advance America First policies in order to Make America Great Again. Ken has my Complete and Total Endorsement for another term as Attorney General of Texas. He is a true Texan who will keep Texas safe—and will never let you down!
[View Post](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJxdkEFzgyAQhX8N3nR0QTAHD0ltDj2001N7c1BQyQAaxTjm1xdT00MZBob3LW_2rciZwFwkgcohBohTIAnFhwQi2qSUpbyKE4abihFE4rq3kxxv3KmbnGarnBRR3QddTjknSZZVJIMsgTrNSELYgYqM4tgvCHTeOTdMCB8RnP1eliUSveVaXNw4m8HbGC9buUz7FbbLtZ3uHbu7GOHz7ExppFCzQbiQhiuNgG7i1M9jLb1oa11yM2jVrDuq_ZOr1nr4zBYavpZAXFfOg-BOPit766R1vy7h5T2rVvpFbOtxabUSHvwTOyV8mqJ6NeowvAVjLoZFaa0myvyg2q3BLVOwd5QjdkIAj18AjzEAfH82F3Zt8TUsTseQfMR2Y_DiT7cO8q9w94j22IBY8QODBoo8)
---
Donald J. Trump May 24th, 2022
ICYMI: Endorsement of Dawn Buckingham for Texas Land Commissioner
A Senator and Doctor, Dawn Buckingham was one of my very first supporters in the Great State of Texas. She has served in the Senate for five years, is highly respected, and is someone who can always be counted on to do the right thing for her State. She is running for the position of Land Commissioner in order to protect the great legacy of Texas including defending the Alamo which, like all other amazing institutions, is under siege. She is strong on Borders, our Second Amendment, Law Enforcement, loves our Military and our Vets. Dawn has my Complete and Total Endorsement!
[View Post](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJxdkDFvgzAQhX-N2UDmDDgMDElphi5VI0Xqhgy2waltCJjQ_PualHSoZNny--6e7h0vKCeMx4EqAAPgFJI4I3kMUSbTjKasxjElsqYJSnDT20mMN-bUTUyzVU7wqOmDroh3Cac0x2yXcwkZCKApafKs2dUpxpAHuuicGyZE9giO_izLEvHeMs0vbpzN4G2Ml61Ypu0J83r8ll_j9SIxIsfZmcoIrmaDSCkMUxpBtopTP4-N8KJtdMXMoJW8b6jxX6Za6-EzW2jYvYLEddU8cObEs7K3Tlj36xI2tj05eXans8eV1Yp78E_sFPdpyvrVqHx4C8aCD4vSWk0Z9Ytq1wHXTME2UYHoAQE8ugAeawD4_JAXem3JNSwP-zB5x3Zl8OJvdx_EX-HmEW2xAdHyB7wXi6A)
---
Donald J. Trump May 24th, 2022
ICYMI: Endorsement of Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene
Marjorie Taylor Greene is a warrior in Congress. She doesn’t back down, she doesn’t give up, and she has ALWAYS been with “Trump.” Marjorie has worked very hard to secure the Border, stop the Radical Left, and ensure the truth is known about the RIGGED and STOLEN 2020 Presidential Election. She loves our Country and MAGA, its greatest ever political movement. Marjorie is running for re-election to Congress, and has my Complete and Total Endorsement!
[View Post](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJxdkEFvhCAQhX8N3jQyIHQPHnbr7qGHNr00vRkUVDaAruJa_31xa3toQiC8b-Zl3sicSyIkjnQOKUCaAcWMHDAkrMkYz0SVYk6ailNE07p3kxrvwuu7mmanvZJJ3UddTiHFDWasVhIoeUqxwlmVMcZFhSVmTWTyzvthQuSI4BLOsiyJ7J0w8urH2Q7BxgbZqWXanxicO3w53k5rishl9ra0SurZIlIoK7RBwDZx6uexVkF0tSmFHYxu1h3V4St06wL8zRZbsZZAfVfOgxRe_Vb2zivnf1xi-vpxrLuzLVjApTNaBvBP7LQMaYrqbPVheInGXA6LNkZPjIdFtduAW6ZonyhH_IQAHl0AjzUAfL43V35ryS0uTseYvqVuY_Acbr8O6q9w90j22IB48Q3PN4oF)
---
Donald J. Trump May 24th, 2022
ICYMI: Endorsement of Burt Jones for Lieutenant Governor of Georgia
State Senator Burt Jones is a Conservative Warrior running for Lieutenant Governor of Georgia. No one has fought harder for Election Integrity than Burt, and no state needs it more. A businessman and Patriot, Burt will always stand for America First, and will help bring back Energy Independence, a Strong Border, Low Taxes, Great Education, and Safe Cities. He will also get to the bottom of the Nov. 3 Presidential Election Scam. Burt Jones has my Complete and Total Endorsement. He will not let the great people of Georgia down!
[View Post](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJxdkEFvhCAQhX8N3jQwoOwePOzWbpr20OyhSW-GFVS2gK7iGv99cWt7aEIgvG_mZd7InEsqJIl0DhgAp8BIRvcEkqxOM56KCyac1hfOEMNV50Y13IXXdzVOTnslk6qL2pxKTGrC2Q6zjBFRCcVECpJgxcm-zqrI5K33_YjoAcEpnHmeE9k5YeTVD5Ptg40NslPzuD2xvMBCrfsChRE9Td6WVkk9WUQLZYU2CLJVHLtpqFQQXWVKYXuj62VDVfgK3bgAf7PFViwlMN-WUy-FV7-VnfPK-R-X-K25p2z3cX5JAy6d0TKAf2KrZUhTXJ6t3vev0ZDLftbG6DHjYVHNOuCaKdomyhE_IoBHF8BjDQCf5_rKbw29xcXxELN37FYGT-H2S6_-CjePZIsNiBffrseJtg)
---
Donald J. Trump May 24th, 2022
ICYMI: Endorsement of David Perdue for Governor of Georgia
David Perdue is a Conservative fighter who isn’t afraid of the Radical Left, and is the only candidate in Georgia who can beat Stacey “The Hoax” Abrams in November. Brian Kemp has failed Georgia. He caved to Stacey Abrams before the 2020 Election and allowed massive Election Fraud to take place. The signing of the Stacey Abrams-backed Consent Decree, so stupidly giving her and the Democrats everything they wanted, was a monumental mistake for not only Georgia, but also for our Nation!

Kemp has been a very weak Governor—the liberals and RINOs have run all over him on Election Integrity, and more. Most importantly, he can’t win because the MAGA base—which is enormous—will never vote for him. We need strong leaders who will fight, and time is running out! David Perdue will eliminate the Income Tax, secure the Elections, defend the Second Amendment, support our great Farmers, get crime in Atlanta and other places under control, take care of our great Vets, and put parents back in charge of the schools.

David Perdue and Herschel Walker (who I have already strongly endorsed) will make an unstoppable team for Georgia. Trump supporters will turn out to vote for these great leaders in big numbers. David Perdue has my Complete and Total Endorsement. He will not let you down!
[View Post](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJxdkE9zgyAQxT8N3nR0EUkOHpLaHDqT6Z9Le3NAUEkBjWJMvn0xNT10hoHh_Xbf7FuRU4GZSAKVQwwQE0iTDG8TiLKaZJQwHicU15ymKI2rzo5yuDCnLnKcrHJSRFUXtDklFU9jyKQQhDJGiMQJlRxztkkIzyDQeetcPyK8Q3DwZ57nSHSWaXFyw2R6b2O8bOU8rk_YXGshK-Df1xjhw-RMaaRQk0G4kIYpjSBbxLGbhkp60Va6ZKbXqr6tqPJfphrr4SNbaNithNS15dQL5uSjsrNOWvfrEr7Bpj4eP46fwuPSaiU8-Ce2Svg0BX82atu_BEMu-llprcaM-kU1y4BLpmCdKEd0jwDuXQD3NQB8vdcnem7wOSz2uzB9je3C4Mnf7tbLv8LVI1pjA6LFD9zkitM)

name: Bill de Blasio
subject: Humbly asking if you can add your name as a personal endorser of my campaign for Congress
body:
This is going to be a fast campaign. Election Day is only about 90 days from now. And what I am asking is this:
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/150?t=1&akid=151%2E39519%2EdeuYWB)

Friends -
This is going to be a fast campaign. Election Day is only about 90 days from now. And what I am asking is this:
**Can I count on your support in my campaign for Congress?**
I’m hoping for 1,000 people to add their name today. This is a small and simple action, but it will speak volumes about the strength of our grassroots campaign to win in New York’s new 10th Congressional District.
[**Use this link to say you endorse my campaign for Congress in New York’s 10th Congressional District.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/signup/bdb-personal-endorsement/?source=em-220524-ngop2&t=2&akid=151%2E39519%2EdeuYWB)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.billdeblasio.com/signup/bdb-personal-endorsement/?source=em-220524-ngop2&t=3&akid=151%2E39519%2EdeuYWB)**
Together, we launched pre-K and 3-K for all.
Together, we dramatically reduced the use of stop-and-frisk and reduced crime to record lows.
Together, we delivered affordable housing to 275,000+ New Yorkers.
Together, we cut greenhouse emissions.
Together, we stood up to Trump in America’s biggest city.
Everything we accomplished in NYC during my time as Mayor we accomplished together.
Victory in this race will be no different. I cannot do it alone. So please:
[**Use this link to say you endorse my campaign for Congress in New York’s 10th Congressional District.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/signup/bdb-personal-endorsement/?source=em-220524-ngop2&t=4&akid=151%2E39519%2EdeuYWB)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.billdeblasio.com/signup/bdb-personal-endorsement/?source=em-220524-ngop2&t=5&akid=151%2E39519%2EdeuYWB)**
In solidarity,
Bill de Blasio

De Blasio for Congress
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.billdeblasio.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=151%2E39519%2EdeuYWB). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Phil=20Heimlich?=
subject: What’s Next in our Fight to Save Democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIMLICH FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [ ](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=2ee5971898&e=544bb4cd89)
---
| | |
---
| Hello, Peter, It's been three weeks since my primary election for Ohio’s 8th Congressional District. Even though the result was not what we had hoped for, I’m very pleased with what we were able to accomplish. In two short months, we waged a strong campaign against a pro-Trump incumbent— _winning Hamilton Country by nearly 10 points_. We generated a grass-roots movement of Americans who understand that Trumpism is a clear and present danger to our democracy and must be defeated. The day before the election, the _Cincinnati Enquirer_ [published my op-ed](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=84b2480ada&e=544bb4cd89), “What Would Reagan Do?” I expressed my concerns about the state of our democracy and imagined what President Ronald Reagan, who stood up to Soviet oppression, would have thought about Republicans who refuse to condemn Russia for attacking Ukraine or stand with the Ukrainian people. So, what now? This is hardly the end of the road for me. I am even more passionate in my commitment to protect our rights to free and fair elections and the rule of law. I will be working with other pro-democracy candidates and organizations like [WelcomePAC](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=276f759cf5&e=544bb4cd89) and [Renew America](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=711005dd92&e=544bb4cd89) to defeat pro-Trump candidates and Trump himself as he gears up for another Presidential run in 2024. This is a fight that I began well before the campaign. A recent editorial in the _Cincinnati Enquirer_ [asked](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=e81c6c1f85&e=544bb4cd89), _“Why can’t more Republicans show the kind of integrity... that Heimlich has consistently, going back to when Trump emerged on his fumbling quest to transform this country into an oligarchy led by one more rich would-be autocrat?”_ But even if I’m one of only a few Republican leaders willing to speak out against Trumpism, this campaign has taught me that there are many Americans willing to join us. I garnered support from people of all parties, as Republicans, Democrats, and Independents realize that _our liberties are at risk if Trump maintains his grip on the party of Lincoln and Reagan. _ I also know that our campaign could not have gotten to this point without your financial support. For that, I am forever grateful. Rest assured that I will continue to [challenge my fellow Republicans](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=451751dd06&e=544bb4cd89) to put country over party, and of course, I’ll keep you updated on our efforts. In the meantime, please stay engaged by following us on [Facebook](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=4e8718e67c&e=544bb4cd89) and [Twitter](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=033de3a8e3&e=544bb4cd89). Above all, don’t give up. We all must act like our democracy depends on it. Because it does . . . now more than ever. Gratefully, Phil
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | STAY UPDATED ON THE LATEST

clean_body: Elizabeth has been endorsing champions for working people up and down the ballot. And this grassroots team has helped power them to victory — from city council and mayor’s races to big primary wins for key 2022 congressional elections. | | | Elizabeth has been endorsing champions for working people up and down the ballot. And this grassroots team has helped power them to victory — from city council and mayor’s races to big primary wins for key 2022 congressional elections. Side by side, we’ve helped bold, inspiring leaders like Summer Lee, Michelle Wu, Charles Booker, Andrea Salinas, and Greg Casar win their primaries, even in the face of big money and special interest opposition. That’s the power of a grassroots movement. Today, five more Democrats we’ve endorsed are on primary ballots, including Jessica Cisneros in Texas — who’s challenging the last anti-abortion rights Democrat in the U.S. House — and Stacey Abrams in Georgia. = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | | | | | So much is on the line in this year’s midterm elections. If we expand our Democratic majorities in Congress and elect more progressives who are ready to get rid of the filibuster, we can finally overcome Mitch McConnell’s veto power in the Senate. And with the Supreme Court poised to allow states to ban abortions, state and local elections are more critical than ever. Elizabeth is in these fights all the way. She’s going to keep endorsing and supporting Democrats who know how to get the job done. But she can’t do it alone. = Thanks for everything, Team Warren = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=281%2E5257348%2EOE_29e ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

There is one major prerequisite for every Republican candidate seeking
Donald Trump's support:

Accept Trump's dangerous lies and grievances as your own. And there is no
one who Trump holds more of a vendetta against than Adam.

From Adam prosecuting Trump's first impeachment trial in the Senate to his
work holding Trump accountable for the attack on the Capitol that he
instigated, Trump has a bone to pick — and he's made attacking Adam a part
of his regular MAGA rally routine.

With Trump-endorsed candidates winning primary elections in Ohio, North
Carolina, and, perhaps, Pennsylvania and Georgia, even more GOP candidates
will target Adam to please Trump and rile up their base.

Derek, this is why it's so critical that we stand together and
build the resources to respond to their ceaseless, inevitable attacks.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220524_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=281_5257348_OE_29e&akid=281%2E5257348%2EOE_29e ]Adam’s jungle primary is just two weeks away — can you chip in $5 to
help ensure our campaign stays strong and can fend off whatever Trump,
McCarthy, and their right-wing acolytes throw at us?

body:

I need to know IMMEDIATELY because Georgia is holding its Republican primary today, and we have an OUTSTANDING Black Conservative on the ballot who needs your support:
[](https://www.bampac.org/bafdonate?info=2022EU0501&recruiter_id=62247&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022eu0501&n=3)

# Herschel Walker!
Herschel threw his hat into the ring to bring conservative values back to Georgia after Senator Raphael Warnock won his election by the skin of his teeth.
**Herschel represents the TRUTH that the Republican Party is NOT the party of racists, like the Democrats would have you believe.**
**[Please chip in what you can to help Black America’s Pac Action Fund support Black Conservatives across the country during this crucial election year.](https://www.bampac.org/bafdonate?info=2022EU0501&recruiter_id=62247&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022eu0501&n=4)**

To Victory! |

**Alvin Williams**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Us vs. Pelosi, Cuellar, AIPAC, Silicon Valley billionaires
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Nancy Pelosi, Joe Manchin, right-wing Super PACs, billionaire Democratic
donors, and even Republican mega-donors: these are the people lining up
against Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros in her primary against
conservative, anti-abortion Henry Cuellar.

Pelosi is even sending robocalls directly to voters in TX-28 to support
Cuellar. Today is Jessica’s primary,
Peter — we need your grassroots
support right now to defeat Cuellar and his establishment backers.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109771?refcode=em20220524-23521&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=23521%2E1203867%2EyG7Ckt ]Can you rush a $3 donation to Justice Democrats right
now so we can defeat Cuellar and power Jessica to victory? We just won our
second primary of the year (Summer Lee in PA-12) and we need to make this
a huge THIRD win of the year for our movement.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109771?refcode=em20220524-23521&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=23521%2E1203867%2EyG7Ckt ]Contribute

It doesn’t matter to Pelosi that Cuellar is the only anti-choice Democrat
in the House, she’s still going all in.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109771?refcode=em20220524-23521&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=23521%2E1203867%2EyG7Ckt ]Vanity Fair headline reads In Case You're Wondering, Nancy Pelosi Is
Still Supporting The Only Antiabortion House Democrat

It’s not just that headline in Vanity Fair, and it’s not just Pelosi. It’s
also this headline from The Intercept, published just this morning, and a
billionaire Democratic mega-donor’s Super PAC set up with the sole purpose
of stopping Jessica and Justice Democrats.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109771?refcode=em20220524-23521&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=23521%2E1203867%2EyG7Ckt ]Intercept headline reads: Silicon Valley Billionaire Storms into Texas
to Bail Out Abortion Foe Henry Cuellar. Subheadline reads: The Mainstream
Democrats PAC, founded by LinkedIn’s Reid Hoffman, has gone all in to
protect the Texas Democrat in his runoff against Jessica Cisneros.

AND the same AIPAC-affiliated Super PAC that spent $3 million attacking
Summer Lee in PA-12 has spent $2 million against Jessica in TX-28.

It’s the entire corporate political establishment against
us, Peter. Can
you help us fight back?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109771?refcode=em20220524-23521&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=23521%2E1203867%2EyG7Ckt ]Donate $3 right now to help fuel Justice Democrats in
our fight to elect Jessica and expand our bloc of progressives in
Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109771?refcode=em20220524-23521&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=23521%2E1203867%2EyG7Ckt ]Contribute

In TX-28, the Democratic establishment chose corporations and anti-choice
politics over the people. Thank you for being by our side in the fight for
the people.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1026&akid=23521%2E1203867%2EyG7Ckt ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1027&akid=23521%2E1203867%2EyG7Ckt ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220524-23521-footer&t=1028&refcode2=23521_1203867_yG7Ckt&akid=23521%2E1203867%2EyG7Ckt

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1029&akid=23521%2E1203867%2EyG7Ckt

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Tucker Cavanagh
subject: Team Tom Update: May 24th
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45703611/347117317/-530921513?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTFjNjgzYy1hNGRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=edWCMv_Fl2A7ciIKbIOtWR_xDUGWUgS3gICQYLsvWUI=&emci=2c6c6624-79db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=ba1c683c-a4db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=14684837) Hi friends, This week is all about #Tomentum. We are thrilled to have new endorsements from the Maryland State AFL-CIO and The Washington Post Editorial Board! They know that **[“the choice...is clear: Tom Perez would make an outstanding governor”](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45703612/347117318/611721039?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTFjNjgzYy1hNGRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=edWCMv_Fl2A7ciIKbIOtWR_xDUGWUgS3gICQYLsvWUI=&emci=2c6c6624-79db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=ba1c683c-a4db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=14684837)** because of his unmatched experience, lifelong commitment to jobs and justice, and his record of getting stuff done. Team Tom is growing every day. Our broad, diverse coalition of support stretches across the state from Oakland to Ocean City. Together we will achieve our vision of expanding jobs, justice, and opportunity for all Marylanders.
* * *

clean_body: Hi friends, This week is all about #Tomentum. We are thrilled to have new endorsements from the Maryland State AFL-CIO and The Washington Post Editorial Board! They know that because of his unmatched experience, lifelong commitment to jobs and justice, and his record of getting stuff done. Team Tom is growing every day. Our broad, diverse coalition of support stretches across the state from Oakland to Ocean City. Together we will achieve our vision of expanding jobs, justice, and opportunity for all Marylanders. Where We've Been: The energy at our Prince George’s County office opening was incredible! Thank you, Senator Joanne Benson, Delegate Turner, Delegate Anne Healey, and everyone else who braved the heat to join our team to celebrate another great milestone. On Sunday, Tom and Shannon had an energizing morning with activists in Montgomery County at the Central Committee’s spring brunch. Tom and Shannon ended the weekend with a great event at former Chair of the Maryland Democratic Party Kathleen Matthew’s home in Chevy Chase. Kathleen is a dedicated leader, and we are so grateful for her support. Join us! name: Dean Heller
subject: fwd: we need to keep this running until June 14th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean Heller for Nevada Governor |
body:
We’re racing against the clock to reach voters all over the state ahead of the Republican primary| | | Peter, With just **three weeks** left until the Nevada Republican Primary, we’re racing against the clock to reach voters all over the state. Last week, my team asked for your help to keep our latest campaign ad on the air through the end of the month. They’re retreating from the mission, and abandoning the people who need their help....| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=64d7adcad9974789abc55617de9a22d4&_e=hJLnJttvQ_lwbaFZJ4ZLA5wpfVMxRI8Ewt0keAJGxhV_leVaSaaoQA9AFKgjBsDr_sQBRqzCcT6AadhTZ35yzD-hsCv6eaDdIRM6mU6j4eU2bB5113NVP3utnnyTrjGZaziceIhAednZtOf3lJazaEBntOT0tRMOpFVvFwVkah2a1yAlemCJN8HqAPbguK4_fe-7-8i1e4X7A6LABotFfA1Snnw0bU7XditaCkJvd3WF7W7afPTrgV3G4k8v101QAl8z-xajntGOmrl9lHwpQUJFMTW9v8BkgPDLmFqaRFssxs4BBKdDXF46T4DHSHJ8T-yHUFfxGIKYqZ-RxnWU7JDSE3DL4aXYxOnicmaicT5PT7TA0We_DdJl3hZMpKBoy8FYBWbL5dEUnJN8I2bsFREGOykr2fH9sWV7YZQ_cHyY_DuXtkWbDfpZd39BO3eYT_xSnTNvjMTxhRYUcuv8xPi5bnsFpe5WYNcPob_U-nauXLPBwTSzKft2pd2LB0ZfsUrkjtFmnlAqNkarg_n4sLgBY9eWAGkO_zpCFwk4cGI%3D)
---
Peter, it’s John. **We’ve reached a dark moment in America:** Shortages of baby formula. Skyrocketing food prices. Looming recession. It’s times like these that truly test the mettle of leadership.**I know - I’ve experienced it firsthand during my time overseas. ** It was zero three hundred hours, and I was given the impossible task of locating and providing reinforcements to a unit that was heavily under fire in Baghdad. The scene on the ground was _CHAOS_ \- **an active firefight under a shroud of darkness. ** But thanks to my Ranger school training, I understood the fear, the confusion, and exactly what was happening on the ground, allowing us to neutralize the threat quickly. Right now, our “leaders” are doing the opposite. They’re amplifying the chaos, retreating from the mission, and abandoning the people who need their help. Relevant experience. Calm under pressure. Service before self. **_That’s how I led as a soldier and exactly how I’ll lead as a Congressman._** As a pilot and a man of faith, I know I can guide us out of this dark moment - [**will you answer the call to help me do it?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=64d7adcad9974789abc55617de9a22d4&_e=hJLnJttvQ_lwbaFZJ4ZLA5wpfVMxRI8Ewt0keAJGxhV_leVaSaaoQA9AFKgjBsDr_sQBRqzCcT6AadhTZ35yzD-hsCv6eaDdIRM6mU6j4eU2bB5113NVP3utnnyTrjGZaziceIhAednZtOf3lJazaEBntOT0tRMOpFVvFwVkah2a1yAlemCJN8HqAPbguK4_fe-7-8i1e4X7A6LABotFfA1Snnw0bU7XditaCkJvd3WF7W7afPTrgV3G4k8v101QAl8z-xajntGOmrl9lHwpQUJFMTW9v8BkgPDLmFqaRFssxs4BBKdDXF46T4DHSHJ8T-yHUFfxGIKYqZ-RxnWU7BgAM5UzeRA7VnD5nU7tH-IhirUdnAPiEE8vk9y4LlW-JofC0Q6SpqI3cCz9Tk5nzmJDdV3gGNqs6t-sbTElleL0d2UeNbkIZMl34y-vWUUle1bBUzcdsAaNeDzMZv9c7nHo7bJnzcb4h39xzTvXRa953ZygZr9VE0oo4Sqj3n_o29Hlr_2CouxKT3rzIjBpXwGOM9h-_xoPEqdjg39wLx8%3D) Thank you,John James
---

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that a California court has found California’s gender quota law for corporate boards unconstitutional. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | May 23, 2022 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that a California court has found California’s gender quota law for corporate boards unconstitutional. The verdict comes after a 28-day trial. The verdict follows a similar ruling in Judicial Watch’s favor last month finding California’s diversity mandate for corporate boards unconstitutional. ---|--- | | | | = | = “It is incredible, in this day and age, that it took a federal civil rights lawsuit to force Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot to retreat from her racial discrimination against reporters,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. = ---|--- | | | | = | = Thirteen years after a federal investigation blasted the U.S. Census Bureau for hiring criminals to enter American homes to gather statistics for the decennial count, a new audit reveals the disturbing practice continues. In fact, more than a decade after the problem was exposed workers for the 2020 count were not properly vetted and many with criminal records had direct interactions with the public. = ---|--- | | | | == | == The judge was not pulling any punches. Siding with Judicial Watch in a challenge to a congressional redistricting plan cooked up by Democrats dominating the Maryland state legislature, Judge Lynne Battaglia—herself a Democrat—threw haymakers. The Democrat redistricting map was an “extreme partisan gerrymander.” Democrats had attempted to “suppress the voice of Republican voters.” It was drawn up with “partisanship as predominant intent.” It violated state constitutional provisions on equal protection and free speech. It subordinated “constitutional criteria to political consideration.” == ---|--- | | | The Daily Caller Duffy-Lewis’ decision comes in response to a challenge to the mandate from conservative activist group Judicial Watch, which was representing three California residents, according to The Wall Street Journal. Judicial Watch president Tom Fitton stated that the law was “brazenly unconstitutional.” == The Daily Caller The lawsuit, which was filed by Judicial Watch in the United States District Court for the Northern District of Illinois, Eastern Division, alleged that Lightfoot’s denial violated Catenacci’s right to equal protection under the Fourteenth Amendment as well as his and TheDCNF’s First Amendment rights. == = The New York Post Special Counsel John Durham’s three-year probe into the FBI and Robert Mueller’s investigations of former President Donald Trump’s 2016 presidential campaign will reach a critical moment with Monday’s trial of former Hillary Clinton campaign lawyer Michael Sussmann. = = = = = = = | CLIPS = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved == |

**BREAKING: Jim Jordan subpoenaed by the January 6th Committee**

The Trump-Hating Democrats witch hunt against me is getting out of hand. I, along with four other GOP lawmakers were subpoenaed by the partisan House Committee – created by Nancy Pelosi in an effort to use the events of January 6 as a political hit-job against me.

I need my top supporters, Fellow Conservative. This is going to be a tough fight and I need your urgent help to fight the latest political attack against me and conservatives across this country.

**[Will you contribute ANY AMOUNT before 11:59 PM TONIGHT to help give me the resources I need to shield these baseless attacks?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf77k1ir5npnl9k3dl7j3clfridntalrvtehc53g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5h66o34c5h2bs)**

**DEFEND JIM JORDAN**

**SUPPORTER** : dpwillis67@gmail.com
**RESPONSE** :Pending
**SUPPORT REQUESTED BY** : BEFORE 11:59 PM

[**CHIP IN $25 -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8dc0b9oaipiduf8669skg19b389otv1qcm2vivo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5h66o34c5h2bs)

[**CHIP IN $15 -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0ktr58igruulmdtdr052cdmc8itibcv7kr3pk2o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5h66o34c5h2bs)

Make no mistake, they’re only coming after me because **I’M FIGHTING FOR YOU!** Because I won’t back down and I fight for the people who elected me trusting that I would spend every waking moment in office serving our Country.

Attack me on TV, attack me in the New York Times but to question my legal integrity with a subpoena?! I’m going to need your help. **[Can you chip in $10, $20, $30 or more today to help me defend myself from this vicious attack so that I can get back to doing the job I was elected to do?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu8hepvujcb6deemqbg2r8e805eh6fmuk412i9ao_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5h66o34c5h2bs)**

[**COME TO JIM'S DEFENSE -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7us6plgos2mq25cst79v0kj05bebngncvmh4nq0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5h66o34c5h2bs)
There’s no question why this is happening so close to an election . . . **Midterms are in November and THE LEFT WANTS ME GONE**.

Well, I’ve got news for them: I won’t back down without a fight. But **[I need all of my supporters to rally together today so that I can show the Left that they’re not just coming after me, they’re coming after the American people that voted conservatives into office](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3kjdeoeor4fc9876sch65au30ivu62ct1vm126g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5h66o34c5h2bs)**.

All they’re trying to do is distract from the real issues at hand. Whether it be inflation, record high gas prices, or mom’s who can’t get baby formula, they want to make sure I don’t have time to do the job the American people trusted me to perform.

Let’s show the Left that an attempt to slander my name will be in vain. **[Send in $5, $10, $20, $30](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcs9n7dj0jj9lbvecttnr4j9qto1gc843lsgvoj8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5h66o34c5h2bs)** , or whatever you can spare today to help me get past this and back to my job serving the American people.

[**COME TO JIM'S DEFENSE -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8ad28qph9j8sgkji4a5ookgjql0jl1fpae2voig_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5h66o34c5h2bs)

With you in the fight
Jim Jordan

name: Steve Bellone
subject: You're Invited: Fundraiser on June 23rd
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Kaiman for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/UmxwK09v-OEJPNmw8mvYJcvVOfP3KhPTq0iqVZOb7Zc=/YtlqKuexpu-XFDwdsA344K7E5MgP9yXrIHnMsayR0Pc=)
Peter,
Please join me on June 23rd for a fundraiser in support of Deputy County Executive Jon Kaiman's campaign for Congress in New York's 3rd Congressional District.
[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/UmxwK09v-OEJPNmw8mvYJcvVOfP3KhPTq0iqVZOb7Zc=/jGBhPW3bHJutZ5AN4gbcYmxSCPXs3gubwq3moH_aEYA=)
**To RSVP, please visit: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-23](https://act.myngp.com/el/UmxwK09v-OEJPNmw8mvYJcvVOfP3KhPTq0iqVZOb7Zc=/RLsKJL6b3Of7A6qLRKp_XQDugArw28IM7ZMN4qcDOIE=) **
Jon Kaiman is one of the most effective governmental leaders in New York State and that is why I've endorsed his candidacy for Congress in New York's 3rd Congressional District. Jon is a true leader, who has led real change on police reform (working with police and community advocates), labor negotiations, government reform, the opioid epidemic, shared services, and government efficiency. In Congress, Jon will be a fighter for all of New York and that is why I've endorsed his candidacy.
Thank you and I look forward to seeing you on June 23rd.
Sincerely,
Steve Bellone
Suffolk County Executive

Paid for by Jon Kaiman for Congress

name: Marcus Flowers for Congress
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene: “Our god is bigger”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45704666/347122336/2005998736?refcode=20220524_MF_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2M3Mjg4Ni1hYWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nuOizUW3FnD83yk-LeKIhVnqoimqNUHgh_fjg1iTGnk=) Friend, When news broke that the Supreme Court was planning to overturn Roe v. Wade, Marjorie Taylor Greene posted the following on Twitter: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45704667/347122337/2005998736?refcode=20220524_MF_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2M3Mjg4Ni1hYWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nuOizUW3FnD83yk-LeKIhVnqoimqNUHgh_fjg1iTGnk=) Yes, you read that correctly. **She also said that “Overturning Roe v. Wade is the most significant and glorious news of our lifetime.”** President Biden just called on Congress to codify reproductive rights. At a time when those rights are under unprecedented attack, we can’t afford to have people like Marjorie Taylor Greene in Congress getting in the way. **Luckily, Marcus Flowers, a Democrat and Army Veteran, is running against her. And he stands squarely with protecting a woman’s right to choose.[So if you’re able, please split a donation between Marcus Flowers and Seth Moulton to help defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene once and for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45704668/347122338/2005998736?refcode=20220524_MF_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2M3Mjg4Ni1hYWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nuOizUW3FnD83yk-LeKIhVnqoimqNUHgh_fjg1iTGnk=) ** [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45704669/347122339/-238118833?refcode=20220524_MF_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2M3Mjg4Ni1hYWRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nuOizUW3FnD83yk-LeKIhVnqoimqNUHgh_fjg1iTGnk=)

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: A Frenzied Week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
* * *
_Two finish lines are in sight._ _Friday is the cutoff for a_ _bill to pass the Assembly or Senate, and exactly two weeks from today is an Election that will determine if we'll be able to keep fighting together in the monumental battles ahead._ _If I could ask a big favor:[I need your help to make sure our campaign has the funding to cross the finish line on June 7](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may24_test_2&n=1)._ _The is a frenzied week at the Capitol, with hundreds of bills taken up on the Assembly Floor. I am focused on killing the very worst ones: the last of the Vaccine Work Group bills and AB 2223._ _That's why this week, I apologize that I may not be able to ask for your help in a more personal way. But I still need to ask, with some measure of urgency; I am concerned our campaign is going to be short of funds at the worst possible time._ _If you could_[make a donation in whatever amount you can](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may24_test_2&n=2) _it will be of immediate value_. _Thank you!_ -Kevin
* * *
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Leverage Points](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioo2liGoD6i0bgnVUoWTBt0eBvvwCVzvIzGABQ63LfERIQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may24_test_2&n=3) In response to [my announcement](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooGOVXFdSX_ZsZwgwrrGYaD8bTjbCN6jIQViuY5rgLNimxA8PHj21O0uvcX_yx38NA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may24_test_2&n=4) on this Wednesday’s gas tax vote, one of the nation’s top political reporters commented: “Calif. Republicans may be in the minority but they are leveraging this gas-tax issue pretty effectively.” When I ran for the Assembly I was asked, “How can you ever do anything in the Superminority?” My response was you _can_ do things, as long as you’re willing to actually _do things._ If we hadn’t forced the issue on the gas tax, we wouldn’t be seeing the Supermajority’s wall of opposition breaking down – nor would they be talking about “rebates,” for that matter. It's the same with our other recent actions:
* We didn’t end the State of Emergency, but we forced Newsom’s hand on masks and vaccines in school and created a culture where people can go on with their lives.

* We didn’t reverse Prop. 47 but helped propel citizen Recalls of two Soros-backed District Attorneys.

* We didn’t kill the entire “Vaccine Work Group” bill package, but we’ve defeated the three worst bills and I’m confident we can still stop the rest.

That’s been our approach: take action, apply pressure, use every lever, exploit every leverage point. It’s the approach we'll take this week as several of the radical COVID bills face key votes. And it’s the approach I will take in Congress, to assure a new Republican Majority is an active one, one that fights from Day 1 to stop Biden from turning all of America into California. [Time is running out. Help me take our fight to the U.S. Capitol](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may24_test_2&n=5) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may24_test_2&n=6).

name: Team Lizzie
subject: #TeamLizzie Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220524wu?refcode=lpfe220524wu_nat [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220524wu?refcode=lpfe220524wu_nat]
The Texas runoffs are today!
https://www.texastribune.org/2022/04/22/texas-voting-primary-runoff-2022/ [https://www.texastribune.org/2022/04/22/texas-voting-primary-runoff-2022/]
These runoff elections will have huge implications for the future of our state and our country, and the past few weeks have reminded us of the importance of our democratic freedoms and the importance of fighting for them by making our voices heard at the ballot box.
LIZZE_TXTRIBUNE [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6C50507438634E6E6F6968616670497770486D376C767A75417134312B53637836666469597A7752446861652B4865314334384D397357333837514A4C327A62/editor_images/Screen%20Shot%202022-05-24%20at%202.37.29%20PM.png]
After Hurricane Harvey, Congress sent federal disaster funds for the most impacted Texas communities, including Houston and TX-07.
Unfortunately, the General Land Office and Land Commissioner George P. Bush disregarded Congressional intent and allocated the funds to other communities at less risk for natural disasters — possibly for Bush’s personal political gain.
The Department of Housing and Urban Development concluded the General Land Office violated federal law by diverting funds from vulnerable communities. .
This is not how government should work. Disaster relief should be distributed based on need — not politics. Culberson fought to secure this relief for the Texans who need it the most so our communities can heal and mitigate destruction from future storms.
Lizzie spoke to the Texas Tribune about the Supreme Court’s forthcoming decision on Roe v. Wade and what we must do going forward to protect reproductive freedom.
https://www.texastribune.org/2022/05/06/texas-democrats-roe-wade-abortion-elections/ [https://www.texastribune.org/2022/05/06/texas-democrats-roe-wade-abortion-elections/]
Thanks for being a part of the team,
Team Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220524wu?refcode=lpfe220524wu_nat]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States

subject: If you’re able to, please make a $5 or $10 donation before midnight and help me hit my goal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
This election will come down to the very last dollar raised and spent.
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=00bb20df43ee45a585716dfeb1775b87&_e=5hol1Aefe0enNboZnY8yLL5c4JO5LdM_Lyi4bIc8qMplM604b-xeWnhdF6y6NXsx-7etpbDxUkAjFy7HHmKg43aR3ocHfLt4mIROFguzx4M-CjlUu6HSD_a1QlyDRsS45td0BXNxot2NTLp_Jmx4c7XpjDSgOXHb67u_os2Rk7mcOcspai2SiOncSa1IPRQeidA1e73gD6OIebJLSO5En2ctoPPucdUixdgCU8nS9nZMA9pHCNVxQRf3-bOqqPIiq6j27Eh-4Gr-7Ma6WZdfHzERkvW5kBPmMlysMDeJSfc_xRig7MvZq9uFkgkOsWrweyGGEC2RG2AnS58NMYF_q_D8kQej95FPeRLv9gemY4E7EWiwu2Ca1C7f-OkGjMQl)
---
The Democrats are ALL-IN to defeat Republicans this year and hold their Senate majority. With the help from their dark-money allies - the left is spending hundreds of millions of dollars in red-states to defeat conservatives they deem _vulnerable_.

Despite their efforts, I know that Senator Mike Lee will NOT go down without a fight. name: Ross Purgason
subject: A note about the deranged Islamic terrorist
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
My boss asked me to follow up with you today to make sure you had a moment to read the email he sent you a couple of months back. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=43c2cacb5cf742ab91deba6f5414ea0e&_e=Q-BV5GfYCzAI2QeniAva3Cnwq-JbXlb5RsuaViq-KBGwFfgf0P-jSao4fO7xtav6rHQsM1RfX02L2nXRngjOfJ85x7vDRVUVN_9CNzlSAf2DuLL30LtBH53G_Zvxctrpx2QzvneZKYPv_wQ1Y2taA4a78XsiK71jEvQhcdcV6XMLtUSvxeEc1l0tn6ZRHOCF8qCk6Fsr2h8ROMwjcYwbx0pyxv1Xk6lB_sucUnEz1Wx1Kdq5dXyB6ZTSJvh3SK1LvXOqcOT5bZFzT1-EfYmxWcS3NxqTJFgHN7dF_0K90iHUsfWWpZDfDHKqchRcxBwYtarX6oyOtytwWyeIb_dz2s1ByzIdloyUXn50CjKIWt_wCdKAHUw3CurdxsRAVip1qzJ9dl-7vMUlKjXcRs3si1ENXey6clu6CJGtvdGopdvN61soe3QxmubdEYvG30H9iqDAhyOAx3bp2yTK1fti_w%3D%3D)
---

Hi there - my name is Ross Purgason and I'm the campaign manager for Republican Alek Skarlatos, the Republican nominee for U.S. House in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. **I'm fowarding you an email he sent several months back in hopes you might have time to read it today**.

Thank you for your time!

Peter,

Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st 2021 marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

**I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe**. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=43c2cacb5cf742ab91deba6f5414ea0e&_e=Q-BV5GfYCzAI2QeniAva3Cnwq-JbXlb5RsuaViq-KBGwFfgf0P-jSao4fO7xtav6rHQsM1RfX02L2nXRngjOfJ85x7vDRVUVN_9CNzlSAf2DuLL30LtBH53G_Zvxctrpx2QzvneZKYPv_wQ1Y2taA4a78XsiK71jEvQhcdcV6XMLtUSvxeEc1l0tn6ZRHOCF8qCk6Fsr2h8ROMwjcYwbx0pyxv1Xk6lB_sucUnEz1Wx1Kdq5dXyB6ZTSJvh3SK1LZj_3dWfyQDhEpf9eF1F9I4X0LL74GJ_yjznCnelz5BDsjv6OAWGEwDp0VwmDTjmYBADnhAnAsUVV2VUasxwjJMOLuK6gGiimIl3-P6KNwKK_qPqd6th9RjoyIHaDKWemRDHQ3Jwg2PLriADtUAMGtNXEgdhyKoYTm_8AtWknGymC4sfpT84wtUnWNuDgwZdrVxVnHgnKz2QYQYf2f1onaA%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=43c2cacb5cf742ab91deba6f5414ea0e&_e=Q-BV5GfYCzAI2QeniAva3Cnwq-JbXlb5RsuaViq-KBGwFfgf0P-jSao4fO7xtav6rHQsM1RfX02L2nXRngjOfJ85x7vDRVUVN_9CNzlSAf2DuLL30LtBH53G_Zvxctrpx2QzvneZKYPv_wQ1Y2taA4a78XsiK71jEvQhcdcV6XMLtUSvxeEc1l0tn6ZRHOCF8qCk6Fsr2h8ROMwjcYwbx0pyxv1Xk6lB_sucUnEz1Wx1Kdq5dXyB6ZTSJvh3SK1LtcTbmwyK4C52u1lm39s1yDCmxgKZGx_MQutat8Gr21s1xUX6gb3ncQb9CEvWORYzLaWcUPyc3ZYfCoEnmvKWdbLFY6K0R94VT6d_mDUOW3K37HSKazvETPpeI-UwI_kPOsmXDv_TnsX22X5q4MxDhNz53zCM9z6wLMry-fyhOmA4I52MBn-hOIQqFwKACaHKTwcLWL65NEdvmuJt0sta0Q%3D%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=43c2cacb5cf742ab91deba6f5414ea0e&_e=Q-BV5GfYCzAI2QeniAva3Cnwq-JbXlb5RsuaViq-KBGwFfgf0P-jSao4fO7xtav6rHQsM1RfX02L2nXRngjOfJ85x7vDRVUVN_9CNzlSAf2DuLL30LtBH53G_Zvxctrpx2QzvneZKYPv_wQ1Y2taA4a78XsiK71jEvQhcdcV6XMLtUSvxeEc1l0tn6ZRHOCF8qCk6Fsr2h8ROMwjcYwbx0pyxv1Xk6lB_sucUnEz1Wx1Kdq5dXyB6ZTSJvh3SK1LqM2xHXs7441Kep5Ais6lhDIReiCP8IiBS8T4u44wcAjlHl_3LEPtgCdFosmIzlxO4niK1jniuD6Xd-CmTc10e0ZFJamxlQ_zbpUz1g3FWPxtNs3ms8MX6U8A-5XNjuwlRJogxXpuIKk7eTT7gmhDLeOgef4SYUqDzpUAR8dtqSaW-D9vcoyWtQ6hCJXQQ_lZjJOZBJCBatPIV3ml93p39g%3D%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. clean_body: My boss asked me to follow up with you today to make sure you had a moment to read the email he sent you a couple of months back. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Hi there - my name is Ross Purgason and I'm the campaign manager for Republican Alek Skarlatos, the Republican nominee for U.S. House in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. I'm fowarding you an email he sent several months back in hopes you might have time to read it today. Thank you for your time! Peter, Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes... August 21 st 2021 marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever. I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist. This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream. Right now, Democrats are... Opening and destroying our borders. They are granting dangerous amnesty that will flood every corner of America. Raising our taxes like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable. Defunding the police, leading to a surge in violent crime Erasing historical figures from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln Teetering on the edge of a dangerous foreign policy crisis These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. They only care about their own radical agenda. The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.** My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. Thank you very much, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Peter -

Months after mothers across America started worrying about how they would feed their children, the President of the United States is bragging about Europeans bailing out his incompetence!

We've all experienced the hardships and shortages throughout the Biden Administration. _**From empty grocery stores to a shortage of washers and dryers, now parents are literally unable to feed their newborns!**_

Our country is fighting its most significant supply shortage yet- **no baby formula.**

Biden claims he's addressing the issue, but 70,00 pounds of imported formula isn't enough to solve this crisis. **But with his poor track record in creating crisis after crisis, I have very little faith that his solution will solve this shortage.**

I don't believe that Joe Biden and the Democrats have what it takes to fix this crisis, and our women and children will pay the price!

The crisis caused by Democrats are piling up, and they don't have what it takes to fix them. [**True conservative republicans like me need to take back the House and get to work getting America back on track! | | | Friend,

Exciting news — the **National Education Association has endorsed Mike Van Someren for Congress!** Mike is proud to have earned the endorsement of these educators, and will work to be a champion for public schools in Congress.
---
| [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=22b51aafa6&e=356c0699dd)
---
| Mike understands that investing in education not only results in strong, thriving public schools, but molds bright kids with even brighter futures.

**If everyone is to have a fair shot at the American Dream, it starts before our kids are 18 and entering the workforce, or picking a college or trade school. It starts by building a solid foundation of skills and knowledge in public schools in K-12.

[Join the NEA and endorse Mike Van Someren for Congress today.](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=180883356a&e=356c0699dd)**

| We have to believe in our kids when they’re young to set them up on the road to a lifetime of success.

name: Ralph Rebandt For Governor
subject: New Press Release
body:
My thoughts on the recent events

| [ ](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_news_email&n=1)
---
# **PRESS RELEASE**
Yesterday evening Michigan lost. For years we’ve known that our entire system is corrupt, but until recently we haven’t known the depth and extent of the swamp even here in Michigan. There are more questions than answers right now. What we do know is that fraud took place, and although it’s too soon to point fingers, we must look at what we do know and start there. Someone forged signatures. We must start there and then work backwards and see where it ends. Wherever it ends.

Five Candidates for Governor of Michigan did not receive enough valid signatures to be placed on the ballot. Our campaign expresses a sincere regret to Michael Brown, Donna Brandenburg, James Craig, Perry Johnson, and Mark Markey. These patriots rose to stand up to the corrupt and disastrous Whitmer administration at great personal cost. I want to thank them personally for their sacrifices and to let them know that I am calling for a full investigation. We must remember that all of us suffer when evil triumphs.

While on the campaign trail for the past year, I have emphasized four values – truth, respect, dignity, and love. All four of these values were violated, and as a result, the fair election process that we all desire, and deserve, has been sabotaged.”

President John Adams said “Our Constitution was made only for a moral and religious people. It is wholly inadequate to the government of any other.” I am calling on the citizens of Michigan to pray for the moral and religious return to the Judeo-Christian principles that made us the greatest nation in the world. Thank you for your continued support. Ralph Rebandt For Governor
[http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_news_email&n=2)
Ralph Rebandt For Governor · MI 48094, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/unsubscribe?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_news_email&n=3).
You can also keep up with Ralph Rebandt For Governor on [Twitter](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNOLWyCuYNiwV9ZFyY__b-ZA&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_news_email&n=4) or [Facebook](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6uhbeqVmbeXGs-kYC9NuYd-tJTgdOC5xFCeUG_TRnUZF&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_news_email&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_news_email&n=6), software for leaders.

Derek is **proud of his record** fighting for your family & your rights as Kansas Attorney General. As Governor, he’ll **always be 100% committed to making Kansas a better place to live.** Friend, Laura Kelly can’t say the same. She’s **counting on her dark money supporters to confuse voters enough about what this race is really about so they will stay at home in November.** With your help, we can shine light on her failures: ❌ She **voted for** the biggest sales tax increase in Kansas history as a state senator, and as governor she **vetoed** numerous tax relief bills - including food sales tax cuts - that would have helped Kansans dealing with Joe Biden’s inflation and rising costs. Wages in the Kelly economy haven’t kept up with inflation for seven straight months. ❌ She **poorly mismanaged** our state response to the COVID pandemic, squandering $700 million in taxpayer money to fraudsters through unemployment claims at the Department of Labor while Kansans who were honestly seeking benefits because her lockdowns destroyed their jobs couldn’t get help. ❌ While the rest of the country has recovered 94% of jobs lost from COVID, **the Kelly administration lags far behind** with Kansas only having recovered 77% of the jobs eliminated by her lockdowns. Fewer Kansans are employed today than when Kelly took over in 2019. ❌ She **closed churches, schools, and businesses** but kept abortion clinics open throughout the pandemic, leading to a 13% increase in abortions in Kansas over the last two years. Now, more than half the abortions in Kansas are on mothers coming here from other states.
❌ She claims to be “middle of the road” but **she vetoed bills that most Kansans would consider common sense**.
