clean_body: The Kansas Legislature has adjourned for the year and the campaign to elect Derek Schmidt as our next governor is about to kick off in earnest. We are| | | | | Friend, The Kansas Legislature has adjourned for the year and the campaign to elect Derek Schmidt as our next governor is about to kick off in earnest. We are now only a little more than five months away from the general election where we must defeat Laura Kelly. I’ll be honest, we’re starting out in a massive hole. Kansas state law has prevented our campaign from asking for donations while the Legislature has been in session. We’ve followed the law and focused on helping our friends in the Legislature advance commonsense conservative policies, but now, friend, we just have one job left to do. Elect a Republican governor by defeating Laura Kelly. We are at a crossroads in Kansas state history with this election, and Kansas needs your help, friend. Governor Laura Kelly’s liberal dark money backers have been hard at work, relentlessly attacking Derek with nearly $3 million of television ads. The attacks are in full force, voter contact is underway, & our message is at risk of getting drowned out. Derek is proud of his record fighting for your family & your rights as Kansas Attorney General. As Governor, he’ll always be 100% committed to making Kansas a better place to live. Friend, Laura Kelly can’t say the same. She’s counting on her dark money supporters to confuse voters enough about what this race is really about so they will stay at home in November. With your help, we can shine light on her failures: ❌ She voted for the biggest sales tax increase in Kansas history as a state senator, and as governor she vetoed numerous tax relief bills - including food sales tax cuts - that would have helped Kansans dealing with Joe Biden’s inflation and rising costs. Wages in the Kelly economy haven’t kept up with inflation for seven straight months. ❌ She poorly mismanaged our state response to the COVID pandemic, squandering $700 million in taxpayer money to fraudsters through unemployment claims at the Department of Labor while Kansans who were honestly seeking benefits because her lockdowns destroyed their jobs couldn’t get help. ❌ While the rest of the country has recovered 94% of jobs lost from COVID, the Kelly administration lags far behind with Kansas only having recovered 77% of the jobs eliminated by her lockdowns. Fewer Kansans are employed today than when Kelly took over in 2019. ❌ She closed churches, schools, and businesses but kept abortion clinics open throughout the pandemic, leading to a 13% increase in abortions in Kansas over the last two years. Now, more than half the abortions in Kansas are on mothers coming here from other states. ❌ She claims to be “middle of the road” but she vetoed bills that most Kansans would consider common sense. Bills to prevent biological men from competing in women’s sports, to preserve parental input and involvement in their children’s education, and to make sure every Kansan who can work is working before getting government benefits. Kansas deserves better, friend. Derek needs your support to reach as MANY voters as possible to DEFEAT Laura Kelly. The clock is ticking. We can’t afford to wait any longer. Will you help? Thank you, CJ GroverCampaign Manager | | | | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | | | ---|---|---

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Please give us a chance to explain...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
In just a moment, we’re going to ask you to make a contribution to help Mark Kelly defend Arizona’s Senate seat. Please give us a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here’s the truth:
We may not know who our Republican opponent will be, but they sure know who they’re up against:
Us.
So, while we wait, dark money and corporate special interest groups are running millions of dollars in attack ads against us.
While we wait, Donald Trump is rallying his supporters by saying: “Taking back America starts with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
We may have to wait to know who our opponent will be, but we cannot wait to raise the money we need to win. And with our deadline just one week away, we have to ask:
[**Please, can you make your first $3 donation today? Our May fundraising deadline is exactly one week from today, and we need to hit our goals if we want to defend this seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?refcode=em220524-1-A&t=1&refcode2=2891_6688874_YjUHvF&akid=2891%2E6688874%2EYjUHvF)

body:

---
| | | Peter,

Today marks exactly **two weeks until Election Day** and we have incredible momentum!

What a weekend. We had an amazing turnout of enthusiastic supporters join us in San Carlos for the Hometown Days Parade, plus held three fundraisers and a meet-and-greet. We also knocked on hundreds of doors to talk with voters who are still making their decisions about who will earn their vote. Dedicated, hard-working volunteers make all the difference in a race like this. [**Can you pitch in for an hour or two this Memorial Day weekend to help us during the homestretch to ensure I make the “Top 2” on June 7th?**](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=ccafc57516&e=de8b2615ea)

[Here is an easy-to-follow template to send emails to your contacts about why you support Emily Beach for Congress.](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=7e979ba08d&e=de8b2615ea)

2. **Have you volunteered with our campaign yet?** [Sign up today to phone bank](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=9ea8fdd4d6&e=de8b2615ea) from your own home or [RSVP to join us at our Community Canvass this Saturday in Foster City, from 10:30 am – 12:00 pm.](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=e63df357dd&e=de8b2615ea)

3. **Have you voted yet?** Return your ballot today – don’t wait until the last minute!

Emily Beach

| | _Adam Schindler has the values and leadership to serve the voters of California's 50th District in San Diego. We’re counting on people like you to support Adam’s Independent effort to change Washington. If you would prefer to be removed from this list, please click to [unsubscribe](https://schindler4congress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=26f52603239d4d900dd89d343&id=cc2ba96c58&e=e1c04ba93f). _
---
|
# Are You Democrat or Republican?
Hi , The #1 question I get asked by voters is whether I am a Democrat or a Republican. The answer is that I am an independent.

Last week I replied to a voter's email about my party affiliation and then shared my response on [Twitter](https://schindler4congress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=26f52603239d4d900dd89d343&id=7d4a9fa334&e=e1c04ba93f). It resonated with a lot of people who think the two-party system is not working. Check it out below. If you agree that we need to change the formula and elect people to Congress who are committed to serving the people, please vote for me in the June 7th primary. You can find out more about me and my positions at [www.schindler4congress.com](https://schindler4congress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=26f52603239d4d900dd89d343&id=c6a11f5f8b&e=e1c04ba93f). Thank you, Adam Schindler, PhD
[**Please consider pitching in $5/$10/$20 to support Adam's 100% people-funded campaign.**](https://schindler4congress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=26f52603239d4d900dd89d343&id=f545fce7fc&e=e1c04ba93f)

name: Ellen Keast
subject: A Thank You from Herbster for Nebraska
body:
Good evening,

I want to thank all of the volunteers and supporters who worked tirelessly this past election cycle. Your continued support throughout the lies and fake news means the world to Charles and our campaign family.

While we came up short in this race, I believe that we have helped wake up tens of thousands of Patriotic Nebraskans across the state. Nebraskans, and not only Republicans, do not like the direction our country has gone under the Biden administration, or the way our state has been failed by RINOs and establishment Republicans in leadership positions.

Finally, we need your help one last time. Volunteers helped us put out nearly 30,000 yard signs and over 2,000 bigger signs. If you have a sign in your yard or on your property, please take it down and properly dispose of the signs. If you see a sign left out or need help, please email Rod at [rod@cwherbster.com](mailto:rod@cwherbster.com). We will work to get someone there as quickly as possible.

Again, thank you for all of your support! May God Bless Nebraska and the United States of America!

Best,

\--

**Ellen Keast**
Campaign Manager
[ellen@cwherbster.com](mailto:ellen@cwherbster.com)
712.579.6720 mobile
[HerbsterForNebraska.com](http://herbsterfornebraska.com/ "http://herbsterfornebraska.com/")

This message is not meant to constitute an electronic signature or intent to contract electronically.

On May 27th, join me and David Barton at the Faith and Freedom Summit! I am teaming up with historian and best-selling author David Barton. Barton is the founder of WallBuilders, a national, pro-family organization that presents America’s forgotten history and heroes with an emphasis on our constitutional heritage. During this one-day event, David will help us to explore Faith and Freedom within the United States. WallBuilders is an organization dedicated to presenting America’s forgotten history and heroes, with an emphasis on the moral, religious, and constitutional foundation on which America was built – a foundation which, in recent years, has been seriously attacked and undermined. _**Tickets are FREE, but space is limited!**_ RSVP today to make sure you get registered! Click this link or the button below: _**https://www.eventbrite.com/e/faith-and-freedom-summit-with-david-barton-and-vicky-hartzler-tickets-330239644667.**_

clean_body: Join the Faith and Freedom Summit with David Barton and Vicky Hartzler| | | | | | Friend, On May 27th, join me and David Barton at the Faith and Freedom Summit! I am teaming up with historian and best-selling author David Barton. Barton is the founder of WallBuilders, a national, pro-family organization that presents America’s forgotten history and heroes with an emphasis on our constitutional heritage. During this one-day event, David will help us to explore Faith and Freedom within the United States. WallBuilders is an organization dedicated to presenting America’s forgotten history and heroes, with an emphasis on the moral, religious, and constitutional foundation on which America was built – a foundation which, in recent years, has been seriously attacked and undermined. Tickets are FREE, but space is limited! RSVP today to make sure you get registered! Click this link or the button below: . One last thing— if you can, please consider contributing to my campaign by donating below. We are headed down the homestretch, and every dollar is critical! CONTRIBUTE God Bless, Vicky Hartzler | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Vicky Hartzler for Senate.Click to unsubscribe.

body:
The stakes are high this election, and I’m counting on your support.
Peter,

In 2020, the Democrats spent over $130 MILLION to try and flip South Carolina blue, but it was only because of supporters like you I was able to fend off their attacks and win.

The Big Money Left is back this year, and now they’re attacking my good friend – Utah Senator Mike Lee. He is being outraised, so I am asking for your help. Mike can win in November, which will help Republicans Reclaim the Senate majority, but it will take everyone chipping in to ensure he can be competitive.

Mike has fallen behind his fundraising deadline, so I’m counting on hearing from you. Mike is in a unique re-election fight in Utah. His “independent” opponent - Evan McMullin - has been endorsed by the Utah Democrat Party, even though he won’t appear as a Democrat on the ballot. Therefore, all Democrats and Independents are being urged to vote for McMullin through a political sleight of hand, even though he won’t have “Democrat” next to his name.

McMullin’s campaign is raising MILLIONS OF DOLLARS thanks to liberal groups like the Lincoln Project, and he’s showing no signs of slowing down.

With the Senate on the line and Mike behind his fundraising deadline that ends at midnight, [**will you act right now and help give his campaign the boost it needs to win?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=872a0fce62c44efeb733c411d7b5b1a2&_e=rqzrg8Sih8mRuPbg2wFhw70vAvDE72NWoF-XGZvi9jfma7oLuH0eBD_zvcXVM9_liAwW7OjvJ54cJuY0wcb97ti-fz9kXqmWCY669uREiS_9opuj2HA9ENLMxBtMR_GdTWjBycFaf_dGtAxyrhmsv4wcf-YWjCHJSbUAr7YWneOePe2uafSHPGocoGZyCQXwLvuiemg6bgmwg1WCpKRM7OkM95vDXwLo1H9ecKssZJSwDlOi9-y45x7bmSZE1OUg4cOJChZW_AK9UdyTRRDl8P-mK7ilCWjy3y7hCKzf1zjJHlO54YpAUbTPUG2WosvDMNzHRFC10q0ktEBNcWkNXgKhN5Frvr3007lzWyghbjGsrn1aPNsf2wqr7idSXg0Q)

clean_body: The stakes are high this election, and I’m counting on your support. Peter, In 2020, the Democrats spent over $130 MILLION to try and flip South Carolina blue, but it was only because of supporters like you I was able to fend off their attacks and win. The Big Money Left is back this year, and now they’re attacking my good friend – Utah Senator Mike Lee. He is being outraised, so I am asking for your help. Mike can win in November, which will help Republicans Reclaim the Senate majority, but it will take everyone chipping in to ensure he can be competitive. Mike has fallen behind his fundraising deadline, so I’m counting on hearing from you. Mike is in a unique re-election fight in Utah. His “independent” opponent - Evan McMullin - has been endorsed by the Utah Democrat Party, even though he won’t appear as a Democrat on the ballot. Therefore, all Democrats and Independents are being urged to vote for McMullin through a political sleight of hand, even though he won’t have “Democrat” next to his name. McMullin’s campaign is raising MILLIONS OF DOLLARS thanks to liberal groups like the Lincoln Project, and he’s showing no signs of slowing down. With the Senate on the line and Mike behind his fundraising deadline that ends at midnight, When my campaign was being outraised in 2020, you delivered for me. Thanks, Lindsey Graham | Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc. Don't want to receive our emails? The stakes are high this election, and I’m counting on your support.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben=20Smilowitz?=
subject: 8 weeks until the Primary - I need you now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ben Smilowitz for Congress
body:
Peter, can you donate or volunteer? | | | |
---
|
---
| | | **Dear Peter,**

The Primary is eight weeks from today, with early and mail-in voting starting in early June!

**Let’s be honest – these next few weeks are the most critical,** before mail-in ballots go out and as people start to solidify their voting choices. I’m making calls and knocking on thousands of doors, but this is a grassroots campaign – _**you make the difference.**_

**If you want to see this campaign win,_NOW_ is the time to [donate](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=6175395919&e=0faa9de128) and [get involved](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=7d1c1f47e3&e=0faa9de128). **

We are getting overwhelming support from voters across the district and **_we can win_ if we reach enough voters.** I can't do that without _YOU_.

Our campaign has some major opportunities to reach tens of thousands of voters and we need to raise another $35,000 -- minimum!

**Can you give anything today to help us chip away at that daunting number?[$25, $50, 250, $1,000 – anything at all helps. You can chip in here.](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=cd344131f2&e=0faa9de128)[ ](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=0a010cbad6&e=0faa9de128)**
---
| **If you can’t donate,[please sign up to volunteer](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=061ce6421a&e=0faa9de128). **There are many ways to get involved from your own home or neighborhood! YOU can help take this seat back for the hardworking Marylanders of MD-6.

Rep. Trone is out-of-touch, as we can see in his past massive donations to anti-choice and anti-democracy Republican extremists like TX Governor Greg Abbott, TX Attorney General Ken Paxton, AZ Gov Doug Ducey, and NC U.S. Senator Thom Tillis. He continues to run this multi-billion dollar business while serving in Congress. **We can do so much better!**

Let’s make these next few weeks matter. Thank you for all you're doing!

Sincerely,
Ben

[www.BenSmilowitz.com](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=5d63bc7dbd&e=0faa9de128)
[facebook.com/Smilowitz4MD](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=a446e557aa&e=0faa9de128)
[twitter.com/Ben_Smilowitz](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=8d5dbc5ed2&e=0faa9de128)
---
| | | | Paid for by Ben Smilowitz for Congress
---
| **Our mailing address is:**
Ben Smilowitz for CongressPO Box 275Gaithersburg, MD 20884-0275
[Add us to your address book](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=67b0595157)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=67b0595157&e=0faa9de128&c=b11bcec8be) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=67b0595157&e=0faa9de128&c=b11bcec8be).

clean_body: We are on a mission today to oust the last anti-choice Democrat in the House. | | | Peter, this is ridiculous. On the same day as the runoff in TX-28, Nancy Pelosi went on MSNBC and talked about the threat to abortion rights. But, she continues to support Henry Cuellar, an anti-choice Democrat. Every anti-choice politician is a threat to our reproductive rights and access to abortion — that includes Henry Cuellar. We are on a mission today to oust the last anti-choice Democrat in the House — and we’re going to do just that. Our community cannot count on Cuellar to stand up for our rights. Access to abortion is health care. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Today, we’re going to show the political establishment we have the grassroots support to win. Thank you for your support, Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

Hi there - my name is Ross Purgason and I'm the campaign manager for Republican Alek Skarlatos, the Republican nominee for U.S. House in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. **I'm fowarding you an email he sent several months back in hopes you might have time to read it today**.

Thank you for your time!

Fellow Conservative,

Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st 2021 marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

**I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe**. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4a59b552977f43f188f5fc6bf2a18502&_e=RIW14WtDWVb4wkkR8vCLjZDx0_TErySX8E0KbVj1tS1Noootp5qW4kRlSGoVABw0M_YLkn03vEH6oug7ItQ4gKl2-Z1zL5u98WCK2Un13yX0J8mRF0oZ8pM9tf3fqBzfEo6gFt6n2YBDpfEdqZ11iGkF_V1x_l8IrLes4riv2p027D6GMWGmH7k-stZzyn-QDG9iSehiDzu4VfG35mvDm_begEsVK1bCqks52TUdMMueBT_hMAlkvb_BswjF67rIvdHH9fwDn9DugQ7-CbT1DitHoC0VkymliA9jyMM8CneXPKWUD33BW5vlZduVCVRXtWWwi2pP4KMhIsapM1i1BzhOvzvNYmRAziE0w_A7ZDmJjr-1drXrBirhwtZc8E_HNUblezzpwXdMLGOfDQ_HOJLvqpbPG6AD5yL3YeGqG1-EeuB6Gz8_Y9igOAAcKIplfNZdoADfwl0IRGWUyr9YIw%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4a59b552977f43f188f5fc6bf2a18502&_e=RIW14WtDWVb4wkkR8vCLjZDx0_TErySX8E0KbVj1tS1Noootp5qW4kRlSGoVABw0M_YLkn03vEH6oug7ItQ4gKl2-Z1zL5u98WCK2Un13yX0J8mRF0oZ8pM9tf3fqBzfEo6gFt6n2YBDpfEdqZ11iGkF_V1x_l8IrLes4riv2p027D6GMWGmH7k-stZzyn-QDG9iSehiDzu4VfG35mvDm_begEsVK1bCqks52TUdMMueBT_hMAlkvb_BswjF67rIWnNmNlfYTDWIhrAtX-OVdUP0e2birM_tCYq-Er_1zEn0UJIA85AnoFWOqCSsjHycN7C84estFI_qFv100O1Pec2Ah8agLdWUfxn5EuL88ckbQYWFPVQgzREu5bkBiIxXpqTC1hsHsJkNYEP8wuGC4Jus85y8Uh_DEaQhuZSJk7ODOAq3d7UI6XD-NRozdOivMJgEespKuxN5tXL63Nx98Q%3D%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4a59b552977f43f188f5fc6bf2a18502&_e=RIW14WtDWVb4wkkR8vCLjZDx0_TErySX8E0KbVj1tS1Noootp5qW4kRlSGoVABw0M_YLkn03vEH6oug7ItQ4gKl2-Z1zL5u98WCK2Un13yX0J8mRF0oZ8pM9tf3fqBzfEo6gFt6n2YBDpfEdqZ11iGkF_V1x_l8IrLes4riv2p027D6GMWGmH7k-stZzyn-QDG9iSehiDzu4VfG35mvDm_begEsVK1bCqks52TUdMMueBT_hMAlkvb_BswjF67rIgU_YPy_9P2gb4BxiF58OL7XjSm3zQrn5DTl5_Dh8Wh3A2yICaZb8gTfzfSSTEowPQet46c2a_5QQFd9f8VgIA8aBY02g1NeZluTIckqeiZfwSqmSxL2JJHj7-ZdfnwBT9mCrQ_Ke-UCp4MdWDOiDDiDFAXTV5KRgZL9VSPWqZoJ4XKCM9_VYLnau36zvk9GAXqdI1yEFZ77zgS3gtYJDEw%3D%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $6 today?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4a59b552977f43f188f5fc6bf2a18502&_e=RIW14WtDWVb4wkkR8vCLjZDx0_TErySX8E0KbVj1tS1Noootp5qW4kRlSGoVABw0M_YLkn03vEH6oug7ItQ4gKl2-Z1zL5u98WCK2Un13yX0J8mRF0oZ8pM9tf3fqBzfEo6gFt6n2YBDpfEdqZ11iGkF_V1x_l8IrLes4riv2p027D6GMWGmH7k-stZzyn-QDG9iSehiDzu4VfG35mvDm_begEsVK1bCqks52TUdMMueBT_hMAlkvb_BswjF67rIDSyG18WZl-KSNI4t9O7CN3JIwhoqZgp0rGPspI8aAi-ENCO0GrfSd0Z1H-mZJyNtqmsWtKl38Lzq-5wvcju1DG7p7rvjBTBQ7PBA0m-tckrI3eA-5qJb0ZrCoK_hqa7ZQvVLW-nY6RQVZIcUsItDHtffETzRDZvq2Pi9tWxG7C13MZwOXlJXX5AuMKDQDz5H3HPstkcQLeHZEc8V_OA_sA%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4a59b552977f43f188f5fc6bf2a18502&_e=RIW14WtDWVb4wkkR8vCLjZDx0_TErySX8E0KbVj1tS1Noootp5qW4kRlSGoVABw0M_YLkn03vEH6oug7ItQ4gKl2-Z1zL5u98WCK2Un13yX0J8mRF0oZ8pM9tf3fqBzfEo6gFt6n2YBDpfEdqZ11iGkF_V1x_l8IrLes4riv2p027D6GMWGmH7k-stZzyn-QDG9iSehiDzu4VfG35mvDm_begEsVK1bCqks52TUdMMueBT_hMAlkvb_BswjF67rIJRctHAMd-jXa2TWtvn0iUxsU1xrpeAPxpxcyBzgSZD-ILGlXjpBtfztpguz4XkjKrmqR0K6e_3RaQXK-LY1lGH2Dz7x7Cx0nXLyW2wR0P_vK4YPt4Z09xF8ihf-SGl7T5yJsxbEOhiY6AfIxcyBTM_JatgLJXiXRbWqtFbn0MDITiaTncPEjT7Eb46DfLrafyfBQEuRJR_Tk2a5rB54x7g%3D%3D)

Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

name: Team AOC
subject: Baby formula crisis: Explained
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
It’s important that we understand HOW we got here and how this happened to prevent it from happening again.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220524-3051-header&t=1&akid=3051%2E2526796%2Egafowr)
This weekend, Alexandria hosted an _Ask Me Anything_ session on Instagram where **someone asked about the baby formula shortage**.
So, we wanted to take a moment to share via email what’s going on and how we ended up here.
First, we want to acknowledge that this has been a scary event for families with newborns. We see you.
### **Before we get into how we got here, is there a solution or end in sight for the baby formula shortage?**
Yes, help is on the way. This week, the White House authorized “Operation Fly Formula,” which means that the U.S. is working with allies to begin imports of baby formula that meet U.S. safety standards to make up for the current shortage.
The first shipment of over a million bottles just arrived from Switzerland.
The White House also invoked the Defense Production Act last week to kickstart domestic production as well. In addition, the House passed a $28 million baby formula shortage bill despite 192 Republicans voting against the bill (only 12 supported it).1
But, it’s important that we understand HOW we got here and how this happened to prevent it from happening again.
### **So what happened here?**
In short, corporate monopolies are a major reason behind the baby formula shortage.
Did you know that the ENTIRE U.S. infant formula market is controlled by just three or four companies?
That means that if something happens to one supplier, the entire supply is crippled. And that’s exactly what happened. This is actually a growing structural problem within huge parts of our food system overall, but it hit infant formula in a big way.
### **Here’s how it went down:**
One of those companies, Abbott Labs, had long been warned by the FDA about increasingly dangerous conditions in their formula factories that were endangering the safety of U.S. infant formula supply.
However, while Abbott produced a huge portion of U.S. infant formula, infant formula was only a tiny percent of their revenue (less than 5%). So they didn’t really pay as much attention, investment, or care to their formula business. It wasn’t their moneymaker.
Abbott let their factories get worse, FDA inspections continued to show flags, and whistleblowers came forward stating Abbott was falsifying their records and ignoring consumer reports that babies were getting sick.
In February, Abbott recalled some of its most popular formulas after four babies became sick with bacterial infections after consuming some of their products.
Around this time, the FDA inspections of Abbott’s formula factories got so bad that after repeated attempts and warnings, the factory had to be shut down. It was just too dangerous.
So Abbott, which controlled 48% of the market, halted production.
To be clear, the underlying forces causing this shortage are rampant throughout our _entire_ food system.
### **Alexandria sounded the alarm long before this crisis.**
During a congressional hearing, Alexandria warned that corporate monopolies are threatening our food supply, risking price gouging, and hurting wages. Our leaders have been warned about this for a long time. As Alexandria said, “I hate being right about these things.”
It’s shocking that just a few Big Ag and factory farm companies control major sectors of our food supply, like meat processing or soybean production.
[**If you’d like to dig into this more and other topics from the last few weeks, please watch and share Alexandria’s Instagram Live.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13651?t=2&akid=3051%2E2526796%2Egafowr)
Our movement has always been about listening to the alarm bells, learning from our past mistakes to prevent future crises, and holding corporations accountable.
We can do better, and that’s what Alexandria and our movement is fighting for.
Thanks for being in it alongside us.
Team AOC

Alexandria is up for re-election in November and our campaign relies exclusively on grassroots donations. It’s one reason why we are the #1 small-dollar funded campaign in Congress.
[If you can, please consider making a $6 donation today to keep Alexandria fighting for our agenda in Congress.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220524?refcode=em20220524-3051-P_OTH_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=3051_2526796_gafowr&akid=3051%2E2526796%2Egafowr)
**[Contribute $6](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220524?refcode=em20220524-3051-P_OTH_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&refcode2=3051_2526796_gafowr&akid=3051%2E2526796%2Egafowr)**
1 - [Washington Post](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13652?t=5&akid=3051%2E2526796%2Egafowr)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220524?refcode=em20220524-3051-P_OTH_EXP_MIS&t=6&refcode2=3051_2526796_gafowr&akid=3051%2E2526796%2Egafowr)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220524-3051-P_OTH_EXP_MIS&t=7&akid=3051%2E2526796%2Egafowr)**

body:
Beto truly believes that listening to people's concerns and responding with action is what being a good leader is all about.
#
The truth is that this campaign is about so much more than just one person. **It's about all of us, joining together and stepping up to build a bigger, better vision for Texas.**
Beto truly believes that listening to people's concerns and responding with real action is what being a good leader is all about, so we want to know more about why you're here.
[We'd love to hear how you became involved in our movement and what inspired you to become a supporter of Beto. Will you please take a moment to take this quick survey?](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/supporter-survey/?source=em20220524-nd&t=1&akid=190787%2E444211%2EZNekYc)
**[Start your supporter survey »](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/supporter-survey/?source=em20220524-nd&t=2&akid=190787%2E444211%2EZNekYc)**
Since Beto's time in Congress, he has never accepted a cent from corporate PACs or their special interests. The only reason we're able to run this campaign is because of grassroots supporters like you. We couldn't be more grateful.
With your support, we're building a people-powered movement to defeat Greg Abbott. You're at the heart of this team, so we want to hear your perspective to help inform our strategy to win in November.

body:
Do you know how important you are to this campaign?
#

Friends --
I'd like to tell you how important you are to this campaign.
When I think about our top supporters, I don't think about the ones who have given the most money.
I think about the people who were there when we needed them most. So far, tens of thousands of people have contributed to this campaign.
But now that I am officially the Democratic nominee to flip North Carolina's Senate seat, I need you more than ever.
So I am asking you today:
[**Can you please make your first online contribution of $3 to my campaign for U.S. Senate? | | In the coming days our newest commercial will begin to air on television.

Commercial: [https://youtu.be/e9jg35k2NYU](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=f89716afb6&e=102b599530)

Unlike my two competitors, within the party, this commercial is a message of hope and promise.

The time for tearing each other down must come to an end and we must unify to defeat our failure of a Governor. I am the only candidate who can unify the party because our campaign is not attached to any insider faction. We are attached to the people!

Extreme progressive's have torn our beautiful state to shreds and it is clear they will not stop until there is nothing left.

I humbly seek your financial support. In efforts to further promote our commercial through additional channels to provide an opportunity for all New Mexicans to see there is hope for a better tomorrow.

name: Welch for Vermont
subject: We’d like to hear directly from you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Can you take a moment to share why you’re supporting Peter as Vermont’s next senator?

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=441%2E61531%2EjMpO07)
It means everything to have you on this team. Thanks for making this campaign possible.
Peter’s running for Senate because it’s an All Hands On Deck moment to defend our democracy and deliver for families in Vermont. That’s how he’s delivered change as Vermont’s congressman, and how he’ll continue making progress as senator.
[**But everyone has their own reason for being a part of this team. That’s what makes our campaign strong. So we’d like to ask you to share: Why are you supporting Peter?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-support-peter-story-share/?source=em_20220524_s_t_support&t=3&akid=441%2E61531%2EjMpO07)
There’s a lot on the line in November, but with your continued support, Peter will get results for families in Vermont and across the country. He’ll keep leading the charge for affordable child care, lower prescription drug prices, and a Green New Deal.
And he’d love to hear from you about why you’re on this team.
We’re building a strong grassroots coalition the Vermont way—by listening, and working together.
[**So we’re asking: Can you share why you’re supporting Peter as Vermont’s next senator?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-support-peter-story-share/?source=em_20220524_s_t_support&t=4&akid=441%2E61531%2EjMpO07)
Thanks for being on this team,
Welch for Vermont

---

---

Hello,
Today, our country is yet again facing the grim reality that has become commonplace in America: Another school shooting; another community devastated by gun violence; another day of wondering about America’s fascination with firearms and whispering “thoughts and prayers.”
Most Republicans want us to believe that the answer to stopping gun violence in this country is _more_ firearms. That’s just not true, but the Republican blinders are on because the NRA is paying them handsomely.
**Just days after the last major school shooting in Oxford, Michigan, my opponent Chuck Grassley went on the Senate floor and BLOCKED a bill requiring universal background checks for gun purchases. You cannot make this up.**
I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because I’m done with Republicans kowtowing to the NRA and caring more about their campaign donations than the lives of our children.
[**If you’re ready to elect a Democrat who will take on the NRA – not take their blood money – then chip in $5 or whatever you can afford right now to my campaign. With your help now, we can defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45705904/347129686/-42398318?refcode=em20220524pm2-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTZlODlhNi1iZGRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Q75y5oz9EXDDKKJvwxkDG5OKbzuhz1V4kq6rTISQok=)

clean_body: Hello, Today, our country is yet again facing the grim reality that has become commonplace in America: Another school shooting; another community devastated by gun violence; another day of wondering about America’s fascination with firearms and whispering “thoughts and prayers.” Most Republicans want us to believe that the answer to stopping gun violence in this country is more firearms. That’s just not true, but the Republican blinders are on because the NRA is paying them handsomely. Just days after the last major school shooting in Oxford, Michigan, my opponent Chuck Grassley went on the Senate floor and BLOCKED a bill requiring universal background checks for gun purchases. You cannot make this up. I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because I’m done with Republicans kowtowing to the NRA and caring more about their campaign donations than the lives of our children. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being part of this campaign, Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.) http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=e0683f44a1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_24_06_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-e0683f44a1-584862049

** Isn't it time to put Colorado First?
------------------------------------------------------------

** The 10th Amendment Protects Colorado's Interests.
------------------------------------------------------------

It is paramount that we elect a candidate who understands this principle and has the experience to apply it to the Office of Governor.

It's time to put Colorado First and People Over Politics!

Volunteer (https://www.lopez2022.com/volunteer-1?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=e0683f44a1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_24_06_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-e0683f44a1-584862049) Become a Game Changer (https://www.lopez2022.com/volunteer-1?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=e0683f44a1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_24_06_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-e0683f44a1-584862049) Donate (https://www.lopez2022.com/donate?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=e0683f44a1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_24_06_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-e0683f44a1-584862049)

============================================================
** (http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=e0683f44a1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_24_06_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-e0683f44a1-584862049)
We are Coloradans who want to freely and responsibly live our best lives. We refuse to be told by so-called experts and politicians how we must live. Together, we can flip the power back to the people by electing a new governor that’s one of us, for all of us. Vote for Greg Lopez, a proven servant leader who puts people over politics to make Colorado the State of Systemic Opportunity for all.

subject: TODAY IS ELECTION DAY
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| **POLLS ARE CLOSING SOON!**

Make sure you go vote for Mitchell Swan before it’s too late! If you are in line before 7PM they have to let you vote! To find your polling location, you can use the Georgia Secretary of State’s web portal [https://mvp.sos.ga.gov/s/](https://colonelswanforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0368302df230e4a82cd29bd86&id=6ed1371e5c&e=85e5151e18) or [https://www.vote.org/polling-place-locator/](https://colonelswanforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0368302df230e4a82cd29bd86&id=6edbfe9c57&e=85e5151e18) I’m looking forward to victory this evening and serving you in Congress as your next 10th District Representative! Semper Fidelis, Colonel Mitch Swan

|

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: Why is Pelosi supporting ANTI-choice politicians?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
Today, progressive Jessica Cisneros is up for election in Texas, where she confronts forces including Nancy Pelosi's support for anti-choice, conservative Democrat Henry Cuellar | | |
---
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78ORT8Pt3SALA3pMGVDypeKbyy2kgsjsCmnmy8k7FgsqB6wuCJ9K2SYervuUQSBWz0OyLO7ny_ETzsiVFsDgLMVQGvNbuFxUKxus0N948OKXdhZoN6Uhx1FkNEMj3EhcS6kWCkB4qwsebZL4aojjr1quc8u9gAbbYK2233iznNHD6hVlq48zBSPJBsAPwlWskDf9qusmm-itxRy3kfLq0o3ytbf_pyKbL0FAW8HSYXdFJdiYGT0JZDEVPJBNADUHucAHpG0Bcnz3QIRPGwTV9Gz5pnFypxqC2eaKzqzop2zSh-VGkH8ug4_6HQ4N0X7dQP3DYSc6c_MSup6DwTTWaWYE_8oiBkqtLecDp5qhaq3Yuq/3mb/JlvTNg5nRIGur2Oo4oPtCg/h0/9VTM7rwxBmZdFXKeRDlh8oojNuP7WjiIC92o3m2P11k)
| | Dear Peter, Today, the future of U.S. politics faces a crucial test in Texas, where the state's 28th congressional district is holding a runoff pitting the most conservative Democrat in the House against progressive challenger Jessica Cisneros.
Cisneros is facing headwinds including the substantial weight of House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, who outrageously supports Cuellar despite mouthing support for abortion rights. [**Can you join us today to hold hypocrisy accountable?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MJdR8o-uQtvtEc_PQRXPGdc3ZuhjMT5Mjc5I5u3_Vsp9mhVJy4gwj0ky9BJkh-SymY7K5Opxwas9xRt7D4FUCncxJhgt0vURO_t07iUeWx7TxPyMX9qVXCVN-nEuLbjeVY-P4AXuF-RNjmnErwdByFksAHNkznKHq4AtjwDehyhsgd_Fbv1DxcYpy1LKV6FAsGhXfRgXVHP1C9pushUtfGV9jWgJw2WPh2Ts_12-gu7P9psJiQIrXvpdSng0VcccVPl3ON5wDm2mL6F4_PbevFiNczjccG_rGqGZBoq971njqFftJ4WuWqptgNGA2i_91Tgn8q4SuXrfwL03Vcwmxdw/3mb/JlvTNg5nRIGur2Oo4oPtCg/h1/cJzk12PosiRwyCIG1j5we8oj1WkoXV3gdBX5mxr5Ab8) Earlier this week, Pelosi was in the national news—yet again—for reasons that appear absurd on reflection. The reality is frankly so ridiculous that we hope to see sketch comedians explain what the news has obscured. The archbishop of San Francisco denied Nancy Pelosi communion, citing her supposed support for abortion rights. There are so many things wrong with this that I'll just summarize them quickly.
1. It's an impermissible attack on the separation of church and state. Our Constitution includes an Establishment Clause for many good reasons.

2. It's an offensive projection of a religious leader's preferences on the democratic process to undermine fundamental human rights. We invite the archbishop to stay in his lane.

3. It's a sad reflection of outright ignorance, since Pelosi is actively undermining the right to choose today, long after having abandoned it years ago. We invite the archbishop to get his facts straight.

4. It's yet another example of how journalists construct cults of personality, undermining democratic accountability and their own profession by ignoring facts. We invite editors to expose the hypocrisy that both Pelosi and the archbishop share.

5. It distracts the news cycle from alternative subjects that could, with any independence, enable change. For instance, the press not only fabricated a narrative that Pelosi is paying a personal price for her supposedly stalwart defense of rights that she is undermining in practice, but continues to ignore stories that could actually help. We invite editors to cover our proposal for states, including California, to pass bills that would activate boycotts of states poised to deny basic rights should Roe fall, in order to threaten commerce and compel the Justices to reject the draft opinion leaked a few weeks ago.

I know what it means to pay a personal price for standing up for progressive principles. An oligarch born with a silver spoon in her mouth most certainly does not. [**Would you like to be represented in Congress by someone who has actually faced obstacles and overcome them, demonstrating a deep commitment to our principles, or instead a dynastic oligarch who mouths support for them while repeatedly undermining them in practice?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MJdR8o-uQtvtEc_PQRXPGdc3ZuhjMT5Mjc5I5u3_Vsp9u6Vl32q9RUodbnMyLLuPcR22T4CL4tHWlcmYYi0LAZzaNxHVLCljpOLZWBZEeRn2ivxzRuLSyUe38ftgDoCkadeCdaJRe5ixR6-xVbMHqSrymDT1qm81HpQAYNa9hap9qbTfHq-9NOmFBAzMapYYNWgU1DdulmthNzVgSc_zYq8YvasdsLtn8d3T1F2C93IX8WE5hzD80sIaniH27s8x5dHd093ooave2E6B2LTzS4dJgl5DsGf91ShDq7rjYV7KXiLtUtVxEGth6vzPRzcyBb8yoB0oxewPS5Z8BJMCRRp/3mb/JlvTNg5nRIGur2Oo4oPtCg/h2/KNUr_DC73OHgrGWmUTWp9nP1jonTWWmqlIfW0m498Bg)

clean_body: Today, progressive Jessica Cisneros is up for election in Texas, where she confronts forces including Nancy Pelosi's support for anti-choice, conservative Democrat Henry Cuellar | | | | | Dear Peter, Today, the future of U.S. politics faces a crucial test in Texas, where the state's 28th congressional district is holding a runoff pitting the most conservative Democrat in the House against progressive challenger Jessica Cisneros. Cisneros is facing headwinds including the substantial weight of House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, who outrageously supports Cuellar despite mouthing support for abortion rights. Earlier this week, Pelosi was in the national news—yet again—for reasons that appear absurd on reflection. The reality is frankly so ridiculous that we hope to see sketch comedians explain what the news has obscured. The archbishop of San Francisco denied Nancy Pelosi communion, citing her supposed support for abortion rights. There are so many things wrong with this that I'll just summarize them quickly. 1. It's an impermissible attack on the separation of church and state. Our Constitution includes an Establishment Clause for many good reasons. 2. It's an offensive projection of a religious leader's preferences on the democratic process to undermine fundamental human rights. We invite the archbishop to stay in his lane. 3. It's a sad reflection of outright ignorance, since Pelosi is actively undermining the right to choose today, long after having abandoned it years ago. We invite the archbishop to get his facts straight. 4. It's yet another example of how journalists construct cults of personality, undermining democratic accountability and their own profession by ignoring facts. We invite editors to expose the hypocrisy that both Pelosi and the archbishop share. 5. It distracts the news cycle from alternative subjects that could, with any independence, enable change. For instance, the press not only fabricated a narrative that Pelosi is paying a personal price for her supposedly stalwart defense of rights that she is undermining in practice, but continues to ignore stories that could actually help. We invite editors to cover our proposal for states, including California, to pass bills that would activate boycotts of states poised to deny basic rights should Roe fall, in order to threaten commerce and compel the Justices to reject the draft opinion leaked a few weeks ago. I know what it means to pay a personal price for standing up for progressive principles. An oligarch born with a silver spoon in her mouth most certainly does not. Since Pelosi is continuing to duck debates for the 35th year in a row, we’ve been forced to inform voters not only about our campaign, but also the basic facts—including the fact that an election is even happening at all. Until this morning, no print publication serving San Francisco had ever covered the election currently underway through June 7. Earlier today, a local newspaper published an opinion column that we look forward to sharing with you later this week. Today, we aim to show solidarity with the Cisneros campaign, and Texans who have been clamoring for real representation despite the machinations of corporate Democrats. We're grateful that many voices from around the country have rallied behind Cisneros, while also sadly aware that—from labor unions to "progressive" organizations, and even stalwart national figures by whom we've been inspired—the vast majority of them remain too timid to challenge Pelosi. Thanks for standing with us as we work to defend the future from the failures of the past! Your voice, Shahid | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St., Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94102 | | Sent via . body:
Friend -- This past weekend was the largest convention for the Wisconsin Republican Party in a decade and we could not have pulled this off without YOU, our grassroots supporters! The one thing we confirmed this weekend is the amount of people that **stand together in support of re-electing Senator Ron Johnson and DEFEATING Tony Evers is insurmountable for the radical left’s efforts.** We set a great precedent this weekend for what we need heading into the next several months, but we are not done. name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Win or Lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mtg_election_day_nd&n=1)
---
Friend --

Another week, and another primary election day. This time, our eyes are on Georgia, where Country First has been _very_ active working to do the following: 1) Defeat **Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene** in the GOP primary 2) Re-nominate **Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger** in the GOP primary (you'll recall Brad refused Trump's demands to "find" the votes he needed to win Georgia's electoral votes) We've been working overtime to implement our [Primary First](https://www.country1st.com/primaryfirst?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mtg_election_day_nd&n=2) strategy, which recruits disaffected Republicans, Independents, and Democrats to participate in Republican primaries to help elect reasonable candidates and defeat the toxic ones who might otherwise win. The [early data](https://www.country1st.com/atlanta_journal_constitution_data_shows_thousands_of_democrats_voting_in_gop_primary?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mtg_election_day_nd&n=3) from Georgia is showing our efforts are making an impact, with thousands of registered Democrats voting in Georgia's Republican primary who normally don't. Will it be enough? We won't know until this evening. But regardless of whether we have two wins, a mixed result, or two losses -- I'm confident we'll move the needle. And it will become easier, in future primary seasons, as we empower more of the reasonable majority to unrig our primary election system. | [](https://www.country1st.com/get_involved?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mtg_election_day_nd&n=4 "Get Involved! Volunteer Opportunities") [Get Involved! Volunteer Opportunities](https://www.country1st.com/get_involved?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mtg_election_day_nd&n=4)
---
Fingers crossed for two great wins tonight! And as always, thanks for all you do to bring this movement to life.
Country First,

Adam
| [](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mtg_election_day_nd&n=5 "Support the Mission") [Support the Mission](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mtg_election_day_nd&n=5)
---

name: Josh Lafazan
subject: Tonight I am absolutely disgusted, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45706334/347156273/1524799354?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDVhZWIxMi1jYmRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-gBpFr2v3fCPJEZK6dxkYIA5ScXnTTAtfOwERWrmAo0=&emci=53a5ec4e-c8db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=1d5aeb12-cbdb-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=17773801)
---

| | Peter, As I write this, at least 18 children and one teacher have been murdered in an elementary school shooting in Uvalde, Texas. These were sweet, innocent 2nd, 3rd, and 4th grade children. There are 18 families in Texas tonight whose child will never be coming home from school. I am enraged, saddened, heartbroken, and my heart is with the families of the students and teacher killed. **Enough is enough. Thoughts and prayers alone without action cannot be enough.** I'm more determined than ever to enact common-sense gun reform measures once I get to Congress, and to finally stand up to the heartless gun lobby that has had its grip on Washington for far too long. Here in Nassau County, I call on Republican legislators to consider the Scott J. Biegel Gun Violence Prevention Act, which is a common-sense gun reform law that I already proposed and filed in the legislature. Scott was a teacher and a victim of the Parkland shooting who died a hero trying to save the lives of his students. **We cannot live with the status quo any more, Peter.** The town of Uvalde is scarred forever. There's no way to undo the brutal violence and senseless massacre they endured. But we can refuse to accept these tragedies, and never stop fighting for a world where our children can show up to school without fear. More to come, _Josh_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress.
---|---

subject: End of Month Deadline, We Need You Now!
body:
This is your last chance to have an impact on our race to Put America First. Please, take action...
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DmIGlBBNYmsh6FDkL1pDLgCovyV8GIh-NlazuVCMTXKgkyWIA2rJ95zkxbEw09DuPMCGeWAnjeslLpZRK-n4yxc0F6T6CgoM9f6BlYr-mZU32SI0yZWeRw8RtlKPF4JOCU_ed39xDVHWFHl-razyRJRS-PR9JDDtZoteJzooaRbZf8pNPSnpJn8MB7Au_0CS3kxac4-U3Op-mmuL6VLFfA==&c=3uEK4lkX8SUOJ_B3R5rNA1x-mGW40Cq2Q6Tyr0X2XX_gGz2URXEBLA==&ch=GwF_1-BoPPdoZ5NPrcRaxReVHmT2FXHcGSWPyLlyyyKQoBQVV10dUw==)
---
|
---
| |

| Friend,
Our End of Month Deadline is almost upon us again.
My team and I have emailed you multiple times about the urgent need for your financial support and you haven't responded. Not to mention that we have fallen drastically behind on our fundraising numbers due to the big-spending and high inflation caused by the Biden Administration.
I know times are tough right now, and that many of you are having to choose between putting food on your table or gas in your gas tank, I have to make those same choices just like you. I also work every day and support my family paycheck to paycheck just like every real American does. I don't come from money and I am tirelessly volunteering my time to this cause for each and every one of you. Now I am asking for a small contribution from you to keep our movement alive.
However, if we want these hard times to come to an end I need your financial support now. My opponents are self-funding to the tune of hundreds of thousands of dollars. I do not have that same ability, I rely on you, the everyday, American patriot that works hard for what you have, to support our cause and movement to Put America First.
---
| As your next Congresswoman, I will fight to put an end to this inflation, this big spending, the massive amounts of foreign aid that are bankrupting our country and I will always fight to Put America First.
Your support of our campaign with a generous donation today will move us one step closer to Saving America and bringing back a prosperous America for each and every American citizen.
Please donate to our campaign today. My team has activated a 5x match opportunity exclusively for you. This is our last deadline before the primary election and this is your last chance to contribute and make it count, so please donate to our campaign now!
🚨 5X MATCH ACTIVATED BELOW 🚨

---

clean_body: This is your last chance to have an impact on our race to Put America First. Please, take action... | | | | | | | == | | | | Friend, Our End of Month Deadline is almost upon us again. My team and I have emailed you multiple times about the urgent need for your financial support and you haven't responded. Not to mention that we have fallen drastically behind on our fundraising numbers due to the big-spending and high inflation caused by the Biden Administration. I know times are tough right now, and that many of you are having to choose between putting food on your table or gas in your gas tank, I have to make those same choices just like you. I also work every day and support my family paycheck to paycheck just like every real American does. I don't come from money and I am tirelessly volunteering my time to this cause for each and every one of you. Now I am asking for a small contribution from you to keep our movement alive. However, if we want these hard times to come to an end I need your financial support now. My opponents are self-funding to the tune of hundreds of thousands of dollars. I do not have that same ability, I rely on you, the everyday, American patriot that works hard for what you have, to support our cause and movement to Put America First. | As your next Congresswoman, I will fight to put an end to this inflation, this big spending, the massive amounts of foreign aid that are bankrupting our country and I will always fight to Put America First. Your support of our campaign with a generous donation today will move us one step closer to Saving America and bringing back a prosperous America for each and every American citizen. Please donate to our campaign today. My team has activated a 5x match opportunity exclusively for you. This is our last deadline before the primary election and this is your last chance to contribute and make it count, so please donate to our campaign now! 🚨 5X MATCH ACTIVATED BELOW 🚨 | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Without your support, we may lose Colorado forever and we won't take back the house in 2022. The time for action is now. Please contribute to the fight today. body:
In Texas we have a chance to defeat the Sinema of the House, but it’ll take all of us. | | | [](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q_nOaEc24eLmvGNIB85L8g03wQNrHVhYAaJJZqhS_R6GzaVZNTj_WN7aF5hjuCcAJork-TblV30iy9bw3TyanQYXbYeCjSb64IpdeD6-D8A4MUBQffpXPIz0mwE8OchK-j1sWfo9ugyAPthbvJHMQ6zej3NVx7Oqi9sZTLpN1XSqr0lthk2S1WmnvcUfj94VcF-DZA8d3hqgpLYTNq-xzZbCUJXKBxtntSLT1NupFVj1w5WkEOEVzVpHutvNVd2AyG31T9VqVisuziBsBIwiCqJ/3mb/EBvIHsATRXqHa1Gz2g0uTg/h0/rLcXmMAiaVjFzZCjmY__1T9lEsjFpISkSlPLrRTg5Ho)
Peter, today is Election Day for the critical 28th district in Texas, where Jessica Cisneros is fighting to defeat Henry Cuellar — a.k.a. the Sinema of the House and the last anti-choice “Democrat” in Congress. **_[Can you rush a donation of $5 to Jessica Cisneros’ campaign and the Primary Sinema Project today to fund Election Day GOTV? He’s even taken money from the Koch brothers — and put special interests before his constituents in South Texas at every turn. To make matters worse, in the final days leading up to Election Day, Cuellar’s allies have relied on sexist attacks and spreading misinformation to try to discredit Jessica. It’s obvious that Henry Cuellar and his supporters are getting desperate because they know that Jessica has the people behind her and she CAN win in South Texas. Let’s make it clear that anyone who follows in Kyrsten Sinema’s footsteps and prioritizes their millionaire donors over their constituents will face consequences at the ballot box. **_[This is our last chance to make an impact in today’s critical TX-28 runoff. clean_body: In Texas we have a chance to defeat the Sinema of the House, but it’ll take all of us. | | | Peter, today is Election Day for the critical 28th district in Texas, where Jessica Cisneros is fighting to defeat Henry Cuellar — a.k.a. the Sinema of the House and the last anti-choice “Democrat” in Congress. Here’s the cold, hard truth about Henry Cuellar: He’s just like Kyrsten Sinema and that’s why it’s so critical that we oust him from the House. Cuellar has taken six-figure checks from Big Oil, Big Pharma, and Republican billionaires. He’s even taken money from the Koch brothers — and put special interests before his constituents in South Texas at every turn. To make matters worse, in the final days leading up to Election Day, Cuellar’s allies have relied on sexist attacks and spreading misinformation to try to discredit Jessica. It’s obvious that Henry Cuellar and his supporters are getting desperate because they know that Jessica has the people behind her and she CAN win in South Texas. Let’s make it clear that anyone who follows in Kyrsten Sinema’s footsteps and prioritizes their millionaire donors over their constituents will face consequences at the ballot box. Thank you, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. That's why I'm calling on you, Friend, to stand with us and help bolster our efforts to restore our conservative majority in the United States Senate. President Trump, Georgia, and OUR country are counting on you. Will you answer the call?

Fellow American - thank you!

**Because of your support and the support of conservatives like you, Team Herschel won our primary election today.**

_**I'm humbled and honored to be the Republican nominee for the United States Senate from Georgia!**_

We're only at halftime, so there's still a lot of work left to do.

Fellow American, you know I'm not a politician. I don't look, sound, or dress like a politician.

But I LIKE _not being_ a politician! After all, politicians are making a mess of this country - _**but I'm here to help fix it!**_

Through my life experiences - winning a national championship with the University of Georgia, playing football in the NFL, and running successful businesses - I've learned that nothing worth doing is ever easy. I know this Senate race will be no different, but I am excited about the hard work that lies ahead.

There's so much at stake this year. As I've traveled around Georgia on the campaign trail, I've had the opportunity to speak with folks from all walks of life. Many are hurting and scared.

They can't afford food.
They can't pay for gas.
They're sick about what's happening in the schools.
They don't feel safe.
The America they know and love is slipping away. I am ready to be their voice and fight for them. **_They_ are the reason I entered this race. **

But we have an uphill climb, Fellow American.

Democrats and their Hollywood donors have poured tens of millions of dollars into Senator Raphael Warnock's campaign so they can continue their destruction.

In return, my opponent rubber stamps Joe Biden's policies and votes in lockstep with New York Senator Chuck Schumer!

Senator Warnock said in his tv ad that he can't fix Washington in one year. Well, he's not even trying. **His votes are destroying our economy and tearing our communities apart.**

**[Fellow American, have you had enough?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4v4kqk6jsev0efpeg7q8c9cgn8072mb2oclnkio_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5gm6or4s9h2bs)** The cost of doing "more of the same" is too high, so we must win back the Senate majority if we want to put America back on the right track.

If are you ready to take back this Senate seat, I need to know you're with me. **[Can we count on you to send $5, $10, or even $34 right now?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6j2fku7aep5nm4noberpbie2a0hsqkflj6s9hgo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5gm6or4s9h2bs)**

We've got a tremendous amount of work to do. The future of this great country rests on our shoulders because the road to defeating the Biden agenda and winning back the Senate majority runs right through Georgia. **[In order to stop Biden, we have to defeat Warnock. Plain and simple.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8krjits7flcf2ubqn4grfqgtsg1av9okidkdncg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5gm6or4s9h2bs)**

Fellow American, let's do this!

On to Victory,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zje9jncro51hqove5homvcuscpd9ts703blcft28_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5gm6or4s9h2bs)

Herschel Walker
Republican Nominee for Senate

[** DONATE TODAY -> **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0molqedm6jcf88lbuq97la9rfft2scun75h3oi0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5gm6or4s9h2bs)

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2f4gpqhlji2k9qqn4onb01uqn4vb0h609bb5k98_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5gm6or4s9h2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4m1nrqt7vrhbh5ta2najcsl24utf6iselhkhvf0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5gm6or4s9h2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztbfsnhsnhi69o3m0ahgqltt549ss2gr6vj3fovg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5gm6or4s9h2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl2cto6ai8j0lpjegtki06pnsliddk1go5aup2bo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5gm6or4s9h2bs)

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: A Texas elementary school…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Today’s school shooting in Texas is now the fourth deadliest school shooting in modern U.S. history
#

Friends -
Today was “Footloose and Fancy Day” at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, Texas. Students and teachers were asked to wear a nice outfit with fun or fancy shoes.
It was the last week of school filled with festive events and dress-up themes for the elementary school children, but one that ended with students being rushed out of their classes while police officers rushed in with guns drawn.
Today’s school shooting in Texas is now the fourth deadliest school shooting in modern U.S. history, behind only Virginia Tech, Parkland, and, of course, Sandy Hook.
Our nation’s schools should be the safest places in our communities, full of learning, fun and the kinds of happy memories Robb Elementary tried to provide for their kids in the final days of the school year.
They should not be places of horror and nightmares.
Speaking is still physically difficult for me, but my feelings are crystal clear: I am furious.
I am furious with those who have the power to act and save lives but are afraid to do anything to end this uniquely American epidemic.
I know the fear of the gun lobby that those cowards have must be nothing like the fear those children in Texas felt as their lives and the lives of their classmates ended in a hail of bullets.
Or the fear the children who survived today’s massacre will feel every single time they remember their teachers stacking them into closets and bathrooms, whispering in an effort to keep them safe.
Or the fear the parents must have felt when they were alerted that there was an active shooter situation happening at their kid's school.
Senator Chris Murphy said it best to his colleagues in the Senate today, “What are we doing?”
Congress knows how to solve this problem.
Congress knows the steps we can take to protect our kids in their classrooms.
And they know because this is the only country in the developed world where this kind of slaughter happens on a routine basis.
So yes, our thoughts and prayers are once again with the victims of this shooting, their families, and their friends. But our anger and outrage are with those who have the power to act and choose to do nothing.
We do not have to accept these horrific acts of violence as routine.
And we must never stop demanding our leaders not only acknowledge this devastating problem, but take long overdue action to keep our children safe.
I will not rest until we have righted the wrong our elected officials in Congress have done, and until we have changed our laws so we can finally look our parents in the face and say: we are doing everything we can to keep your children safe.
Thank you for standing with me in this struggle.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords

* * *
**[Giffords PAC works to reduce gun violence and save lives by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. Please make a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may22?refcode=em220524-2-30&t=1&refcode2=2046_3935704_JFHIVV&akid=2046%2E3935704%2EJFHIVV)**

clean_body: Today’s school shooting in Texas is now the fourth deadliest school shooting in modern U.S. history Friends - Today was “Footloose and Fancy Day” at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, Texas. Students and teachers were asked to wear a nice outfit with fun or fancy shoes. It was the last week of school filled with festive events and dress-up themes for the elementary school children, but one that ended with students being rushed out of their classes while police officers rushed in with guns drawn. Today’s school shooting in Texas is now the fourth deadliest school shooting in modern U.S. history, behind only Virginia Tech, Parkland, and, of course, Sandy Hook. Our nation’s schools should be the safest places in our communities, full of learning, fun and the kinds of happy memories Robb Elementary tried to provide for their kids in the final days of the school year. They should not be places of horror and nightmares. Speaking is still physically difficult for me, but my feelings are crystal clear: I am furious. I am furious with those who have the power to act and save lives but are afraid to do anything to end this uniquely American epidemic. I know the fear of the gun lobby that those cowards have must be nothing like the fear those children in Texas felt as their lives and the lives of their classmates ended in a hail of bullets. Or the fear the children who survived today’s massacre will feel every single time they remember their teachers stacking them into closets and bathrooms, whispering in an effort to keep them safe. Or the fear the parents must have felt when they were alerted that there was an active shooter situation happening at their kid's school. Senator Chris Murphy said it best to his colleagues in the Senate today, “What are we doing?” Congress knows how to solve this problem. Congress knows the steps we can take to protect our kids in their classrooms. And they know because this is the only country in the developed world where this kind of slaughter happens on a routine basis. So yes, our thoughts and prayers are once again with the victims of this shooting, their families, and their friends. But our anger and outrage are with those who have the power to act and choose to do nothing. We do not have to accept these horrific acts of violence as routine. And we must never stop demanding our leaders not only acknowledge this devastating problem, but take long overdue action to keep our children safe. I will not rest until we have righted the wrong our elected officials in Congress have done, and until we have changed our laws so we can finally look our parents in the face and say: we are doing everything we can to keep your children safe. Thank you for standing with me in this struggle. With courage, Gabby Giffords ** Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

|
---
| | "I first want to thank all of our supporters in our bid to be Lieutenant Governor. Tonight, I have called Attorney General Leslie Rutledge to congratulate her and her supporters on their victory and offered my full support as our Republican nominee heading into November.
I extend my congratulations to our next Governor, who happened to have been a former page of mine in the State Senate, Sarah Huckabee Sanders. She will govern this state with grace, class, and a clear conservative mandate.
Tonight, I am reminded of my time with Lieutenant Governor Win Paul Rockefeller. Serving with Win for five years was an absolute honor. He presided over the senate with authority and never met a stranger. He would have made a fantastic Governor. His efforts, any many others, helped pave the way for where we are today, and the future of our Party and State are very bright."
---
| | My Best for a Better Arkansas,
